      "en_q": "A cube with edge $6\\text{ cm}$ has a small cube hole with edge $2\\text{ cm}$ in the center of one face. The surface area of the shape is...",
      "options": [
        "$216\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$224\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$232\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$240\\text{ cm}^{2}$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 150 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M20,40 L100,40 L120,60 L40,60 Z M20,40 L20,120 L100,120 L100,40 M100,120 L120,140 L120,60' fill='none' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='50' y='70' width='20' height='20' fill='none' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='1'/><path d='M50,70 L60,65 L80,65 L70,70 M80,65 L80,85 L70,90' fill='none' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><text x='60' y='135' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' fill='#dc2626'>6cm</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "Becomes one cylinder with $h=20$. SA = $2\\pi r(r+h) = 785\\text{ cm}^{2}$.",
      "id_q": "Dua tabung identik ($r=5\\text{ cm}, t=10\\text{ cm}$) digabungkan secara vertikal (atas-bawah). Luas permukaan bangun gabungan adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Bangun menjadi satu tabung tinggi $20\\text{ cm}$. LP = $2\\pi r(r+h) = 2 \\times 3,14 \\times 5 \\times (5+20) = 31,4 \\times 25 = 785\\text{ cm}^{2}$.",
      "en_q": "Two identical cylinders ($r=5, t=10$) combined vertically. The combined surface area is...",
      "options": [
        "$785\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$816,5\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$848\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$879,5\\text{ cm}^{2}$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 120 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><ellipse cx='60' cy='30' rx='35' ry='10' fill='none' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='25' y1='30' x2='25' y2='170' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='95' y1='30' x2='95' y2='170' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='100' rx='35' ry='10' fill='none' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='170' rx='35' ry='10' fill='none' stroke='#059669' stroke-width='2'/><text x='60' y='190' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' fill='#059669'>r=5cm</text><text x='110' y='100' font-size='10' fill='#059669'>20cm</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "Solid hemisphere SA = $2\\pi r^{2} + \\pi r^{2} = 3\\pi r^{2} = 462\\text{ cm}^{2}$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah bola dengan jari-jari $7\\text{ cm}$ dipotong menjadi dua bagian sama besar. Luas permukaan salah satu setengah bola padat adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "LP setengah bola padat = Luas selimut bola + Luas lingkaran (alas). LP = $2\\pi r^{2} + \\pi r^{2} = 3\\pi r^{2} = 3 \\times 154 = 462\\text{ cm}^{2}$.",
      "en_q": "A sphere with $r=7$ is cut in half. The surface area of one solid hemisphere is...",
      "options": [
        "$308\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$462\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$516\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$616\\text{ cm}^{2}$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 150 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M25,60 A50,50 0 0,1 125,60' fill='none' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='75' cy='60' rx='50' ry='15' fill='none' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><text x='75' y='85' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' fill='#dc2626'>r=7cm</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "SA = Outer lateral + Inner lateral + 2 Ring areas. Total = $1758.4\\text{ cm}^{2}$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah tabung ($R=10\\text{ cm}, t=15\\text{ cm}$) memiliki lubang silinder ($r=4\\text{ cm}$) menembus tengahnya. Luas permukaan bangun tersebut adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "LP = Selimut luar ($2\\pi Rh$) + Selimut dalam ($2\\pi rh$) + 2 Luas Ring ($2 \\times \\pi(R^{2}-r^{2})$). Total = $942 + 376,8 + 439,6 = 1758,4\\text{ cm}^{2}$.",
      "en_q": "A cylinder ($R=10, t=15$) has a cylindrical hole ($r=4$) through its center. The surface area is...",
      "options": [
        "$1632,88\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$1758,4\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$1883,92\\text{ cm}^{2}$",
        "$2009,44\\text{ cm}^{2}$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 180 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><ellipse cx='90' cy='40' rx='70' ry='20' fill='none' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='90' cy='40' rx='30' ry='8' fill='none' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='20' y1='40' x2='20' y2='140' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='160' y1='40' x2='160' y2='140' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='40' x2='60' y2='140' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><line x1='120' y1='40' x2='120' y2='140' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><ellipse cx='90' cy='140' rx='70' ry='20' fill='none' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='90' cy='140' rx='30' ry='8' fill='none' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='1'/><text x='90' y='170' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' fill='#2563eb'>R=10, r=4</text></svg>"
    }
  ],

      "en_exp": "An isosceles triangle has two equal base angles. The sum of the base angles is 180\u00b0 - 50\u00b0 = 130\u00b0. Each base angle is 130\u00b0 / 2 = 65\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Segitiga PQR adalah segitiga sama kaki dengan sisi PQ = PR. Jika besar sudut puncak P adalah 50\u00b0, berapakah besar sudut alas Q?",

      "en_exp": "The sum of interior angles in a quadrilateral is 360\u00b0. The fourth angle is 360\u00b0 - (85\u00b0 + 105\u00b0 + 60\u00b0) = 360\u00b0 - 250\u00b0 = 110\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Tiga sudut pada sebuah segi empat sembarang besarnya berturut-turut adalah 85\u00b0, 105\u00b0, dan 60\u00b0. Berapakah besar sudut keempatnya?",

      "en_exp": "In a trapezoid, the consecutive angles between the parallel sides sum to 180\u00b0. The obtuse angle is 180\u00b0 - 40\u00b0 = 140\u00b0.",

      "en_q": "In a right trapezoid, there are two 90\u00b0 angles. If its acute angle is 40\u00b0, what is the measure of the obtuse angle in the trapezoid?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150'><polygon points='30,130 170,130 110,50 30,50' fill='#f0f0ff' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='30' y='115' width='15' height='15' fill='none' stroke='#000'/><rect x='30' y='50' width='15' height='15' fill='none' stroke='#000'/><text x='135' y='125'>40\u00b0</text><text x='95' y='75'>?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "In an isosceles trapezoid, the top angle is supplementary to the bottom angle on the same side. 180\u00b0 - 75\u00b0 = 105\u00b0. Top angles are equal, so opposite top angle is also 105\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Trapesium sama kaki ABCD memiliki sisi sejajar di bawah (AB) dan atas (CD). Jika besar sudut di titik A (bawah) adalah 75\u00b0, berapakah besar sudut di titik C (atas)?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Pada trapesium sama kaki, sudut atas berpelurus dengan sudut bawah di sisi yang sama (180\u00b0 - 75\u00b0 = 105\u00b0). Sudut atas sejajar juga besarnya sama, yaitu 105\u00b0.",

        "105\u00b0",
        "150\u00b0",
        "180\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "Isosceles trapezoid ABCD has parallel bases at the bottom (AB) and top (CD). If the angle at point A (bottom) is 75\u00b0, what is the measure of the angle at point C (top)?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150'><polygon points='40,130 160,130 130,50 70,50' fill='#f0f0ff' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><text x='25' y='145'>A</text><text x='165' y='145'>B</text><text x='135' y='40'>C</text><text x='65' y='40'>D</text><text x='55' y='120'>75\u00b0</text><text x='115' y='75'>?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "The sum of angles is 360\u00b0. Angle S = 360\u00b0 - (100\u00b0 + 100\u00b0 + 40\u00b0) = 360\u00b0 - 240\u00b0 = 120\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Pada layang-layang PQRS, sudut P berhadapan dengan sudut R, dan Q dengan S. Jika sudut P = 100\u00b0, sudut R = 100\u00b0, dan sudut Q = 40\u00b0, berapakah besar sudut S?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Total sudut segi empat adalah 360\u00b0. Sudut S = 360\u00b0 - (100\u00b0 + 100\u00b0 + 40\u00b0) = 360\u00b0 - 240\u00b0 = 120\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "40\u00b0",
        "100\u00b0",
        "120\u00b0",
        "140\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "In kite PQRS, angle P faces angle R, and Q faces S. If angle P = 100\u00b0, angle R = 100\u00b0, and angle Q = 40\u00b0, what is the measure of angle S?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 180'><polygon points='100,10 160,70 100,160 40,70' fill='#fff5ee' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><text x='30' y='65'>P</text><text x='95' y='175'>Q</text><text x='165' y='65'>R</text><text x='95' y='15'>S</text><text x='50' y='85'>100\u00b0</text><text x='125' y='85'>100\u00b0</text><text x='95' y='145'>40\u00b0</text><text x='95' y='40'>?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 14,
      "en_exp": "A kite has one pair of equal opposite angles (110\u00b0 and 110\u00b0). The fourth angle = 360\u00b0 - (110\u00b0 + 110\u00b0 + 50\u00b0) = 360\u00b0 - 270\u00b0 = 90\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah layang-layang memiliki sepasang sudut berhadapan yang sama besar, yaitu 110\u00b0. Jika satu sudut lainnya adalah 50\u00b0, berapakah besar sudut keempat?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Layang-layang memiliki sepasang sudut berhadapan sama (110\u00b0 & 110\u00b0). Sudut keempat = 360\u00b0 - (110\u00b0 + 110\u00b0 + 50\u00b0) = 360\u00b0 - 270\u00b0 = 90\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "50\u00b0",
        "90\u00b0",
        "110\u00b0",
        "140\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "A kite has a pair of equal opposite angles, which are 110\u00b0. If one of the other angles is 50\u00b0, what is the measure of the fourth angle?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 180'><polygon points='100,10 150,70 100,160 50,70' fill='#fff5ee' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><text x='55' y='85'>110\u00b0</text><text x='115' y='85'>110\u00b0</text><text x='95' y='145'>50\u00b0</text><text x='95' y='40'>?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "The intersecting angles of diagonals lie on a straight line, summing to 180\u00b0. The acute angle is 180\u00b0 - 130\u00b0 = 50\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Dua diagonal persegi panjang berpotongan dan membentuk sebuah sudut tumpul 130\u00b0. Berapakah besar sudut lancip yang dibentuk oleh perpotongan tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Sudut-sudut yang terbentuk dari perpotongan diagonal berada pada garis lurus (180\u00b0). Sudut lancipnya adalah 180\u00b0 - 130\u00b0 = 50\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "40\u00b0",
        "50\u00b0",
        "60\u00b0",
        "90\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "Two diagonals of a rectangle intersect and form an obtuse angle of 130\u00b0. What is the measure of the acute angle formed by the intersection?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150'><rect x='30' y='30' width='140' height='90' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='30' x2='170' y2='120' stroke='#000' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='30' y1='120' x2='170' y2='30' stroke='#000' stroke-width='1'/><text x='85' y='65'>130\u00b0</text><text x='75' y='80'>?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "A unique property of a square (and rhombus) is that its diagonals always intersect at right angles (90\u00b0).",
      "id_q": "Perpotongan kedua garis diagonal pada bangun datar persegi selalu membentuk sudut sebesar...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Sifat istimewa dari bangun persegi (dan belah ketupat) adalah kedua diagonalnya selalu berpotongan tegak lurus membentuk sudut 90\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "45\u00b0",
        "60\u00b0",
        "90\u00b0",
        "180\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "The intersection of the two diagonal lines in a square flat shape always forms an angle of...",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'><rect x='50' y='50' width='100' height='100' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='150' y2='150' stroke='#000' stroke-width='1'/><line x1='50' y1='150' x2='150' y2='50' stroke='#000' stroke-width='1'/><text x='95' y='120'>?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "The interior angle of an equilateral triangle is 60\u00b0. Its exterior angle forms a straight line with it, so 180\u00b0 - 60\u00b0 = 120\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Besar sudut luar pada salah satu titik sudut segitiga sama sisi adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Sudut dalam segitiga sama sisi adalah 60\u00b0. Sudut luarnya berpelurus dengan sudut dalam, sehingga 180\u00b0 - 60\u00b0 = 120\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "60\u00b0",
        "90\u00b0",
        "120\u00b0",
        "150\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "The measure of the exterior angle at one of the vertices of an equilateral triangle is...",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150'><polygon points='50,120 120,120 85,60' fill='#f0f8ff' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='120' y1='120' x2='170' y2='120' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 135 120 A 15 15 0 0 0 127 108' fill='none' stroke='#000'/><text x='140' y='110'>?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "The sum is 360\u00b0. x + 2x + 3x + 4x = 360\u00b0 -> 10x = 360\u00b0 -> x = 36\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Keempat sudut pada sebuah segi empat sembarang besarnya adalah x, 2x, 3x, dan 4x. Berapakah nilai x?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jumlah totalnya 360\u00b0. x + 2x + 3x + 4x = 360\u00b0 -> 10x = 360\u00b0 -> x = 36\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "18\u00b0",
        "36\u00b0",
        "72\u00b0",
        "144\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "The four angles of an arbitrary quadrilateral measure x, 2x, 3x, and 4x. What is the value of x?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150'><polygon points='40,130 160,110 130,40 60,60' fill='#fff0f0' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><text x='55' y='115'>x</text><text x='130' y='100'>2x</text><text x='110' y='65'>3x</text><text x='70' y='80'>4x</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "Let the parts be A and B, where A + B = 90\u00b0. Since A = B + 20\u00b0, then (B + 20\u00b0) + B = 90\u00b0 -> 2B = 70\u00b0 -> B = 35\u00b0. The first (larger) part is A = 35\u00b0 + 20\u00b0 = 55\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Garis diagonal persegi panjang membagi sudut siku-sikunya menjadi dua bagian. Jika bagian pertama lebih besar 20\u00b0 dari bagian kedua, berapakah besar sudut bagian pertama?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Misal bagian itu A dan B. A + B = 90\u00b0. Karena A = B + 20\u00b0, maka (B + 20\u00b0) + B = 90\u00b0 -> 2B = 70\u00b0 -> B = 35\u00b0. Bagian pertama (yang lebih besar) adalah 35\u00b0 + 20\u00b0 = 55\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "35\u00b0",
        "45\u00b0",
        "55\u00b0",
        "70\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "The diagonal of a rectangle divides its right angle into two parts. If the first part is 20\u00b0 larger than the second part, what is the measure of the first part angle?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150'><rect x='40' y='30' width='120' height='90' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='40' y1='120' x2='160' y2='30' stroke='#000' stroke-width='1'/><path d='M 60 120 A 20 20 0 0 0 55 108' fill='none' stroke='#000'/><path d='M 40 100 A 20 20 0 0 0 55 108' fill='none' stroke='#000'/><text x='65' y='115'>B</text><text x='45' y='95'>A</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "Adjacent angles sum to 180\u00b0. Ratio 2 : 3 means 2x + 3x = 180\u00b0 -> 5x = 180\u00b0 -> x = 36\u00b0. The obtuse angle is 3x = 3 * 36\u00b0 = 108\u00b0.",
      "id_q": "Pada jajar genjang, perbandingan sudut yang saling berdekatan adalah 2 : 3. Berapakah besar sudut tumpul pada jajar genjang tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jumlah sudut berdekatan adalah 180\u00b0. Rasio 2 : 3 berarti 2x + 3x = 180\u00b0 -> 5x = 180\u00b0 -> x = 36\u00b0. Sudut tumpulnya adalah 3x = 3 x 36\u00b0 = 108\u00b0.",
      "options": [
        "72\u00b0",
        "108\u00b0",
        "144\u00b0",
        "150\u00b0"
      ],
      "en_q": "In a parallelogram, the ratio of adjacent angles is 2 : 3. What is the measure of the obtuse angle in the parallelogram?",
      "image": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 150'><polygon points='50,130 160,130 180,50 70,50' fill='#f0fff0' stroke='#000' stroke-width='2'/><text x='60' y='120'>2x</text><text x='140' y='120'>3x</text></svg>"
    }
  ],
  "grade": "6",
  "firestore_id": "xMFTDW38KgLpnVUbQe2G",

  "duration": "3600",

}

      "en_exp": "The LCM of 7 and 8 is 56.<br>$\\frac{40}{56} + \\frac{21}{56} = \\frac{61}{56}$.<br>Convert to a mixed number: <strong>$1\\frac{5}{56}$</strong>.",

    {
      "en_exp": "Convert to an improper fraction: $1\\frac{1}{8} = \\frac{9}{8}$.<br>$\\frac{9}{8} - \\frac{3}{8} = \\frac{6}{8}$.<br>Simplify by dividing by 2: <strong>$\\frac{3}{4}$</strong>.",

    {
      "en_exp": "An <strong>Acute</strong> angle measures between $0^\\circ - 90^\\circ$.<br>Right angle is exactly $90^\\circ$, Obtuse is $90^\\circ - 180^\\circ$.",

- **Subject:** Math
- **Difficulty:** Medium
- **Firestore ID:** `OepfwXujGbTq60B49Tio`

### Full JSON Data:

{
  "createdAt": "2026-03-06T07:38:51.180000+00:00",

  "questions": [
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Solve the multiplication first: $15 \times (-4) = -60$.\n2. Solve the division: $200 div 5 = 40$.\n3. Add the results: $-60 + 40 = -20$.",
      "id": 1,
      "en_q": "(Integers) The result of $15 \times (-4) + 200 div 5$ is...",
      "id_q": "(Bilangan Bulat) Hasil dari $15 \times (-4) + 200 div 5$ adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "1. Selesaikan perkalian terlebih dahulu: $15 \times (-4) = -60$.\n2. Selesaikan pembagian: $200 div 5 = 40$.\n3. Jumlahkan hasilnya: $-60 + 40 = -20$.",
      "options": [
        "$-20$",
        "$-100$",
        "$20$",
        "$100$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Do the fraction multiplication first: $\frac{1}{2} \times \frac{2}{3} = \frac{2}{6} = \frac{1}{3}$.\n2. Equalize the denominators for addition: $\frac{3}{4} + \frac{1}{3} = \frac{9}{12} + \frac{4}{12}$.\n3. The result is $\frac{13}{12}$ or $1 \frac{1}{12}$.",
      "id": 2,
      "en_q": "(Fractions) What is the result of $\frac{3}{4} + \frac{1}{2} \times \frac{2}{3}$?",
      "id_q": "(Pecahan) Berapakah hasil dari $\frac{3}{4} + \frac{1}{2} \times \frac{2}{3}$?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Kerjakan perkalian pecahan terlebih dahulu: $\frac{1}{2} \times \frac{2}{3} = \frac{2}{6} = \frac{1}{3}$.\n2. Samakan penyebut untuk penjumlahan: $\frac{3}{4} + \frac{1}{3} = \frac{9}{12} + \frac{4}{12}$.\n3. Hasilnya adalah $\frac{13}{12}$ atau $1 \frac{1}{12}$.",
      "options": [
        "$\frac{5}{6}$",
        "$\frac{13}{12}$",
        "$\frac{8}{9}$",
        "$\frac{1}{3}$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Convert $25\\%$ to a fraction: $25\\% = \frac{25}{100} = \frac{1}{4}$.\n2. If $\frac{1}{4}$ of the class is $10$ students, the total is $10 div \frac{1}{4}$.\n3. Calculate the total: $10 \times 4 = 40$ students.",
      "id": 3,
      "en_q": "(Percentage) If $25\\%$ of the students in a class is $10$ students, what is the total number of students in the class?",
      "id_q": "(Persentase) Jika $25\\%$ dari jumlah siswa di kelas adalah $10$ orang, berapakah total siswa di kelas tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Ubah $25\\%$ menjadi pecahan: $25\\% = \frac{25}{100} = \frac{1}{4}$.\n2. Jika $\frac{1}{4}$ bagian adalah $10$ orang, maka total siswa adalah $10 div \frac{1}{4}$.\n3. Hitung totalnya: $10 \times 4 = 40$ orang.",
      "options": [
        "$20$",
        "$30$",
        "$40$",
        "$50$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Use the circle area formula: $A = pi \times r^2$.\n2. Substitute the values: $A = \frac{22}{7} \times 14 \times 14$.\n3. Simplify and multiply: $A = 22 \times 2 \times 14 = 616$ cm$^2$.",
      "id": 4,
      "en_q": "(Circle) A circle has a radius $r = 14$ cm. The area of the circle is... (Use $pi = \frac{22}{7}$)",
      "id_q": "(Lingkaran) Sebuah lingkaran memiliki jari-jari $r = 14$ cm. Luas lingkaran tersebut adalah... (Gunakan $pi = \frac{22}{7}$)",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "1. Gunakan rumus luas lingkaran: $L = pi \times r^2$.\n2. Substitusikan nilai: $L = \frac{22}{7} \times 14 \times 14$.\n3. Sederhanakan dan kalikan: $L = 22 \times 2 \times 14 = 616$ cm$^2$.",
      "options": [
        "$88$ cm$^2$",
        "$154$ cm$^2$",
        "$308$ cm$^2$",
        "$616$ cm$^2$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Use the cube volume formula: $V = s^3$.\n2. Substitute the value: $V = 8 \times 8 \times 8$.\n3. The result is $512$ cm$^3$.",
      "id": 5,
      "en_q": "(Solid Geometry) What is the volume of a cube with an edge length of $s = 8$ cm?",
      "id_q": "(Bangun Ruang) Berapakah volume kubus yang memiliki panjang rusuk $s = 8$ cm?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Gunakan rumus volume kubus: $V = s^3$.\n2. Substitusikan nilai: $V = 8 \times 8 \times 8$.\n3. Hasilnya adalah $512$ cm$^3$.",
      "options": [
        "$64$ cm$^3$",
        "$256$ cm$^3$",
        "$512$ cm$^3$",
        "$384$ cm$^3$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. The formula for cylinder volume is $V = pi \times r^2 \times h$.\n2. Substitute the values: $V = \frac{22}{7} \times 7^2 \times 10$.\n3. Calculate the result: $V = 22 \times 7 \times 10 = 1,540$ cm$^3$.",
      "id": 6,
      "en_q": "(Solid Geometry) A cylinder has a base radius of $7$ cm and a height of $10$ cm. The volume of the cylinder is... (Use $pi = \frac{22}{7}$)",
      "id_q": "(Bangun Ruang) Sebuah tabung memiliki jari-jari alas $7$ cm dan tinggi $10$ cm. Volume tabung tersebut adalah... (Gunakan $pi = \frac{22}{7}$)",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "1. Rumus volume tabung adalah $V = pi \times r^2 \times t$.\n2. Substitusikan nilai: $V = \frac{22}{7} \times 7^2 \times 10$.\n3. Hitung hasilnya: $V = 22 \times 7 \times 10 = 1.540$ cm$^3$.",
      "options": [

        "$220$ cm$^3$",
        "$440$ cm$^3$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Sum all values: $6 + 8 + 7 + 9 + 10 = 40$.\n2. Count the number of data points: there are $5$ numbers.\n3. Average = Total sum divided by the number of data points: $40 div 5 = 8$.",
      "id": 7,
      "en_q": "(Statistics) The average of the data values: $6, 8, 7, 9, 10$ is...",
      "id_q": "(Statistika) Rata-rata dari data nilai: $6, 8, 7, 9, 10$ adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Jumlahkan seluruh nilai: $6 + 8 + 7 + 9 + 10 = 40$.\n2. Hitung banyaknya data: ada $5$ angka.\n3. Rata-rata = Jumlah nilai dibagi banyak data: $40 div 5 = 8$.",
      "options": [
        "$7$",
        "$7,5$",
        "$8$",
        "$8,5$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Actual distance = Map distance multiplied by scale factor: $4 \times 500,000 = 2,000,000$ cm.\n2. Convert cm to km (divide by $100,000$): $2,000,000 div 100,000 = 20$.\n3. The result is $20$ km.",
      "id": 8,
      "en_q": "(Scale) The distance on a map is $4$ cm with a scale of $1 : 500,000$. The actual distance is...",
      "id_q": "(Skala) Jarak pada peta adalah $4$ cm dengan skala $1 : 500.000$. Jarak sebenarnya adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Jarak sebenarnya = Jarak peta dikali skala: $4 \times 500.000 = 2.000.000$ cm.\n2. Ubah satuan cm ke km (dibagi $100.000$): $2.000.000 div 100.000 = 20$.\n3. Hasilnya adalah $20$ km.",
      "options": [
        "$2$ km",
        "$20$ km",
        "$200$ km",
        "$2.000$ km"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Sum the ratio components: $2 + 3 = 5$.\n2. Andi's money = $\frac{2}{5} \times 50,000$.\n3. Calculate: $2 \times 10,000 = 20,000$. Thus, Rp$20,000$.",
      "id": 9,
      "en_q": "(Ratio) The ratio of Andi's money to Budi's money is $2 : 3$. If their total money is Rp$50,000$, how much is Andi's money?",
      "id_q": "(Perbandingan) Perbandingan uang Andi dan Budi adalah $2 : 3$. Jika jumlah uang mereka adalah Rp$50.000$, berapakah uang Andi?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Jumlahkan rasio: $2 + 3 = 5$.\n2. Uang Andi = $\frac{2}{5} \times 50.000$.\n3. Hitung: $2 \times 10.000 = 20.000$. Jadi, Rp$20.000$.",
      "options": [
        "Rp$10.000$",
        "Rp$20.000$",
        "Rp$30.000$",
        "Rp$40.000$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Prime factorization: $12 = 2^2 \times 3$, $15 = 3 \times 5$, $20 = 2^2 \times 5$.\n2. LCM is obtained from prime factors with the highest exponents: $2^2 \times 3 \times 5$.\n3. The result: $4 \times 3 \times 5 = 60$.",
      "id": 10,
      "en_q": "(LCM) The Least Common Multiple (LCM) of the numbers $12, 15$, and $20$ is...",
      "id_q": "(KPK) Kelipatan Persekutuan Terkecil (KPK) dari bilangan $12, 15$, dan $20$ adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Faktorisasi prima: $12 = 2^2 \times 3$, $15 = 3 \times 5$, $20 = 2^2 \times 5$.\n2. KPK diambil dari faktor prima dengan pangkat terbesar: $2^2 \times 3 \times 5$.\n3. Hasilnya: $4 \times 3 \times 5 = 60$.",
      "options": [
        "$30$",
        "$60$",
        "$120$",
        "$180$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Factorization: $24 = 2^3 \times 3$, $36 = 2^2 \times 3^2$, $48 = 2^4 \times 3$.\n2. GCD is obtained from common prime factors with the lowest exponents: $2^2 \times 3$.\n3. The result: $4 \times 3 = 12$.",
      "id": 11,
      "en_q": "(GCD) The Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) of $24, 36$, and $48$ is...",
      "id_q": "(FPB) Faktor Persekutuan Terbesar (FPB) dari $24, 36$, dan $48$ adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Faktorisasi: $24 = 2^3 \times 3$, $36 = 2^2 \times 3^2$, $48 = 2^4 \times 3$.\n2. FPB diambil dari faktor prima yang sama dengan pangkat terkecil: $2^2 \times 3$.\n3. Hasilnya: $4 \times 3 = 12$.",
      "options": [
        "$6$",
        "$8$",
        "$12$",
        "$24$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Use the time formula: $t = \frac{d}{v}$ (distance divided by speed).\n2. Insert the values: $t = \frac{120}{60}$.\n3. The result is $2$ hours.",
      "id": 12,
      "en_q": "(Speed) A car travels a distance of $120$ km at an average speed of $60$ km/h. The time required is...",
      "id_q": "(Kecepatan) Sebuah mobil menempuh jarak $120$ km dengan kecepatan rata-rata $60$ km/jam. Waktu yang dibutuhkan adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Gunakan rumus waktu: $t = \frac{s}{v}$ (jarak dibagi kecepatan).\n2. Masukkan nilai: $t = \frac{120}{60}$.\n3. Hasilnya adalah $2$ jam.",
      "options": [
        "$1$ jam",
        "$2$ jam",
        "$3$ jam",
        "$4$ jam"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Convert the fraction to a decimal: $\frac{1}{4} = 0.25$.\n2. Perform addition: $0.5 + 0.25 = 0.75$.\n3. Perform subtraction: $0.75 - 0.2 = 0.55$.",
      "id": 13,
      "en_q": "(Decimals) The result of the operation $0.5 + \frac{1}{4} - 0.2$ is...",
      "id_q": "(Desimal) Hasil dari operasi $0,5 + \frac{1}{4} - 0,2$ adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Ubah pecahan menjadi desimal: $\frac{1}{4} = 0,25$.\n2. Lakukan penjumlahan: $0,5 + 0,25 = 0,75$.\n3. Lakukan pengurangan: $0,75 - 0,2 = 0,55$.",
      "options": [
        "$0,45$",
        "$0,55$",
        "$0,65$",
        "$0,75$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Calculate profit: Rp$60,000$ - Rp$50,000$ = Rp$10,000$.\n2. Profit percentage formula: $\frac{\text{Profit}}{\text{Cost Price}} \times 100\\%$.\n3. Insert values: $\frac{10,000}{50,000} \times 100\\% = \frac{1}{5} \times 100\\% = 20\\%$.",
      "id": 14,
      "en_q": "(Social Arithmetic) Mr. Budi bought a book for Rp$50,000$ and sold it for Rp$60,000$. His profit percentage is...",
      "id_q": "(Aritmetika Sosial) Pak Budi membeli buku seharga Rp$50.000$ dan menjualnya seharga Rp$60.000$. Persentase keuntungannya adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Hitung keuntungan: Rp$60.000$ - Rp$50.000$ = Rp$10.000$.\n2. Rumus persentase untung: $\frac{\text{Untung}}{\text{Harga Beli}} \times 100\\%$.\n3. Masukkan nilai: $\frac{10.000}{50.000} \times 100\\% = \frac{1}{5} \times 100\\% = 20\\%$.",
      "options": [
        "$10\\%$",
        "$15\\%$",
        "$20\\%$",
        "$25\\%$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Calculate the cube: $5^3 = 5 \times 5 \times 5 = 125$.\n2. Calculate the square: $4^2 = 4 \times 4 = 16$.\n3. Subtract the results: $125 - 16 = 109$.",
      "id": 15,
      "en_q": "(Exponents) What is the result of $5^3 - 4^2$?",
      "id_q": "(Pangkat) Berapakah hasil dari $5^3 - 4^2$?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Hitung nilai pangkat tiga: $5^3 = 5 \times 5 \times 5 = 125$.\n2. Hitung nilai pangkat dua: $4^2 = 4 \times 4 = 16$.\n3. Kurangi hasilnya: $125 - 16 = 109$.",
      "options": [
        "$9$",
        "$109$",
        "$115$",
        "$121$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Find the square root: $sqrt{144} = 12$.\n2. Find the cube root: $sqrt[3]{27} = 3$ (since $3 \times 3 \times 3 = 27$).\n3. Add them up: $12 + 3 = 15$.",
      "id": 16,
      "en_q": "(Roots) The calculated result of $sqrt{144} + sqrt[3]{27}$ is...",
      "id_q": "(Akar) Hasil perhitungan dari $sqrt{144} + sqrt[3]{27}$ adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "1. Cari akar pangkat dua: $sqrt{144} = 12$.\n2. Cari akar pangkat tiga: $sqrt[3]{27} = 3$ (karena $3 \times 3 \times 3 = 27$).\n3. Jumlahkan: $12 + 3 = 15$.",
      "options": [
        "$15$",
        "$16$",
        "$21$",
        "$25$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. A triangle is a two-dimensional shape with three sides and three angles.\n2. According to geometric properties, the sum of the three interior angles in any type of triangle is always constant.\n3. The sum is always $180^{circ}$.",
      "id": 17,
      "en_q": "(Geometry Angles) The sum of the interior angles of a triangle is always equal to...",
      "id_q": "(Geometri Sudut) Jumlah besar sudut dalam pada sebuah segitiga selalu sama dengan...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Segitiga adalah bangun datar dengan tiga sisi dan tiga sudut.\n2. Berdasarkan sifat geometri, jumlah ketiga sudut dalam pada setiap jenis segitiga selalu konstan.\n3. Jumlahnya selalu bernilai $180^{circ}$.",
      "options": [
        "$90^{circ}$",
        "$180^{circ}$",
        "$270^{circ}$",
        "$360^{circ}$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Division is performed first: $400 div 20 = 20$.\n2. Rewrite the equation: $1,200 - 20 + 50$.\n3. Calculate from left to right: $1,180 + 50 = 1,230$.",
      "id": 18,
      "en_q": "(Mixed Arithmetic Operations) The result of $1,200 - 400 div 20 + 50$ is...",
      "id_q": "(Operasi Hitung Campuran) Hasil dari $1.200 - 400 div 20 + 50$ adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Operasi pembagian didahulukan: $400 div 20 = 20$.\n2. Tulis kembali persamaannya: $1.200 - 20 + 50$.\n3. Kerjakan dari kiri ke kanan: $1.180 + 50 = 1.230$.",
      "options": [
        "$90$",
        "$1.180$",
        "$1.230$",
        "$1.250$"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Use the flow rate formula: $Q = \frac{V}{t}$ (Volume divided by time).\n2. Insert the given values: $Q = \frac{120}{4}$.\n3. The calculated result is $30$ liters/minute.",
      "id": 19,
      "en_q": "(Water Flow Rate) A faucet flows $120$ liters of water in $4$ minutes. The water flow rate of the faucet is...",
      "id_q": "(Debit Air) Sebuah keran mengalirkan air sebanyak $120$ liter dalam waktu $4$ menit. Debit air keran tersebut adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Gunakan rumus debit: $Q = \frac{V}{t}$ (Volume dibagi waktu).\n2. Masukkan nilai yang diketahui: $Q = \frac{120}{4}$.\n3. Hasil perhitungan adalah $30$ liter/menit.",
      "options": [
        "$20$ liter/menit",
        "$30$ liter/menit",
        "$40$ liter/menit",
        "$60$ liter/menit"
      ]
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "1. Add the hours: $07 + 2 = 09$.\n2. Add the minutes: $15 + 30 = 45$.\n3. Combine hours and minutes: $09:45$.",
      "id": 20,
      "en_q": "(Time) A train departs at $07:15$ and travels for $2$ hours and $30$ minutes. At what time does the train arrive?",
      "id_q": "(Waktu) Sebuah kereta berangkat pada pukul $07:15$ dan menempuh perjalanan selama $2$ jam $30$ menit. Pukul berapakah kereta tersebut tiba?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Tambahkan waktu jam: $07 + 2 = 09$.\n2. Tambahkan waktu menit: $15 + 30 = 45$.\n3. Gabungkan hasil jam dan menit: Pukul $09:45$.",
      "options": [
        "$09:30$",
        "$09:45$",
        "$10:00$",
        "$10:15$"
      ]
    }

- **Subject:** Math

- **Firestore ID:** `NXxKchcNU9inGsgQl4BK`

      "id": 1,
      "en_exp": "1. Even number sequence: $2 + 4 + 6 + ... + 100$.\n2. The number of terms ($n$) is $100 \\div 2 = 50$.\n3. Use the arithmetic progression formula: $S = \\frac{n}{2} \\times (a + U_n)$.\n4. Substitute the values: $S = \\frac{50}{2} \\times (2 + 100) = 25 \\times 102 = 2,550$.",
      "id_q": "(Deret Aritmetika) Berapakah hasil penjumlahan semua bilangan genap dari $2$ hingga $100$?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Deret bilangan genap: $2 + 4 + 6 + ... + 100$.\n2. Banyaknya suku ($n$) adalah $100 \\div 2 = 50$.\n3. Gunakan rumus deret aritmetika: $S = \\frac{n}{2} \\times (a + U_n)$.\n4. Substitusikan nilai: $S = \\frac{50}{2} \\times (2 + 100) = 25 \\times 102 = 2.550$.",
      "en_q": "(Arithmetic Sequence) What is the sum of all even numbers from $2$ to $100$?",
      "options": [
        "$2.500$",
        "$2.550$",
        "$5.050$",
        "$5.100$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "en_exp": "1. The pattern is a sequence of perfect squares.\n2. 1st term = $1^2 = 1$, 2nd term = $2^2 = 4$, 3rd term = $3^2 = 9$, and so on.\n3. Therefore, the 12th term is $12^2 = 12 \\times 12 = 144$.",
      "id_q": "(Pola Bilangan) Perhatikan pola bilangan berikut: $1, 4, 9, 16, 25, ...$ Berapakah bilangan pada urutan ke-12?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Pola tersebut adalah barisan bilangan kuadrat sempurna.\n2. Suku ke-1 = $1^2 = 1$, Suku ke-2 = $2^2 = 4$, Suku ke-3 = $3^2 = 9$, dan seterusnya.\n3. Maka, suku ke-12 adalah $12^2 = 12 \\times 12 = 144$.",
      "en_q": "(Number Pattern) Observe the following number pattern: $1, 4, 9, 16, 25, ...$ What is the number in the 12th position?",
      "options": [
        "$100$",
        "$121$",
        "$144$",
        "$169$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },

      "id": 3,
      "en_exp": "1. Let Andi's current age $= A$ and Budi's $= B$. So $A = 3B$.\n2. Five years from now: $A + 5 = 2(B + 5)$.\n3. Substitute $A = 3B$ into the second equation: $3B + 5 = 2B + 10$.\n4. Move variables: $3B - 2B = 10 - 5 \\rightarrow B = 5$.\n5. Andi's current age: $A = 3 \\times 5 = 15$ years.",
      "id_q": "(Aljabar Umur) Saat ini umur Andi $3$ kali lipat umur Budi. Lima tahun yang akan datang, umur Andi menjadi $2$ kali lipat umur Budi. Berapakah umur Andi saat ini?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Misal umur Andi sekarang $= A$ dan umur Budi $= B$. Maka $A = 3B$.\n2. Lima tahun lagi: $A + 5 = 2(B + 5)$.\n3. Substitusi $A = 3B$ ke persamaan kedua: $3B + 5 = 2B + 10$.\n4. Pindahkan variabel: $3B - 2B = 10 - 5 \\rightarrow B = 5$.\n5. Umur Andi saat ini: $A = 3 \\times 5 = 15$ tahun.",
      "en_q": "(Age Algebra) Currently, Andi's age is $3$ times Budi's age. Five years from now, Andi's age will be $2$ times Budi's age. How old is Andi now?",

      "id": 4,
      "en_exp": "1. The rule for divisibility by $3$ is that the sum of the digits must be divisible by $3$.\n2. The sum of the digits is $4 + A + 7 = 11 + A$.\n3. For $11 + A$ to be divisible by $3$, the valid values for $A$ (digits from $0$ to $9$) are $1, 4,$ and $7$ (since $12, 15, 18$ are divisible by $3$).\n4. The sum of all possible values of $A$ is $1 + 4 + 7 = 12$.",
      "id_q": "(Keterbagian) Diketahui bilangan tiga angka $4A7$ habis dibagi $3$. Berapakah jumlah dari semua kemungkinan nilai angka $A$?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Syarat bilangan habis dibagi $3$ adalah jumlah angka-angkanya habis dibagi $3$.\n2. Jumlah angkanya adalah $4 + A + 7 = 11 + A$.\n3. Agar $11 + A$ habis dibagi $3$, nilai $A$ (angka dari $0$ sampai $9$) yang memenuhi adalah $1, 4,$ dan $7$ (karena $12, 15, 18$ habis dibagi $3$).\n4. Jumlah semua kemungkinan nilai $A$ adalah $1 + 4 + 7 = 12$.",

      "id": 5,
      "en_exp": "1. Machine P's rate $= \\frac{1}{4}$ job/hour. Machine Q's rate $= \\frac{1}{12}$ job/hour.\n2. Working together, their combined rate $= \\frac{1}{4} + \\frac{1}{12}$.\n3. Common denominator: $\\frac{3}{12} + \\frac{1}{12} = \\frac{4}{12} = \\frac{1}{3}$ job/hour.\n4. The time required is the reciprocal of the combined rate, which is $\\frac{3}{1} = 3$ hours.",
      "id_q": "(Pekerjaan Bersama) Mesin P dapat mencetak dokumen dalam waktu $4$ jam, sedangkan mesin Q membutuhkan waktu $12$ jam. Jika kedua mesin digunakan bersama-sama, waktu yang dibutuhkan adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Kecepatan mesin P $= \\frac{1}{4}$ pekerjaan/jam. Kecepatan mesin Q $= \\frac{1}{12}$ pekerjaan/jam.\n2. Jika bersama-sama, kecepatan gabungan $= \\frac{1}{4} + \\frac{1}{12}$.\n3. Samakan penyebut: $\\frac{3}{12} + \\frac{1}{12} = \\frac{4}{12} = \\frac{1}{3}$ pekerjaan/jam.\n4. Waktu yang dibutuhkan adalah kebalikan dari kecepatan gabungan, yaitu $\\frac{3}{1} = 3$ jam.",
      "en_q": "(Joint Work) Machine P can print documents in $4$ hours, while machine Q takes $12$ hours. If both machines are used together, the time required is...",
      "options": [
        "$2$ jam",
        "$3$ jam",
        "$4$ jam",
        "$8$ jam"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "en_exp": "1. Use the travel time formula: Time $= \\frac{\\text{Distance}}{\\text{Speed}}$.\n2. Time $= \\frac{120}{40} = 3$ hours.\n3. Arrival time $= 08:30 + 3$ hours $= 11:30$.",
      "id_q": "(Kecepatan & Waktu) Pak Dedi mengendarai mobil dengan kecepatan rata-rata $40$ km/jam menempuh jarak $120$ km. Jika ia berangkat pukul $08:30$, pukul berapakah ia akan tiba di tujuan?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Gunakan rumus waktu tempuh: Waktu $= \\frac{\\text{Jarak}}{\\text{Kecepatan}}$.\n2. Waktu $= \\frac{120}{40} = 3$ jam.\n3. Waktu tiba $= 08:30 + 3$ jam $= 11:30$.",
      "en_q": "(Speed & Time) Mr. Dedi drives a car at an average speed of $40$ km/h covering a distance of $120$ km. If he departs at $08:30$, what time will he arrive at his destination?",
      "options": [
        "$10:30$",
        "$11:00$",
        "$11:30$",
        "$12:00$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "en_exp": "1. Find the LCM of $8, 12,$ and $15$.\n2. Factorization: $8 = 2^3$, $12 = 2^2 \\times 3$, $15 = 3 \\times 5$.\n3. LCM $= 2^3 \\times 3 \\times 5 = 8 \\times 3 \\times 5 = 120$ minutes.\n4. $120$ minutes is equal to $2$ hours. Next time $= 10:00 + 2$ hours $= 12:00$.",
      "id_q": "(KPK dalam Waktu) Lonceng A berbunyi setiap $8$ menit, lonceng B setiap $12$ menit, dan lonceng C setiap $15$ menit. Jika ketiga lonceng berbunyi bersamaan pada pukul $10:00$, pukul berapakah ketiganya berbunyi bersamaan lagi?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Cari KPK dari $8, 12,$ dan $15$.\n2. Faktorisasi: $8 = 2^3$, $12 = 2^2 \\times 3$, $15 = 3 \\times 5$.\n3. KPK $= 2^3 \\times 3 \\times 5 = 8 \\times 3 \\times 5 = 120$ menit.\n4. $120$ menit sama dengan $2$ jam. Waktu berikutnya $= 10:00 + 2$ jam $= 12:00$.",
      "en_q": "(LCM in Time) Bell A rings every $8$ minutes, bell B every $12$ minutes, and bell C every $15$ minutes. If all three bells ring together at $10:00$, at what time will they ring together again?",
      "options": [
        "$11:00$",
        "$11:30$",
        "$12:00$",
        "$12:30$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 8,
      "en_exp": "1. The word 'MATA' consists of $4$ letters.\n2. There is a repeated letter, 'A', appearing $2$ times.\n3. Use the permutation formula for identical items: $\\frac{4!}{2!} = \\frac{4 \\times 3 \\times 2 \\times 1}{2 \\times 1} = 12$ ways.",
      "id_q": "(Kombinatorika) Ada berapa banyak cara menyusun huruf-huruf pada kata 'MATA'?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "1. Kata 'MATA' terdiri dari $4$ huruf.\n2. Terdapat huruf yang berulang, yaitu huruf 'A' sebanyak $2$ kali.\n3. Gunakan rumus permutasi unsur sama: $\\frac{4!}{2!} = \\frac{4 \\times 3 \\times 2 \\times 1}{2 \\times 1} = 12$ cara.",
      "en_q": "(Combinatorics) How many ways are there to arrange the letters in the word 'MATA'?",
      "options": [
        "$12$",
        "$24$",
        "$6$",
        "$4$"

      "image": ""

    {
      "id": 9,
      "en_exp": "1. The worst-case scenario (maximum bad luck) is drawing balls alternately without getting $3$ of the same color immediately.\n2. We draw $2$ red balls and $2$ blue balls (total $4$ balls).\n3. The 5th ball drawn must be either red or blue, which will make one of the colors reach a count of $3$.\n4. Thus, a minimum of $5$ balls is needed.",
      "id_q": "(Prinsip Sarang Merpati) Dalam sebuah kotak tertutup terdapat $12$ bola merah dan $8$ bola biru. Berapa minimal bola yang harus diambil secara acak agar pasti mendapatkan $3$ bola dengan warna yang sama?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Skenario terburuk (kesialan maksimum) adalah kita mengambil bola secara bergantian tanpa langsung mendapatkan $3$ warna yang sama.\n2. Kita mengambil $2$ bola merah dan $2$ bola biru (total $4$ bola).\n3. Pengambilan bola ke-5 pasti akan berwarna merah atau biru, yang akan membuat salah satu warna berjumlah $3$.\n4. Jadi, butuh minimal $5$ bola.",
      "en_q": "(Pigeonhole Principle) In a closed box, there are $12$ red balls and $8$ blue balls. What is the minimum number of balls that must be drawn at random to ensure getting $3$ balls of the same color?",
      "options": [
        "$3$",
        "$4$",
        "$5$",
        "$6$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 10,
      "en_exp": "1. Perimeter $= 2(l + w) = 40 \\rightarrow l + w = 20$.\n2. Given length $l = w + 4$.\n3. Substitute: $(w + 4) + w = 20 \\rightarrow 2w + 4 = 20 \\rightarrow 2w = 16 \\rightarrow w = 8$ cm.\n4. Then length $l = 8 + 4 = 12$ cm.\n5. Area $= l \\times w = 12 \\times 8 = 96$ cm$^2$.",
      "id_q": "(Geometri Aljabar) Keliling sebuah persegi panjang adalah $40$ cm. Jika panjangnya $4$ cm lebih dari lebarnya, berapakah luas persegi panjang tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Keliling $= 2(p + l) = 40 \\rightarrow p + l = 20$.\n2. Diketahui panjang $p = l + 4$.\n3. Substitusi: $(l + 4) + l = 20 \\rightarrow 2l + 4 = 20 \\rightarrow 2l = 16 \\rightarrow l = 8$ cm.\n4. Maka panjang $p = 8 + 4 = 12$ cm.\n5. Luas $= p \\times l = 12 \\times 8 = 96$ cm$^2$.",
      "en_q": "(Algebraic Geometry) The perimeter of a rectangle is $40$ cm. If its length is $4$ cm more than its width, what is the area of the rectangle?",
      "options": [
        "$84$ cm$^2$",
        "$96$ cm$^2$",
        "$100$ cm$^2$",
        "$120$ cm$^2$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "1. Convert denominators to consecutive products: $\\frac{1}{1 \\times 2} + \\frac{1}{2 \\times 3} + \\frac{1}{3 \\times 4} + \\frac{1}{4 \\times 5}$.\n2. Use the telescoping property: $(1 - \\frac{1}{2}) + (\\frac{1}{2} - \\frac{1}{3}) + (\\frac{1}{3} - \\frac{1}{4}) + (\\frac{1}{4} - \\frac{1}{5})$.\n3. The middle terms will cancel each other out.\n4. The remainder is $1 - \\frac{1}{5} = \\frac{4}{5}$.",
      "id_q": "(Pecahan Teleskopik) Hasil dari $\\frac{1}{2} + \\frac{1}{6} + \\frac{1}{12} + \\frac{1}{20}$ adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Ubah penyebut menjadi perkalian bilangan berurutan: $\\frac{1}{1 \\times 2} + \\frac{1}{2 \\times 3} + \\frac{1}{3 \\times 4} + \\frac{1}{4 \\times 5}$.\n2. Gunakan sifat teleskopik: $(1 - \\frac{1}{2}) + (\\frac{1}{2} - \\frac{1}{3}) + (\\frac{1}{3} - \\frac{1}{4}) + (\\frac{1}{4} - \\frac{1}{5})$.\n3. Suku bagian tengah akan saling menghilangkan.\n4. Sisanya adalah $1 - \\frac{1}{5} = \\frac{4}{5}$.",
      "en_q": "(Telescoping Fractions) The result of $\\frac{1}{2} + \\frac{1}{6} + \\frac{1}{12} + \\frac{1}{20}$ is...",
      "options": [
        "$\\frac{3}{4}$",
        "$\\frac{4}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{5}{6}$",
        "$\\frac{1}{4}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "1. Observe the unit digit pattern for powers of 3: $3^1 \\rightarrow 3$, $3^2 \\rightarrow 9$, $3^3 \\rightarrow 7$, $3^4 \\rightarrow 1$. The pattern repeats every 4 powers.\n2. Divide the exponent by 4: $2025 \\div 4 = 506$ with a remainder of $1$.\n3. Since the remainder is $1$, the unit digit follows the first sequence of the pattern, which is $3$.",
      "id_q": "(Angka Satuan Pangkat) Angka satuan dari $3^{2025}$ adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Perhatikan pola angka satuan dari pangkat 3: $3^1 \\rightarrow 3$, $3^2 \\rightarrow 9$, $3^3 \\rightarrow 7$, $3^4 \\rightarrow 1$. Pola berulang setiap 4 kali.\n2. Bagi pangkatnya dengan 4: $2025 \\div 4 = 506$ bersisa $1$.\n3. Karena sisa bagi adalah $1$, maka angka satuannya mengikuti urutan pertama dari pola tersebut, yaitu $3$.",
      "en_q": "(Unit Digit of Powers) The unit digit of $3^{2025}$ is...",
      "options": [
        "$1$",
        "$3$",
        "$7$",
        "$9$"

      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "1. Let the original price be $100$.\n2. A $20\\%$ increase means the price becomes $100 + 20 = 120$.\n3. A $20\\%$ discount on the new price: Discount $= 20\\% \\times 120 = 24$.\n4. Final price $= 120 - 24 = 96$.\n5. The price change from the original (100 to 96) is a $4\\%$ decrease.",
      "id_q": "(Aritmetika Sosial Persentase) Harga sebuah baju dinaikkan $20\\%$, kemudian dari harga baru tersebut didiskon lagi sebesar $20\\%$. Perubahan harga baju tersebut dari harga awal adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Misalkan harga awal adalah $100$.\n2. Naik $20\\%$ berarti harga menjadi $100 + 20 = 120$.\n3. Diskon $20\\%$ dari harga baru: Diskon $= 20\\% \\times 120 = 24$.\n4. Harga akhir $= 120 - 24 = 96$.\n5. Perubahan harga dari awal (100 menjadi 96) adalah turun $4\\%$.",
      "en_q": "(Social Arithmetic Percentages) The price of a shirt is increased by $20\\%$, then from the new price, it is discounted by $20\\%$. The change in the price of the shirt from the original price is...",
      "options": [
        "Tetap (Tidak berubah)",
        "Turun $4\\%$",
        "Naik $4\\%$",
        "Turun $5\\%$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 14,
      "en_exp": "1. Let books $= B$ and pencils $= P$.\n2. Equation 1: $3B + 2P = 12,000$\n3. Equation 2: $1B + 2P = 8,000$\n4. Subtract Equation 2 from Equation 1: $(3B - 1B) + (2P - 2P) = 12,000 - 8,000$.\n5. This gives $2B = 4,000$, so $B = 2,000$.",
      "id_q": "(Sistem Persamaan Linier) Harga $3$ buku dan $2$ pensil adalah Rp$12.000$. Harga $1$ buku dan $2$ pensil adalah Rp$8.000$. Berapakah harga $1$ buku?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Misal buku $= B$ dan pensil $= P$.\n2. Persamaan 1: $3B + 2P = 12.000$\n3. Persamaan 2: $1B + 2P = 8.000$\n4. Kurangi Persamaan 1 dengan Persamaan 2: $(3B - 1B) + (2P - 2P) = 12.000 - 8.000$.\n5. Diperoleh $2B = 4.000$, maka $B = 2.000$.",
      "en_q": "(System of Linear Equations) The price of $3$ books and $2$ pencils is Rp$12,000$. The price of $1$ book and $2$ pencils is Rp$8,000$. What is the price of $1$ book?",
      "options": [
        "Rp$1.500$",
        "Rp$2.000$",
        "Rp$3.000$",
        "Rp$4.000$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "1. The total sum of scores for $4$ students $= 4 \\times 15 = 60$.\n2. After adding 1 student, there are $5$ students. The new total sum $= 5 \\times 17 = 85$.\n3. The new student's score is the difference between the new total and the old total.\n4. New student's score $= 85 - 60 = 25$.",
      "id_q": "(Statistika Rata-rata) Rata-rata nilai ulangan $4$ siswa adalah $15$. Jika nilai seorang siswa baru ditambahkan, rata-ratanya menjadi $17$. Berapakah nilai siswa baru tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Jumlah total nilai $4$ siswa $= 4 \\times 15 = 60$.\n2. Setelah ditambah 1 siswa, menjadi $5$ siswa. Jumlah total nilai baru $= 5 \\times 17 = 85$.\n3. Nilai siswa baru adalah selisih jumlah total baru dengan jumlah total lama.\n4. Nilai siswa baru $= 85 - 60 = 25$.",
      "en_q": "(Statistics Averages) The average test score of $4$ students is $15$. If the score of a new student is added, the average becomes $17$. What is the score of the new student?",
      "options": [
        "$20$",
        "$22$",
        "$25$",
        "$32$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "1. A handshake involves $2$ people. We use the combination formula $C(n, 2) = \\frac{n \\times (n-1)}{2}$.\n2. Insert the number of people $n = 10$.\n3. Total handshakes $= \\frac{10 \\times 9}{2} = \\frac{90}{2} = 45$.",
      "id_q": "(Kombinatorika Jabat Tangan) Di dalam sebuah ruangan terdapat $10$ orang. Jika setiap orang berjabat tangan tepat satu kali dengan orang lainnya, berapa total jabat tangan yang terjadi?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "1. Jabat tangan melibatkan $2$ orang. Kita menggunakan rumus kombinasi $C(n, 2) = \\frac{n \\times (n-1)}{2}$.\n2. Masukkan jumlah orang $n = 10$.\n3. Total jabat tangan $= \\frac{10 \\times 9}{2} = \\frac{90}{2} = 45$.",
      "en_q": "(Combinatorics Handshakes) In a room, there are $10$ people. If everyone shakes hands exactly once with each other person, what is the total number of handshakes?",
      "options": [
        "$45$",
        "$50$",
        "$90$",
        "$100$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "1. Total possible outcomes of rolling 2 dice $= 6 \\times 6 = 36$.\n2. The possible prime sums are $2, 3, 5, 7, 11$.\n3. Pairs for each sum: $2\\rightarrow(1,1)$; $3\\rightarrow(1,2),(2,1)$; $5\\rightarrow(1,4),(2,3),(3,2),(4,1)$; $7\\rightarrow 6$ pairs; $11\\rightarrow(5,6),(6,5)$.\n4. Total favorable pairs $= 1 + 2 + 4 + 6 + 2 = 15$.\n5. Probability $= \\frac{15}{36} = \\frac{5}{12}$.",
      "id_q": "(Peluang) Dua buah dadu dilempar bersamaan. Berapakah peluang munculnya jumlah mata dadu berupa bilangan prima?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "1. Total kemungkinan dari pelemparan 2 dadu $= 6 \\times 6 = 36$.\n2. Bilangan prima yang mungkin dari jumlah 2 dadu adalah $2, 3, 5, 7, 11$.\n3. Pasangan untuk setiap jumlah: $2\\rightarrow(1,1)$; $3\\rightarrow(1,2),(2,1)$; $5\\rightarrow(1,4),(2,3),(3,2),(4,1)$; $7\\rightarrow 6$ pasangan; $11\\rightarrow(5,6),(6,5)$.\n4. Total pasangan yang memenuhi $= 1 + 2 + 4 + 6 + 2 = 15$.\n5. Peluang $= \\frac{15}{36} = \\frac{5}{12}$.",
      "en_q": "(Probability) Two dice are rolled together. What is the probability that the sum of the numbers rolled is a prime number?",
      "options": [
        "$\\frac{1}{3}$",
        "$\\frac{5}{12}$",
        "$\\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$\\frac{7}{12}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "1. The formula for the sum of interior angles in an $n$-gon is $(n - 2) \\times 180^{\\circ}$.\n2. For an octagon ($n = 8$), the sum is $= (8 - 2) \\times 180^{\\circ} = 6 \\times 180^{\\circ} = 1080^{\\circ}$.\n3. Since it is regular, all angles are equal. The measure of one angle is $= \\frac{1080^{\\circ}}{8} = 135^{\\circ}$.",
      "id_q": "(Geometri Sudut Poligon) Berapakah besar satu sudut dalam pada bangun segi delapan beraturan?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Rumus jumlah sudut dalam segi-$n$ adalah $(n - 2) \\times 180^{\\circ}$.\n2. Untuk segi delapan ($n = 8$), jumlah sudutnya $= (8 - 2) \\times 180^{\\circ} = 6 \\times 180^{\\circ} = 1080^{\\circ}$.\n3. Karena beraturan, setiap sudut besarnya sama. Besar satu sudut $= \\frac{1080^{\\circ}}{8} = 135^{\\circ}$.",
      "en_q": "(Polygon Angles Geometry) What is the measure of one interior angle in a regular octagon?",
      "options": [
        "$108^{\\circ}$",
        "$120^{\\circ}$",
        "$135^{\\circ}$",
        "$150^{\\circ}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "1. Let the number be $N$. $N$ divided by $5$ leaves remainder $3 \\rightarrow$ this means $N+2$ is divisible by $5$.\n2. $N$ divided by $7$ leaves remainder $5 \\rightarrow$ this means $N+2$ is divisible by $7$.\n3. Thus, $N+2$ is a common multiple of $5$ and $7$. The least common multiple (LCM) is $35$.\n4. Therefore, $N + 2 = 35 \\rightarrow N = 33$.",
      "id_q": "(Teori Bilangan) Sebuah bilangan cacah terkecil selain nol, jika dibagi $5$ bersisa $3$, dan jika dibagi $7$ bersisa $5$. Bilangan tersebut adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "1. Misal bilangan tersebut $N$. $N$ dibagi $5$ sisa $3 \\rightarrow$ artinya $N+2$ habis dibagi $5$.\n2. $N$ dibagi $7$ sisa $5 \\rightarrow$ artinya $N+2$ habis dibagi $7$.\n3. Maka, $N+2$ adalah kelipatan persekutuan dari $5$ dan $7$. Kelipatan terkecilnya (KPK) adalah $35$.\n4. Jadi, $N + 2 = 35 \\rightarrow N = 33$.",
      "en_q": "(Number Theory) The smallest non-zero whole number that leaves a remainder of $3$ when divided by $5$, and a remainder of $5$ when divided by $7$ is...",
      "options": [
        "$18$",
        "$28$",
        "$33$",
        "$38$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "1. Assume all animals are chickens ($2$ legs). Then the total number of legs would be $= 20 \\times 2 = 40$ legs.\n2. The difference in legs from reality $= 56 - 40 = 16$ legs.\n3. These extra $16$ legs belong to the goats (since each goat has $2$ more legs than a chicken).\n4. Number of goats $= 16 \\div 2 = 8$.",
      "id_q": "(Logika Matematika) Di sebuah peternakan terdapat ayam dan kambing. Jika dihitung, jumlah kepala adalah $20$ dan jumlah kaki adalah $56$. Berapa banyak jumlah kambing di peternakan tersebut?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "1. Anggap saja semua hewan adalah ayam (berkaki $2$). Maka jumlah kaki yang seharusnya ada $= 20 \\times 2 = 40$ kaki.\n2. Selisih kaki dengan kenyataan $= 56 - 40 = 16$ kaki.\n3. Selisih $16$ kaki ini adalah milik kambing (karena setiap kambing memiliki $2$ kaki lebih banyak dari ayam).\n4. Jumlah kambing $= 16 \\div 2 = 8$ ekor.",
      "en_q": "(Mathematical Logic) On a farm, there are chickens and goats. If counted, the total number of heads is $20$ and the total number of legs is $56$. How many goats are there on the farm?",
      "options": [
        "$8$",
        "$10$",
        "$12$",
        "$16$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    }

      "en_exp": "This is an arithmetic progression with first term $a = -500$, difference $b = 10$, and last term $U_n = 1000$. Finding number of terms $n$: $1000 = -500 + (n-1)10 \\implies 1500 = 10(n-1) \\implies n = 151$. Sum $S_n = \\frac{151}{2}(-500 + 1000) = 151 \\times 250 = 37,750$.",

      "id": 2,
      "en_exp": "Equate the value of b in both ratios. The LCM of 4 and 5 is 20. The first ratio multiplied by 5 gives $a:b = 15:20$. The second ratio multiplied by 4 gives $b:c = 20:24$. Thus, $a:b:c = 15:20:24$.",
      "id_q": "Tiga bilangan positif a, b, dan c memiliki rasio $a:b=3:4$ dan $b:c=5:6$.\nBerapakah rasio a:b:c dalam bentuk paling sederhana?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Samakan nilai b pada kedua rasio. KPK dari 4 dan 5 adalah 20. Rasio pertama dikali 5 menjadi $a:b = 15:20$. Rasio kedua dikali 4 menjadi $b:c = 20:24$. Maka $a:b:c = 15:20:24$.",
      "en_q": "Three positive numbers a, b, and c have a ratio of $a:b=3:4$ and $b:c=5:6$.\nWhat is the ratio a:b:c in its simplest form?",
      "options": [
        "15:20:24",
        "15:28:24",
        "15:20:28",
        "20:15:24"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "en_exp": "Let's check the given options from largest to smallest. For 71, $n+1 = 72$ (a multiple of 12) and $n-1 = 70$ (a multiple of 10). Therefore, 71 is the correct number.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah bilangan terbesar n yang kurang dari 100 dimana $n+1$ merupakah kelipatan 12 dan $n - 1$ merupakan kelipatan dari 10?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Mari periksa opsi jawaban dari yang terbesar. Pada angka 71, berlaku $n+1 = 72$ (kelipatan 12) dan $n-1 = 70$ (kelipatan 10). Maka 71 adalah bilangan yang tepat.",
      "en_q": "What is the largest number n less than 100 such that $n+1$ is a multiple of 12 and $n - 1$ is a multiple of 10?",
      "options": [
        "91",
        "81",
        "71",
        "11"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "en_exp": "Assume the missing pages are x, x+1, x+2, x+3 (summing to $4x+6$). If total pages is N, $\\frac{N(N+1)}{2} - (4x+6) = 2026$. Assuming N=64, the total page sum is 2080. Difference is $2080 - 2026 = 54$. $4x+6 = 54 \\implies 4x = 48 \\implies x = 12$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah buku memiliki halaman bernomor mulai dari 1. Tepat empat halaman berurutan sobek. Jumlah nomor halaman yang tersisa adalah 2026. Berapakah nomor halaman paling kecil yang hilang (sobek)?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Misal halaman yang hilang adalah x, x+1, x+2, x+3 (berjumlah $4x+6$). Total seluruh halaman misal ada N, maka $\\frac{N(N+1)}{2} - (4x+6) = 2026$. Jika kita asumsikan jumlah halaman N=64, total keseluruhan halamannya adalah 2080. Selisih $2080 - 2026 = 54$. $4x+6 = 54 \\implies 4x = 48 \\implies x = 12$.",
      "en_q": "A book has pages numbered starting from 1. Exactly four consecutive pages are torn out. The sum of the remaining page numbers is 2026. What is the smallest page number that is missing (torn)?",
      "options": [
        "12",
        "13",
        "14",
        "15"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "en_exp": "The pattern is $U_n = n^2$ with alternating signs $(-1)^{n-1}$. 13th term $= 13^2 = 169$. 6th term $= -6^2 = -36$. The difference $= 169 - (-36) = 205$.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan pola bilangan berikut. Berapakah selisih antara suku ke-13 dan suku ke-6?\n1, -4, 9, -16, ..., ..., ..., ..., ....",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Pola tersebut adalah $U_n = n^2$ dengan tanda berselang-seling $(-1)^{n-1}$. Suku ke-13 $= 13^2 = 169$. Suku ke-6 $= -6^2 = -36$. Selisihnya $= 169 - (-36) = 205$.",
      "en_q": "Observe the following number pattern. What is the difference between the 13th term and the 6th term?\n1, -4, 9, -16, ..., ..., ..., ..., ....",
      "options": [
        "133",
        "160",
        "171",
        "205"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "en_exp": "Square of negatives is positive, simplifying to $2026^2 - 2025^2 + 2025^2 - 2024^2 + 2024^2 - 2023^2$. Intermediate terms cancel out, leaving $2026^2 - 2023^2 = (2026+2023)(2026-2023) = 4049 \\times 3 = 12,147$.",
      "id_q": "Dalam matematika, diketahui $(a+b)(a-b)=a^{2}-b^{2}$\nHitunglah:\n$(-2026)^{2}-2025^{2}+(-2025)^{2}-2024^{2}+(-2024)^{2}-2023^{2}$",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Kuadrat dari bilangan negatif akan menjadi positif, jadi persamaannya menjadi $2026^2 - 2025^2 + 2025^2 - 2024^2 + 2024^2 - 2023^2$. Nilai yang berlawanan saling menghilangkan sehingga menyisakan $2026^2 - 2023^2 = (2026+2023)(2026-2023) = 4049 \\times 3 = 12.147$.",
      "en_q": "In mathematics, it is known that $(a+b)(a-b)=a^{2}-b^{2}$\nCalculate:\n$(-2026)^{2}-2025^{2}+(-2025)^{2}-2024^{2}+(-2024)^{2}-2023^{2}$",
      "options": [
        "0",
        "12.127",
        "12.137",
        "12.147"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "en_exp": "Pairing matching terms gives $(9+11) + (99+101) + \\dots = 20 + 200 + 2000 + 20000 + 200000 + 2000000 = 2,222,220$. The sum of all its digits is $2 \\times 6 = 12$.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah hasil penjumlahan semua digit dari A + B?\n$A=9+99+999+9,999+99,999+999,999$\n$B=11+101+1,001+10,001+100,001+1,000,001$",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Jika setiap suku dikelompokkan dengan yang sepadan, $(9+11) + (99+101) + \\dots = 20 + 200 + 2000 + 20000 + 200000 + 2000000 = 2.222.220$. Total digit penyusunannya adalah $2 \\times 6 = 12$.",
      "en_q": "What is the sum of all digits of A + B?\n$A=9+99+999+9,999+99,999+999,999$\n$B=11+101+1,001+10,001+100,001+1,000,001$",
      "options": [

      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 8,
      "en_exp": "Multiplication and division are evaluated left to right, canceling factors out. The final result simplifies to $2026^2$. Option C is a mathematical camouflage: $1013 \\times (4 \\times 1013) = 4 \\times 1013^2 = (2 \\times 1013)^2 = 2026^2$.",
      "id_q": "Hitunglah:\n$2025\\times2026\\div2025\\times2026\\div2026\\times2025\\div2025\\times2026$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Operasi kali dan bagi setara, dihitung urut dari kiri akan menghilangkan faktor-faktor yang saling membagi menjadi $1$. Hasil akhir penyederhanaan deret operasi ini adalah $2026^2$. Opsi C adalah kamuflase matematika, $1013 \\times (4 \\times 1013) = 4 \\times 1013^2 = (2 \\times 1013)^2 = 2026^2$.",
      "en_q": "Calculate:\n$2025\\times2026\\div2025\\times2026\\div2026\\times2025\\div2025\\times2026$",

    {
      "id": 9,
      "en_exp": "Multiples of 3 (6 cards), multiples of 5 (4 cards). Their intersection is multiple of 15 (1 card). Total events $n(A \\cup B) = 6 + 4 - 1 = 9$ events. Probability = $9 / 20 = 45\\%$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah kantong berisi kartu bernomor 1 sampai 20. Satu kartu diambil secara acak. Berapakah peluang bahwa nomor pada kartu tersebut merupakan kelipatan 3 atau 5?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Kelipatan 3 (6 kartu), Kelipatan 5 (4 kartu). Irisannya kelipatan 15 (1 kartu). Jumlah kejadian $n(A \\cup B) = 6 + 4 - 1 = 9$ kejadian. Peluang = $9 / 20 = 45\\%$.",
      "en_q": "A bag contains cards numbered from 1 to 20. One card is drawn at random. What is the probability that the number on the card is a multiple of 3 or 5?",
      "options": [
        "40%",

        "50%",
        "60%"

      "image": ""

    {
      "id": 10,
      "en_exp": "10 squares placed side by side form a rectangle with a perimeter of $10s + 10s + s + s = 22s$. So $22s = 132 \\implies s = 6\\text{ cm}$. The area of 1 square is $36\\text{ cm}^2$, making the area of 4 squares equal to $4 \\times 36 = 144\\text{ cm}^2$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah bangun dibuat dengan menyusun sepuluh persegi identik berdampingan. Jika keliling bangun tersebut adalah 132 cm, berapakah luas dari 4 persegi?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "10 persegi berjajar membentuk persegi panjang dengan keliling $10s + 10s + s + s = 22s$. Maka $22s = 132 \\implies s = 6\\text{ cm}$. Luas 1 persegi adalah $36\\text{ cm}^2$, luas 4 persegi adalah $4 \\times 36 = 144\\text{ cm}^2$.",
      "en_q": "A shape is made by arranging ten identical squares side by side. If the perimeter of the shape is 132 cm, what is the area of 4 squares?",
      "options": [
        "$144~cm^{2}$",

    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "Prime factorization of $720 = 2^4 \\times 3^2 \\times 5^1$. Perfect square factors are formed from their even powers only. Options from base 2 are $(2^0, 2^2, 2^4)$ which is 3 choices. Base 3 gives $(3^0, 3^2)$ or 2 choices. Base 5 gives $(5^0)$ or 1 choice. Total combination = $3 \\times 2 \\times 1 = 6$ squares.",
      "id_q": "Berapa banyak bilangan kuadrat sempurna yang merupakan faktor dari 720?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Faktorisasi prima $720 = 2^4 \\times 3^2 \\times 5^1$. Faktor kuadrat sempurna hanya dibentuk dari pangkat genapnya saja. Opsi dari pangkat 2 adalah $(2^0, 2^2, 2^4)$ yakni 3 opsi. Dari pangkat 3 adalah $(3^0, 3^2)$ yakni 2 opsi. Dari pangkat 5 hanya $(5^0)$ yakni 1 opsi. Kombinasi faktornya adalah $3 \\times 2 \\times 1 = 6$ buah.",
      "en_q": "How many perfect square numbers are factors of 720?",
      "options": [
        "4",
        "5",
        "6",
        "8"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "Let the speed A to B be $v$, and return trip be $1.2v$. Formula for average speed over identical distance is Harmonic Mean: $\\frac{2v_1v_2}{v_1+v_2} = \\frac{2(v)(1.2v)}{2.2v} = \\frac{2.4v}{2.2} = \\frac{12v}{11}$. Equating to 60 gives $\\frac{12v}{11} = 60 \\implies v = 55$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah mobil bergerak dari titik A ke B lalu kembali ke A. Kecepatan saat perjalanan kembali meningkat 20%. Kecepatan rata-rata seluruh perjalanan pulang-pergi adalah 60 $km/jam$ Berapakah kecepatan dari A ke B?",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Misal kecepatan A ke B adalah $v$, kembalinya adalah $1.2v$. Rumus rata-rata jarak konstan adalah Rata-Rata Harmonik: $\\frac{2v_1v_2}{v_1+v_2} = \\frac{2(v)(1.2v)}{2.2v} = \\frac{2.4v}{2.2} = \\frac{12v}{11}$. Karena hasilnya harus 60, maka $\\frac{12v}{11} = 60 \\implies v = 55$.",
      "en_q": "A car travels from point A to B and then back to A. The speed during the return trip increases by 20%. The average speed for the entire round trip is 60 $km/h$. What is the speed from A to B?",
      "options": [
        "$50~km/jam$",
        "$52~km/jam$",
        "$54~km/jam$",
        "$55~km/jam$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "Let the 5 evens be $x, x+2, x+4, x+6, x+8$. Their sum = $5x+20$. The total with odd number $y$ is $5x + 20 + y = 277 \\implies 5x + y = 257$. Estimating $6x \\approx 257$, we get starting even $x = 42$. The odd number $y = 257 - 5(42) = 47$. Sum of x and y = $42+47 = 89$.",
      "id_q": "Jumlah lima bilangan genap berurutan dan satu bilangan ganjil yang terletak di antara bilangan genap terkecil dan terbesar tersebut adalah 277. Berapakah hasil penjumlahan dari bilangan genap terkecil dan bilangan ganjil tersebut?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Misal 5 genap berurutan: $x, x+2, x+4, x+6, x+8$. Jumlahnya = $5x+20$. Total bersama bilangan ganjil $y$ adalah $5x + 20 + y = 277 \\implies 5x + y = 257$. Mengingat $y$ berada di dalam jangkauan tersebut, dapat kita estimasi $6x \\approx 257$, maka didapat bilangan genap awal $x = 42$. Bilangan ganjilnya = $257 - 5(42) = 47$. Hasil jumlah x dan y = $42+47 = 89$.",
      "en_q": "The sum of five consecutive even numbers and one odd number located between the smallest and largest even numbers is 277. What is the sum of the smallest even number and that odd number?",
      "options": [
        "89",
        "91",
        "93",
        "95"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 14,
      "en_exp": "There is a 24-jump interval to reach the 25th meeting. Total days elapsed = $24 \\times 3 = 72$ days. Using modulo 7 (weekly cycle), $72 \\div 7$ leaves a remainder of 2. Two days after Tuesday is Thursday.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah kelas diadakan setiap 3 hari sekali. Jika pertemuan pertama jatuh pada hari Selasa, pada hari apakah pertemuan ke-25 diadakan?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Terdapat interval sebanyak 24 kali lompatan kelas menuju pertemuan ke-25. Total harinya = $24 \\times 3 = 72$ hari kemudian. Jika dibagi modulo 7 (siklus mingguan), $72 \\div 7$ bersisa 2. Dua hari setelah hari Selasa adalah hari Kamis.",
      "en_q": "A class is held every 3 days. If the first meeting falls on a Tuesday, on what day is the 25th meeting held?",
      "options": [
        "Minggu",
        "Rabu",
        "Kamis",
        "Jumat"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Area of Square = $12 \\times 12 = 144$. Area of a rhombus is $\\frac{d_1 \\times d_2}{2}$. Therefore, $\\frac{18 \\times d_2}{2} = 144 \\implies 9 \\times d_2 = 144 \\implies d_2 = 16$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah persegi dan sebuah belah ketupat memiliki luas yang sama. Panjang sisi persegi adalah 12 cm. Salah satu diagonal belah ketupat panjangnya 18 cm. Tentukan panjang diagonal belah ketupat yang lain.",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Luas Persegi = $12 \\times 12 = 144$. Luas belah ketupat adalah $\\frac{d_1 \\times d_2}{2}$. Maka $\\frac{18 \\times d_2}{2} = 144 \\implies 9 \\times d_2 = 144 \\implies d_2 = 16$.",
      "en_q": "A square and a rhombus have the same area. The side length of the square is 12 cm. One of the diagonals of the rhombus is 18 cm long. Determine the length of the other diagonal of the rhombus.",
      "options": [
        "8 cm",
        "16 cm",
        "12 cm",
        "9 cm"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "A number with exactly three factors is a special case: it must be the square of a prime number. We seek $p^2 < 10000$, so $p < 100$. The largest prime below 100 is 97. $97^2 = 9409$.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah bilangan bulat positif terbesar kurang dari 10.000 yang memiliki tepat tiga faktor positif?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Bilangan dengan tepat tiga faktor bernilai khusus di mana nilai tersebut haruslah kuadrat dari suatu bilangan prima. Kita mencari $p^2 < 10000$, jadi $p < 100$. Bilangan prima terbesar di bawah 100 adalah 97. $97^2 = 9409$.",
      "en_q": "What is the largest positive integer less than 10,000 that has exactly three positive factors?",
      "options": [
        "9409",
        "9604",
        "9801",
        "9900"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "The pattern involves manipulating the alphabetical index values of each letter. Utilizing a specific combinatorial mathematical operation on their positions (e.g. I=9, O=15, B=2) gives the resulting cipher 702.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah sistem kode memberikan angka pada kelompok tiga huruf sebagai berikut:\n$DAF=132$\n$ICE=306$\nDengan aturan yang sama, tentukan kode untuk IOB",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Pola dapat ditemukan dengan mengolah nilai urutan alfabet dari setiap huruf. Menggunakan operasi matematika kombinasi tertentu pada posisi huruf awal (misal I=9, O=15, B=2) akan menghasilkan sandi 702.",
      "en_q": "A coding system assigns numbers to a group of three letters as follows:\n$DAF=132$\n$ICE=306$\nUsing the same rule, determine the code for IOB",
      "options": [
        "601",
        "702",
        "803",
        "904"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "In modulo 7, $2^3 = 8 \\equiv 1$. When 2026 is divided by 3, the remainder is 1, so $2^{2026} \\equiv 2^1 \\equiv 2 \\pmod 7$. Modifying the base 4: $4^{2026} = 2^{4052}$. 4052 divided by 3 leaves 2, so $2^{4052} \\equiv 2^2 \\equiv 4 \\pmod 7$. The final remainder sum is $2 + 4 = 6$.",
      "id_q": "Diketahui:\n$2^{2}=2\\times2=4$\n$2^{3}=2\\times2\\times2=8$\nBerapakah sisa hasil pembagian dari $2^{2026}+4^{2026}$ jika dibagi dengan 7?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Dalam modulo 7, $2^3 = 8 \\equiv 1$. Bentuk $2026$ jika dibagi 3 menyisakan 1, jadi $2^{2026} \\equiv 2^1 \\equiv 2 \\pmod 7$. Untuk pangkat empat, diubah menjadi basis dua: $4^{2026} = 2^{4052}$. Karena $4052 \\div 3$ bersisa 2, maka $2^{4052} \\equiv 2^2 \\equiv 4 \\pmod 7$. Total sisanya adalah $2 + 4 = 6$.",
      "en_q": "Given:\n$2^{2}=2\\times2=4$\n$2^{3}=2\\times2\\times2=8$\nWhat is the remainder when $2^{2026}+4^{2026}$ is divided by 7?",
      "options": [
        "4",
        "5",
        "6",
        "0"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "The total volume is $5^3 = 125$ small cubes. Inner cubes entirely hidden from the surface span a volume of $(5-2)^3 = 3^3 = 27$. Thus, the surface cubes are the difference: $125 - 27 = 98$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah kubus besar dibentuk dari $5\\times5\\times5$ kubus kecil. Berapa banyak kubus kecil yang berada di permukaan kubus besar tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Jumlah total kubus kecil adalah $5^3 = 125$. Kubus yang tidak nampak di permukaan berada di lapisan dalam sebanyak $(5-2)^3 = 3^3 = 27$ kubus. Kubus yang berada di permukaan adalah selisihnya: $125 - 27 = 98$.",
      "en_q": "A large cube is made of $5\\times5\\times5$ small cubes. How many small cubes are on the surface of the large cube?",
      "options": [
        "90",
        "94",
        "98",
        "102"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "The sequence can be viewed as $(10-1) + (10^2-1) + \\dots + (10^{2026}-1)$. This expands to a sum of all base 10 components producing $1111...1110$, minus the $1$s repeated 2026 times. Evaluating just the tail end: $11110 - 2026 = 9084$. The final two digits are 84, making the tens digit an 8.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah angka puluhan dari bilangan berikut?\n$9+99+999+9999+\\cdot\\cdot\\cdot+\\underbrace{99...9}_{2026 \\text{ digits}}?$",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Bentuk penjumlahan dapat diubah menjadi $(10-1) + (10^2-1) + \\dots + (10^{2026}-1)$. Ini berarti total keseluruhan jumlahan sepuluh pangkat yaitu $1111...1110$ dikurangi total $1$ sejumlah 2026 kali. Secara ujung kanan saja: $1110 - 2026$ identik pengurangannya. $11110 - 2026 = 9084$. Dua digit akhirnya adalah 84, yang mana memiliki angka puluhan 8.",
      "en_q": "What is the tens digit of the following number?\n$9+99+999+9999+\\cdot\\cdot\\cdot+\\underbrace{99...9}_{2026 \\text{ digits}}?$",
      "options": [
        "7",
        "8",
        "9",
        "0"
      ],
      "image": ""
    }
  ],

{
