    {
      "id": 28,
      "en_exp": "Volume of a cube $= s^3 = 32,768$. Edge length $s = \\sqrt[3]{32,768} = 32\\ cm$ (because $32 \\times 32 \\times 32 = 32,768$).",
      "id_q": "Sebuah bak air berbentuk kubus diisi air sampai penuh sehingga volume air dalam bak tersebut adalah $32.768\\ cm^3$. Panjang rusuk bak tersebut adalah....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume kubus $= s^3 = 32.768$. Panjang rusuk $s = \\sqrt[3]{32.768} = 32\\ cm$ (karena $32 \\times 32 \\times 32 = 32.768$).",
      "en_q": "A cube-shaped water tank is filled with water to the brim so that the volume of water in the tank is $32,768\\ cm^3$. The edge length of the tank is....",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "22 cm",
        "28 cm",
        "32 cm",
        "38 cm"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "22 cm",
        "28 cm",
        "32 cm",
        "38 cm"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Discount = $15\\% \\times 300,000 = 45,000$. Price to pay = $300,000 - 45,000 = Rp\\ 255,000.00$.",
      "id": 29,
      "id_q": "Citra Bersama dengan Ibunya pergi ke Toko Sepatu Berkah untuk membeli sepasang sepatu. Saat tiba di toko, Citra melihat ada sepatu yang sangat ia inginkan. Pada label harga tertera $Rp\\ 300.000,00$. Penjaga toko mengatakan bahwa hari itu toko sedang mengadakan diskon menjelang Ramadhan. Diskon yang diberikan sebesar $15\\%$. Berapa Citra dan Ibunya harus membayar sepatu tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Diskon = $15\\% \\times 300.000 = 45.000$. Harga yang harus dibayar = $300.000 - 45.000 = Rp\\ 255.000,00$.",
      "en_options": [
        "Rp 245,000.00",
        "Rp 250,000.00",
        "Rp 255,000.00",
        "Rp 260,000.00"
      ],
      "en_q": "Citra together with her mother went to Berkah Shoe Store to buy a pair of shoes. Upon arriving at the store, Citra saw shoes she really wanted. The price tag showed $Rp\\ 300,000.00$. The shopkeeper said that that day the store was having a pre-Ramadan discount. The discount given was $15\\%$. How much do Citra and her mother have to pay for the shoes?",
      "id_options": [
        "Rp 245.000,00",
        "Rp 250.000,00",
        "Rp 255.000,00",
        "Rp 260.000,00"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Female population = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1,440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1,440 = 840$ people.",
      "id": 30,
      "id_q": "Jumlah keseluruhan penduduk desa Sugih Waras adalah $1.440$ orang. Apabila perbandingan banyak penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan adalah $5 : 7$, maka hitunglah banyak penduduk perempuan yang ada di desa tersebut!",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Penduduk perempuan = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1.440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1.440 = 840$ jiwa.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The total population of Sugih Waras village is $1,440$ people. If the ratio of the number of male to female population is $5 : 7$, calculate the number of female population in the village!",
      "id_options": [
        "600 orang",
        "720 orang",
        "840 orang",
        "960 orang"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "600 people",
        "720 people",
        "840 people",
        "960 people"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 31,
      "en_exp": "Total harvest = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9.8$ tons.",
      "id_q": "Pak Joko memiliki tanah dengan luas $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hektar. Tanah tersebut ditanami kedelai. Jika setiap hektarnya mampu menghasilkan $\\frac{14}{5}$ ton kedelai, maka hitunglah berapa ton jumlah panen kedelai seluruhnya!",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total panen = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9,8$ ton atau $9 \\frac{4}{5}$ ton.",
      "en_q": "Mr. Joko has land with an area of $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hectares. The land is planted with soybeans. If each hectare can produce $\\frac{14}{5}$ tons of soybeans, calculate how many tons the total soybean harvest is!",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "8,8 ton",
        "9,8 ton",
        "10,8 ton",
        "12,8 ton"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "8.8 tons",
        "9.8 tons",
        "10.8 tons",
        "12.8 tons"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "The combined volume is the sum of the volume of the cube and the volume of the rectangular prism.\n1. Volume of the Cube = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume of the Prism = $l \\times w \\times h = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Combined Volume = $1,000 + 750 = 1,750\\ cm^3$.",
      "id": 32,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gabungan bangun ruang berikut ini!\nBangun tersebut terdiri dari kubus dengan panjang rusuk 10 cm dan balok yang menempel di sebelah kanannya dengan ukuran panjang 15 cm, lebar 10 cm, dan tinggi 5 cm. Berapakah volume gabungan bangun ruang tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume bangun gabungan tersebut adalah jumlah dari volume kubus dan volume balok.\n1. Volume Kubus = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume Balok = $p \\times l \\times t = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Volume Gabungan = $1.000 + 750 = 1.750\\ cm^3$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the following composite 3D shape!\nThe shape consists of a cube with an edge of 10 cm and a rectangular prism attached to its right side with a length of 15 cm, width of 10 cm, and height of 5 cm. What is the combined volume of the 3D shape?",
      "id_options": [
        "1.550 cm\u00b3",
        "1.650 cm\u00b3",
        "1.750 cm\u00b3",
        "1.850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "1,550 cm\u00b3",
        "1,650 cm\u00b3",
        "1,750 cm\u00b3",
        "1,850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .fill-shape { fill: #f9f9f9; stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <!-- Kubus -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,180 L 120,180 L 120,110 L 50,110 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,110 L 80,80 L 150,80 L 120,110 Z\"/>\n    <!-- Sisi kanan kubus tertutup balok, tapi garis ini penting -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,110 L 150,80 L 150,115 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Balok -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,180 L 220,180 L 220,145 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,145 L 150,115 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 220,180 L 250,150 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Label -->\n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"170\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">15 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"25\" y=\"150\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">5 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"105\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 33,
      "en_exp": "Based on the presented data, the scores and the number of students receiving them (frequency) are: Score 50 is 2 students, Score 60 is 3 students, Score 70 is 5 students, Score 80 is 4 students, Score 90 is 3 students, and Score 100 is 3 students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nBentuk tabel frekuensi yang benar dari data di atas adalah ....",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan data yang disajikan, urutan dan jumlah siswa yang mendapatkannya (frekuensi) adalah: Nilai 50 ada 2 siswa, Nilai 60 ada 3 siswa, Nilai 70 ada 5 siswa, Nilai 80 ada 4 siswa, Nilai 90 ada 3 siswa, dan Nilai 100 ada 3 siswa.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The following is the math score data of 20 6th-grade students of SD Muara Tanjung:\nThe correct frequency table form of the data above is ....",
      "id_options": [
        "<svg width=\"200\" height=\"190\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><style>.th { font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; } .td { font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; } .b { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; } .bg { fill: #e0e0e0; }</style><g transform=\"translate(10, 10)\"><rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b bg\"/><text x=\"40\" y=\"17\" class=\"th\">Nilai</text><rect x=\"80\" y=\"0\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b bg\"/><text x=\"120\" y=\"17\" class=\"th\">Frekuensi</text><rect x=\"0\" y=\"25\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"40\" y=\"42\" class=\"td\">50</text><rect x=\"80\" y=\"25\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"120\" y=\"42\" class=\"td\">3</text><rect x=\"0\" y=\"50\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"40\" y=\"67\" class=\"td\">60</text><rect x=\"80\" y=\"50\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"120\" y=\"67\" class=\"td\">2</text><rect x=\"0\" y=\"75\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"40\" y=\"92\" class=\"td\">70</text><rect x=\"80\" y=\"75\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"120\" y=\"92\" class=\"td\">5</text><rect x=\"0\" y=\"100\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"40\" y=\"117\" class=\"td\">80</text><rect x=\"80\" y=\"100\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"120\" y=\"117\" class=\"td\">4</text><rect x=\"0\" y=\"125\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"40\" y=\"142\" class=\"td\">90</text><rect x=\"80\" y=\"125\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"120\" y=\"142\" class=\"td\">3</text><rect x=\"0\" y=\"150\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"40\" y=\"167\" class=\"td\">100</text><rect x=\"80\" y=\"150\" width=\"80\" height=\"25\" class=\"b\"/><text x=\"120\" y=\"167\" class=\"td\">3</text></g></svg>",

      "id_exp": "KPK dari $4$ dan $5$ adalah $20$. Mereka akan bertemu lagi $20$ hari setelah tanggal $2$ Mei, yaitu tanggal $2 + 20 = 22$ Mei.",

      "en_exp": "Ratio difference = $8 - 3 = 5$. Talita's money = $\\frac{8}{5} \\times 25,000 = 40,000$. (Alternatively, using Tina's money: $\\frac{8}{3} \\times 15,000 = 40,000$).",
      "id_q": "Uang Tina : uang Talita = $3 : 8$. Selisih uang mereka $Rp\\ 25.000,00$. Jika uang Tina $Rp\\ 15.000,00$, maka uang Talita adalah ....",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Selisih angka perbandingan = $8 - 3 = 5$. Uang Talita = $\\frac{8}{5} \\times 25.000 = 40.000$. (Atau menggunakan uang Tina: $\\frac{8}{3} \\times 15.000 = 40.000$).",
      "en_options": [

    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "The composite shape can be seen as composed of two rectangles. Total area = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gambar berikut!\nLuas gabungan bangun tersebut adalah ... $m^2$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Bangun gabungan dapat dibagi menjadi dua persegi panjang. Persegi panjang atas berukuran $12 \\times 6 = 72\\ m^2$. Persegi panjang bawah (sisi kanan) berukuran $4 \\times (12-6) = 4 \\times 6 = 24\\ m^2$? Tunggu, perhatikan ukuran: sisi atas $12$, sisi kiri tegak $12$. Sisi bawah total $12$. Maka bangun tersebut adalah persegi utuh dengan pojok dipotong, atau dua persegi panjang. Luas total = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "en_q": "Observe the following figure!\nThe combined area of the shape is ... $cm^2$",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],

        "96"

      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }\n    .dashed { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-dasharray: 5,5; }\n    .text { font-size: 18px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(80, 40)\">\n    <path d=\"M 0,150 L 100,150 L 200,150 L 200,80 L 100,0 L 0,150\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 100,150 L 100,0\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 100,80 L 200,80\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <text x=\"35\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">6 m</text>\n    <text x=\"135\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">6 m</text>\n    <text x=\"210\" y=\"120\" class=\"text\">4 m</text>\n    <text x=\"15\" y=\"70\" class=\"text\">12 m</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"

    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "Volume of cone = $\\frac{1}{3} \\pi r^2 h = \\frac{1}{3} \\times \\frac{22}{7} \\times 14^2 \\times 12 = \\frac{22}{7} \\times 196 \\times 4 = 2,464\\ cm^3$.",
      "id_q": "Volume bangun ruang berikut ini adalah ... $cm^3$",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Volume kerucut = $\\frac{1}{3} \\pi r^2 t = \\frac{1}{3} \\times \\frac{22}{7} \\times 14^2 \\times 12 = \\frac{22}{7} \\times 196 \\times 4 = 2.464\\ cm^3$.",
      "en_options": [
        "1,232",
        "2,464",
        "3,696",
        "4,928"
      ],

      "image": "<svg width=\"300\" height=\"400\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }\n    .dashed { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-dasharray: 6,4; }\n    .text { font-size: 18px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(150, 50)\">\n    <path d=\"M 0,0 L -100,300\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,0 L 100,300\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M -100,300 A 100,30 0 0,0 100,300\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 100,300 A 100,30 0 0,1 -100,300\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,0 L 0,300\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,300 L 100,300\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <text x=\"-85\" y=\"150\" class=\"text\">12 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"35\" y=\"325\" class=\"text\">14 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Diameter $d = 20\\ cm$, so radius $r = 10\\ cm$. Volume of cylinder = $\\pi r^2 h = 3.14 \\times 10^2 \\times 15 = 3.14 \\times 100 \\times 15 = 4,710\\ cm^3$.",
      "id": 14,
      "id_q": "Volume tabung dengan diameter 20 cm dan tinggi 15 cm seperti tergambar berikut ini adalah ... $cm^3$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Diameter $d = 20\\ cm$, maka jari-jari $r = 10\\ cm$. Volume tabung = $\\pi r^2 t = 3,14 \\times 10^2 \\times 15 = 3,14 \\times 100 \\times 15 = 4.710\\ cm^3$.",
      "en_options": [

        "3,600",

      "image": "<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 400 260\" width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n  <defs>\n    <marker id=\"arrow-start\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"8\" refX=\"1\" refY=\"4\" orient=\"auto\">\n      <path d=\"M 8 0 L 0 4 L 8 8 Z\" fill=\"black\" />\n    </marker>\n    <marker id=\"arrow-end\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"8\" refX=\"7\" refY=\"4\" orient=\"auto\">\n      <path d=\"M 0 0 L 8 4 L 0 8 Z\" fill=\"black\" />\n    </marker>\n  </defs>\n  <ellipse cx=\"100\" cy=\"60\" rx=\"70\" ry=\"20\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <line x1=\"30\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"30\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <line x1=\"170\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"170\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 30 180 A 70 20 0 0 0 170 180\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 30 180 A 70 20 0 0 1 170 180\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-dasharray=\"6,4\" />\n  <line x1=\"200\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"200\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" marker-start=\"url(#arrow-start)\" marker-end=\"url(#arrow-end)\" />\n  <text x=\"210\" y=\"120\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"end\" dominant-baseline=\"middle\">15 cm</text>\n  <line x1=\"30\" y1=\"185\" x2=\"30\" y2=\"230\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" />\n  <line x1=\"170\" y1=\"185\" x2=\"170\" y2=\"230\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" />\n  <line x1=\"30\" y1=\"220\" x2=\"170\" y2=\"220\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" marker-start=\"url(#arrow-start)\" marker-end=\"url(#arrow-end)\" />\n  <text x=\"100\" y=\"240\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">20 cm</text>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Surface area of the cube $= 6s^2 = 600$. So $s^2 = 100$ which means the edge length $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah kubus dengan luas permukaan $600\\ cm^2$ memiliki volume sebesar .... $cm^3$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Luas permukaan kubus $= 6s^2 = 600$. Maka $s^2 = 100$ sehingga panjang rusuk $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.",
      "en_q": "A cube with a surface area of $600\\ cm^2$ has a volume of .... $cm^3$",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "512",
        "729",
        "1.000",
        "1.331"

      "en_options": [

        "729",
        "1,000",
        "1,331"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "The minimum paper area is the surface area of the box (cube) with an edge of $9\\ cm$. Surface area $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "id_q": "Budi ingin membuat kotak dari kertas karton untuk membuat tempat menyimpan mainan rubik. Jika salah satu panjang rusuk rubik adalah $9\\ cm$, maka luas kertas minimal yang harus disiapkan Budi adalah ... $cm^2$",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Luas kertas minimal adalah luas permukaan kotak (kubus) dengan rusuk $9\\ cm$. Luas permukaan $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "en_q": "Budi wants to make a box out of cardboard to store a Rubik's cube. If one of the edge lengths of the Rubik's cube is $9\\ cm$, then the minimum area of paper Budi must prepare is ... $cm^2$",

    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "Volume of rectangular prism $= l \\times w \\times h = 40 \\times 20 \\times 15 = 12,000\\ cm^3$.",

      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Volume balok $= p \\times l \\times t = 40 \\times 20 \\times 15 = 12.000\\ cm^3$.",

      "image": "<svg width=\"350\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .dashed { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-dasharray: 5,5; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(40, 50)\">\n    <!-- Top face -->\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 240,0 L 240,100\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 60,100 L 240,100\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <!-- Front face -->\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"60\" width=\"180\" height=\"100\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <!-- Connecting lines -->\n    <path d=\"M 0,60 L 60,0\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,60 L 240,0\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,160 L 240,100\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,160 L 60,100\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <!-- Labels -->\n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"180\" class=\"text\">40 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"145\" class=\"text\" transform=\"rotate(-35, 215, 145)\">20 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"55\" class=\"text\">15 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "Surface area $= 2 \\times (lw + lh + wh) = 2 \\times ((15 \\times 10) + (15 \\times 5) + (10 \\times 5)) = 2 \\times (150 + 75 + 50) = 2 \\times 275 = 550\\ cm^2$.",
      "id_q": "Luas permukaan balok dengan ukuran panjang $15\\ cm$, lebar $10\\ cm$, dan tinggi $5\\ cm$ adalah ... $cm^2$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Luas permukaan $= 2 \\times (pl + pt + lt) = 2 \\times ((15 \\times 10) + (15 \\times 5) + (10 \\times 5)) = 2 \\times (150 + 75 + 50) = 2 \\times 275 = 550\\ cm^2$.",
      "en_options": [

      "en_q": "The surface area of a rectangular prism with a length of $15\\ cm$, width of $10\\ cm$, and height of $5\\ cm$ is ... $cm^2$",
      "image": ""

    {
      "en_exp": "Total weight $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total children $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Average $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",
      "id": 19,
      "id_q": "Hasil penimbangan anak di Posyandu Tunas sebagai berikut:\nRata-rata berat badan berdasarkan tabel di atas adalah .... kg",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Total berat $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total anak $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Rata-rata $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",

      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .header { font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .cell { font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Berat Badan (kg)</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Jumlah Anak</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">10</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">3</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">11</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">12</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">14</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">16</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">1</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "The percentage of students who like MTK is $45\\%$. Number of students $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah diagram mata pelajaran yang digemari siswa kelas VI SD Anugerah. Jika jumlah seluruh siswa adalah 40 anak, maka banyak siswa yang gemar MTK adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Persentase siswa yang gemar MTK adalah $45\\%$. Jumlah siswa $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ siswa.",
      "en_q": "The following is a chart of the favorite subjects of the 6th-grade students of SD Anugerah. If the total number of students is 40, how many students like MTK?",

      "image": "<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 300 300\" width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n  <path d=\"M 150 150 L 150 250 A 100 100 0 0 1 50 150 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 150 150 L 50 150 A 100 100 0 0 1 180.90 54.89 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 150 150 L 180.90 54.89 A 100 100 0 0 1 150 250 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <text x=\"108\" y=\"190\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"bold\" text-anchor=\"middle\">BI</text>\n  <text x=\"108\" y=\"210\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">25%</text>\n  <text x=\"115\" y=\"100\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"bold\" text-anchor=\"middle\">IPA</text>\n  <text x=\"115\" y=\"120\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">30%</text>\n  <text x=\"210\" y=\"145\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"bold\" text-anchor=\"middle\">MTK</text>\n  <text x=\"210\" y=\"165\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">45%</text>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 21,
      "en_exp": "Based on the table, the correct data values are: June = 25, July = 40, August = 25, September = 70, and October = 55. By observing the height of the bars in each option, the bar chart that matches these exact values is option A.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan tabel hasil pengolahan pupuk organik di bawah ini!\n\nDiagram batang yang tepat untuk menyajikan data pada tabel tersebut adalah ....",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan tabel pada soal, diperoleh data: Juni = 25, Juli = 40, Agustus = 25, September = 70, dan Oktober = 55. Jika kita mengamati tinggi setiap batang pada pilihan jawaban, diagram batang yang tepat sesuai dengan nilai-nilai tersebut adalah pilihan A.",
      "en_q": "Observe the organic fertilizer processing table below!\n\nThe correct bar chart to present the data from the table is ....",

        "A",

    {
      "id": 22,
      "en_exp": "Convert all to decimals: $0.4 = 0.40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0.60$. $25\\% = 0.25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1.50$. Order from smallest: $0.25\\ ;\\ 0.40\\ ;\\ 0.60\\ ;\\ 1.50$. Or $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "id_q": "$0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nUrutan pecahan berikut dari yang terkecil adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Ubah semua ke bentuk desimal: $0,4 = 0,40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0,60$. $25\\% = 0,25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1,50$. Urutan dari yang terkecil: $0,25\\ ;\\ 0,40\\ ;\\ 0,60\\ ;\\ 1,50$. Atau $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "en_q": "$0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nThe correct order of these fractions from the smallest is ....",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "$0,4\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ 0,4$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "$0.4\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ 0.4$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {

      "en_exp": "$3 \\frac{1}{4} \\times 1.6 = \\frac{13}{4} \\times \\frac{16}{10} = \\frac{208}{40} = \\frac{26}{5} = 5 \\frac{1}{5}$.",
      "id_q": "Hasil dari $3 \\frac{1}{4} \\times 1,6$ adalah ....",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "$3 \\frac{1}{4} \\times 1,6 = \\frac{13}{4} \\times \\frac{16}{10} = \\frac{208}{40} = \\frac{26}{5} = 5 \\frac{1}{5}$.",
      "en_q": "The result of $3 \\frac{1}{4} \\times 1.6$ is ....",

    {
      "en_exp": "Total pencils = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Number of yellow pencils = $3$. Probability of drawing a yellow pencil = $3$ out of $10$.",
      "id": 24,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan sekumpulan pensil dengan keterangan warna berikut!\nBerdasarkan keterangan gambar di samping, peluang terambilnya pensil warna kuning adalah ...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total pensil = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Jumlah pensil kuning = $3$. Peluang terambil pensil kuning = $3$ dari $10$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "3 out of 5",
        "3 out of 10",
        "1 out of 10",
        "2 out of 10"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "3 dari 5",
        "3 dari 10",
        "1 dari 10",
        "2 dari 10"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the collection of pencils with the following color descriptions!\nBased on the image description, the probability of drawing a yellow pencil is ...",
      "image": "<svg width=\"500\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .pencil { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; }\n    .text { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; font-weight: bold; }\n    .brace { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <defs>\n    <g id=\"pencil_body\">\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 20,120 0,120 0,20\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 0,20\" fill=\"#f3d5b5\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 13,8 7,8\"/>\n    </g>\n  </defs>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 40)\">\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"0\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"25\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,130 C 0,140 15,140 22.5,150 C 30,140 45,140 45,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"22.5\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">biru</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"80\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"105\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"130\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 80,130 C 80,140 95,140 105,150 C 115,140 130,140 130,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"105\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">kuning</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"170\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"195\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"220\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"245\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"270\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 170,130 C 170,140 205,140 230,150 C 255,140 290,140 290,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"230\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">merah</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "The sold strawberries ($1\\ kg$) are far less than the other fruits. The probability is very small but it still happens, so the scale is 'unlikely'.",
      "id": 25,
      "id_q": "Bu Widya berjualan buah-buahan di pasar. Buah-buahan yang laku terjual yaitu $1\\ kg$ buah stroberi, $15\\ kg$ buah apel, $15\\ kg$ buah jeruk, dan $25\\ kg$ buah mangga. Skala peluang terjualnya buah stroberi yaitu ...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Buah stroberi yang terjual ($1\\ kg$) jauh lebih sedikit dibandingkan buah lainnya. Peluangnya sangat kecil tetapi masih mungkin terjadi, sehingga berskala 'kurang mungkin'.",
      "en_options": [
        "likely",
        "very likely",
        "unlikely",
        "impossible"
      ],
      "en_q": "Mrs. Widya sells fruits at the market. The fruits sold are $1\\ kg$ of strawberries, $15\\ kg$ of apples, $15\\ kg$ of oranges, and $25\\ kg$ of mangoes. The probability scale of strawberries being sold is ...",
      "id_options": [
        "mungkin",
        "sangat mungkin",
        "kurang mungkin",
        "tidak mungkin"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },

      "id_options": [
        "243",
        "512",
        "729",
        "1.024"
      ],
      "en_q": "The result of $(15 : 5)^3 \\times 3^3$ is ...",
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 28,
      "en_exp": "Volume of a cube $= s^3 = 32,768$. Edge length $s = \\sqrt[3]{32,768} = 32\\ cm$ (because $32 \\times 32 \\times 32 = 32,768$).",
      "id_q": "Sebuah bak air berbentuk kubus diisi air sampai penuh sehingga volume air dalam bak tersebut adalah $32.768\\ cm^3$. Panjang rusuk bak tersebut adalah....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume kubus $= s^3 = 32.768$. Panjang rusuk $s = \\sqrt[3]{32.768} = 32\\ cm$ (karena $32 \\times 32 \\times 32 = 32.768$).",
      "en_q": "A cube-shaped water tank is filled with water to the brim so that the volume of water in the tank is $32,768\\ cm^3$. The edge length of the tank is....",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "22 cm",
        "28 cm",
        "32 cm",
        "38 cm"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "22 cm",
        "28 cm",
        "32 cm",
        "38 cm"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Discount = $15\\% \\times 300,000 = 45,000$. Price to pay = $300,000 - 45,000 = Rp\\ 255,000.00$.",
      "id": 29,
      "id_q": "Citra Bersama dengan Ibunya pergi ke Toko Sepatu Berkah untuk membeli sepasang sepatu. Saat tiba di toko, Citra melihat ada sepatu yang sangat ia inginkan. Pada label harga tertera $Rp\\ 300.000,00$. Penjaga toko mengatakan bahwa hari itu toko sedang mengadakan diskon menjelang Ramadhan. Diskon yang diberikan sebesar $15\\%$. Berapa Citra dan Ibunya harus membayar sepatu tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Diskon = $15\\% \\times 300.000 = 45.000$. Harga yang harus dibayar = $300.000 - 45.000 = Rp\\ 255.000,00$.",
      "en_options": [
        "Rp 245,000.00",
        "Rp 250,000.00",
        "Rp 255,000.00",
        "Rp 260,000.00"
      ],
      "en_q": "Citra together with her mother went to Berkah Shoe Store to buy a pair of shoes. Upon arriving at the store, Citra saw shoes she really wanted. The price tag showed $Rp\\ 300,000.00$. The shopkeeper said that that day the store was having a pre-Ramadan discount. The discount given was $15\\%$. How much do Citra and her mother have to pay for the shoes?",
      "id_options": [
        "Rp 245.000,00",
        "Rp 250.000,00",
        "Rp 255.000,00",
        "Rp 260.000,00"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Female population = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1,440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1,440 = 840$ people.",
      "id": 30,
      "id_q": "Jumlah keseluruhan penduduk desa Sugih Waras adalah $1.440$ orang. Apabila perbandingan banyak penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan adalah $5 : 7$, maka hitunglah banyak penduduk perempuan yang ada di desa tersebut!",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Penduduk perempuan = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1.440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1.440 = 840$ jiwa.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The total population of Sugih Waras village is $1,440$ people. If the ratio of the number of male to female population is $5 : 7$, calculate the number of female population in the village!",
      "id_options": [
        "600 orang",
        "720 orang",
        "840 orang",
        "960 orang"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "600 people",
        "720 people",
        "840 people",
        "960 people"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 31,
      "en_exp": "Total harvest = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9.8$ tons.",
      "id_q": "Pak Joko memiliki tanah dengan luas $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hektar. Tanah tersebut ditanami kedelai. Jika setiap hektarnya mampu menghasilkan $\\frac{14}{5}$ ton kedelai, maka hitunglah berapa ton jumlah panen kedelai seluruhnya!",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total panen = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9,8$ ton atau $9 \\frac{4}{5}$ ton.",
      "en_q": "Mr. Joko has land with an area of $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hectares. The land is planted with soybeans. If each hectare can produce $\\frac{14}{5}$ tons of soybeans, calculate how many tons the total soybean harvest is!",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "8,8 ton",
        "9,8 ton",
        "10,8 ton",
        "12,8 ton"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "8.8 tons",
        "9.8 tons",
        "10.8 tons",
        "12.8 tons"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "The combined volume is the sum of the volume of the cube and the volume of the rectangular prism.\n1. Volume of the Cube = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume of the Prism = $l \\times w \\times h = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Combined Volume = $1,000 + 750 = 1,750\\ cm^3$.",
      "id": 32,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gabungan bangun ruang berikut ini!\nBangun tersebut terdiri dari kubus dengan panjang rusuk 10 cm dan balok yang menempel di sebelah kanannya dengan ukuran panjang 15 cm, lebar 10 cm, dan tinggi 5 cm. Berapakah volume gabungan bangun ruang tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume bangun gabungan tersebut adalah jumlah dari volume kubus dan volume balok.\n1. Volume Kubus = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume Balok = $p \\times l \\times t = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Volume Gabungan = $1.000 + 750 = 1.750\\ cm^3$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the following composite 3D shape!\nThe shape consists of a cube with an edge of 10 cm and a rectangular prism attached to its right side with a length of 15 cm, width of 10 cm, and height of 5 cm. What is the combined volume of the 3D shape?",
      "id_options": [
        "1.550 cm\u00b3",
        "1.650 cm\u00b3",
        "1.750 cm\u00b3",
        "1.850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "1,550 cm\u00b3",
        "1,650 cm\u00b3",
        "1,750 cm\u00b3",
        "1,850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .fill-shape { fill: #f9f9f9; stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <!-- Kubus -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,180 L 120,180 L 120,110 L 50,110 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,110 L 80,80 L 150,80 L 120,110 Z\"/>\n    <!-- Sisi kanan kubus tertutup balok, tapi garis ini penting -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,110 L 150,80 L 150,115 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Balok -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,180 L 220,180 L 220,145 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,145 L 150,115 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 220,180 L 250,150 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Label -->\n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"170\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">15 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"25\" y=\"150\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">5 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"105\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 33,
      "en_exp": "Based on the presented data, the scores and the number of students receiving them (frequency) are: Score 50 is 2 students, Score 60 is 3 students, Score 70 is 5 students, Score 80 is 4 students, Score 90 is 3 students, and Score 100 is 3 students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nBentuk tabel frekuensi yang benar dari data di atas adalah ....",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan data yang disajikan, urutan dan jumlah siswa yang mendapatkannya (frekuensi) adalah: Nilai 50 ada 2 siswa, Nilai 60 ada 3 siswa, Nilai 70 ada 5 siswa, Nilai 80 ada 4 siswa, Nilai 90 ada 3 siswa, dan Nilai 100 ada 3 siswa.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The following is the math score data of 20 6th-grade students of SD Muara Tanjung:\nThe correct frequency table form of the data above is ....",

      "id": 36,
      "en_exp": "From a top view perspective, the stacked cube will only show its top cross-section as one square. Thus, it will still look like a group of <strong>4 square-shaped squares</strong> ($2 \\times 2$).",
      "id_q": "Budi menyusun 4 kubus balok mendatar di lantai membentuk persegi panjang $2 \\times 2$, lalu ia menambahkan 1 kubus di atas kubus pojok kanan atas. Jika dilihat tepat dari atas, bentuknya terlihat seperti \u2026",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Dari sudut pandang atas, kubus yang bertumpuk hanya akan terlihat bagian penampang atasnya sebagai satu persegi saja. Sehingga tetap akan terlihat sebagai kumpulan <strong>4 persegi bentuk kotak</strong> ($2 \\times 2$).",

        "4 persegi bentuk kotak",
        "5 persegi",

      "image": "<svg width='200' height='160' viewBox='0 0 200 160' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g transform='translate(60,80)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='36' height='36' fill='#e8e0d0' stroke='#1a1208' stroke-width='1.5'/><polygon points='0,0 12,-12 48,-12 36,0' fill='#d4c8a8' stroke='#1a1208'/><polygon points='36,0 48,-12 48,24 36,36' fill='#c8bca0' stroke='#1a1208'/></g><g transform='translate(96,80)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='36' height='36' fill='#e8e0d0' stroke='#1a1208' stroke-width='1.5'/><polygon points='0,0 12,-12 48,-12 36,0' fill='#d4c8a8' stroke='#1a1208'/><polygon points='36,0 48,-12 48,24 36,36' fill='#c8bca0' stroke='#1a1208'/></g><g transform='translate(60,44)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='36' height='36' fill='#e8e0d0' stroke='#1a1208' stroke-width='1.5'/><polygon points='0,0 12,-12 48,-12 36,0' fill='#d4c8a8' stroke='#1a1208'/><polygon points='36,0 48,-12 48,24 36,36' fill='#c8bca0' stroke='#1a1208'/></g><g transform='translate(96,44)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='36' height='36' fill='#888' stroke='#1a1208' stroke-width='1.5'/><polygon points='0,0 12,-12 48,-12 36,0' fill='#666' stroke='#1a1208'/><polygon points='36,0 48,-12 48,24 36,36' fill='#555' stroke='#1a1208'/></g></svg>"

    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "The Associative property is the grouping property, meaning the way numbers are grouped does not affect the result of addition or multiplication. Example: (2 + 3) + 4 = 2 + (3 + 4).",
      "id_q": "Sifat Asosiatif bisa disebut juga dengan sifat ...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Sifat Asosiatif adalah sifat pengelompokan, yang menyatakan bahwa cara pengelompokan angka tidak memengaruhi hasil operasi penjumlahan atau perkalian. Contoh: (2 + 3) + 4 = 2 + (3 + 4).",
      "en_q": "The Associative property can also be called the property of ...",
      "options": [
        "Pertukaran",
        "Pengelompokan",
        "Penyebaran",
        "Permisalan"
      ],

      "id_q": "Ibu membuat sirup jeruk sebanyak $4.5$ liter. Sirup tersebut akan dituangkan habis ke dalam botol-botol kecil yang masing-masing berisi $0.25$ liter. Berapa banyak botol yang diperlukan Ibu?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Banyak botol = $4.5 : 0.25 = 450 : 25 = 18$ botol.",
      "en_q": "Mother made $4.5$ liters of orange syrup. The syrup will be completely poured into small bottles, each containing $0.25$ liters. How many bottles does Mother need?",
      "options": [
        "15 botol",
        "16 botol",
        "18 botol",
        "20 botol"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "Area of rectangle = $10 \\times 7 = 70$. Area of 1/2 circle = $\\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{22}{7} \\times 3.5^2 = 19.25$. Total area = $70 + 19.25 = 89.25$ m$^2$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah taman berbentuk persegi panjang dengan ukuran panjang $10$ meter dan lebar $7$ meter. Di salah satu sisi lebarnya menempel taman bunga berbentuk setengah lingkaran dengan diameter tepat sebesar sisi lebar tersebut ($7$ m). Berapakah luas seluruh taman tersebut? (Gunakan $\\pi \\approx \\frac{22}{7}$)",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Luas persegipanjang = $10 \\times 7 = 70$. Luas 1/2 lingkaran = $\\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{22}{7} \\times 3.5^2 = 19.25$. Luas total = $70 + 19.25 = 89.25$ m$^2$.",
      "en_q": "A park is shaped like a rectangle with a length of $10$ meters and a width of $7$ meters. Attached to one of its width sides is a semi-circular flower bed whose diameter matches the width ($7$ m). What is the total area of the park? (Use $\\pi \\approx \\frac{22}{7}$)",
      "options": [
        "$70$ m$^2$",
        "$89.25$ m$^2$",
        "$108.5$ m$^2$",
        "$147$ m$^2$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 14,
      "en_exp": "Perimeter = (2 x straight sides) + circumference of 1 full circle. Perimeter = $(2 \\times 100) + (3.14 \\times 60) = 200 + 188.4 = 388.4$ meters.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan lintasan lari yang terdiri dari area lapangan bagian tengah berbentuk persegi panjang berukuran $100$ m $\\times$ $60$ m. Di kedua ujung lapangannya ditambahkan batas berbentuk setengah lingkaran sehingga total menjadi lapangan lari melingkar utuh. Berapakah panjang total lintasan/keliling lapangan lari tersebut jika bagian lurusnya masing-masing $100$ m dan diameter ujung lengkungnya $60$ m? (Gunakan $\\pi \\approx 3.14$)",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Keliling = (2 x sisi lurus) + keliling 1 lingkaran penuh. Keliling = $(2 \\times 100) + (3.14 \\times 60) = 200 + 188.4 = 388.4$ meter.",
      "en_q": "Consider a running track consisting of a central rectangular field measuring $100$ m $\\times$ $60$ m. Semi-circular boundaries are added to both ends, turning it into a complete oval track. What is the total length/perimeter of this track if the straight parts are $100$ m each and the curved end diameters are $60$ m? (Use $\\pi \\approx 3.14$)",
      "options": [
        "$388.4$ meter",
        "$440$ meter",
        "$488.4$ meter",
        "$500$ meter"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Floor area = $400$ cm $\\times$ $400$ cm = $160,000$ cm$^2$. Area of 1 tile = $20 \\times 20 = 400$ cm$^2$. Number of tiles = $160,000 / 400 = 400$ tiles.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah ruangan kosong berbentuk persegi dengan panjang sisi sejauh $4$ meter. Lantai ruangan tersebut akan dipasangi ubin baru berukuran $20$ cm $\\times$ $20$ cm. Berapa banyak ubin yang diperlukan untuk menutupi seluruh permukaan lantai?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Luas lantai = $400$ cm $\\times$ $400$ cm = $160.000$ cm$^2$. Luas 1 ubin = $20 \\times 20 = 400$ cm$^2$. Banyak ubin = $160.000 : 400 = 400$ ubin.",
      "en_q": "An empty square room has a side length of $4$ meters. The floor of the room will be fitted with new tiles measuring $20$ cm $\\times$ $20$ cm. How many tiles are needed to cover the entire floor surface?",
      "options": [
        "100 ubin",
        "200 ubin",
        "400 ubin",
        "800 ubin"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "Let the smaller angle = $x$. Then the larger angle = $x + 45$. Equation: $x + (x + 45) = 180 \\Rightarrow 2x = 135 \\Rightarrow x = 67.5^\\circ$.",
      "id_q": "Dua buah sudut saling berpelurus (membentuk garis lurus). Jika diketahui besar sudut yang satu adalah $45^\\circ$ lebih besar dari sudut yang lain, berapakah besar sudut yang lebih kecil?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Misal sudut kecil = $x$. Maka sudut besar = $x + 45$. Persamaan: $x + (x + 45) = 180 \\Rightarrow 2x = 135 \\Rightarrow x = 67.5^\\circ$.",
      "en_q": "Two angles are supplementary (forming a straight line). If it is known that one angle is $45^\\circ$ larger than the other, what is the measure of the smaller angle?",
      "options": [
        "$45^\\circ$",
        "$67.5^\\circ$",
        "$112.5^\\circ$",
        "$135^\\circ$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "The minute hand is at 6. The hour hand is exactly halfway between 8 and 9 (position 8.5). Distance = $8.5 - 6 = 2.5$ hour units. $1$ hour = $30^\\circ$. Total angle = $2.5 \\times 30^\\circ = 75^\\circ$.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah besar sudut terkecil yang dibentuk oleh persilangan jarum jam (pendek) dan jarum menit (panjang) tepat pada pukul 08:30?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jarum menit di angka 6. Jarum jam berada tepat di tengah angka 8 dan 9 (yaitu posisi 8.5). Jarak antar jarum = $8.5 - 6 = 2.5$ satuan jam. $1$ jam = $30^\\circ$. Total sudut = $2.5 \\times 30^\\circ = 75^\\circ$.",
      "en_q": "What is the smallest angle formed by the intersection of the hour hand (short) and the minute hand (long) exactly at 08:30?",
      "options": [
        "$60^\\circ$",
        "$75^\\circ$",
        "$80^\\circ$",
        "$90^\\circ$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "Total volume = $60 \\times 40 \\times 50 = 120,000$ cm$^3$ = $120$ liters. Water inside = $\\frac{3}{4} \\times 120 = 90$ liters.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah akuarium berbentuk balok memiliki ukuran panjang $60$ cm, lebar $40$ cm, dan tinggi $50$ cm. Saat ini, akuarium tersebut telah terisi air sebanyak $\\frac{3}{4}$ bagian dari kapasitas totalnya. Berapa liter volume air yang ada di dalam akuarium tersebut?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Volume total = $60 \\times 40 \\times 50 = 120.000$ cm$^3$ = $120$ liter. Air di dalam = $\\frac{3}{4} \\times 120 = 90$ liter.",
      "en_q": "A cuboid-shaped aquarium has dimensions of $60$ cm long, $40$ cm wide, and $50$ cm high. Currently, the aquarium is filled with water up to $\\frac{3}{4}$ of its total capacity. How many liters of water are inside the aquarium?",
      "options": [
        "$90$ liter",
        "$120$ liter",
        "$150$ liter",
        "$180$ liter"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "A lidless cube has 5 square faces. Area of 1 face = $15 \\times 15 = 225$ cm$^2$. Area of 5 faces = $5 \\times 225 = 1,125$ cm$^2$.",
      "id_q": "Budi berencana membuat sebuah kotak mainan tanpa tutup yang berbentuk kubus. Jika ia menginginkan panjang rusuk kubus tersebut $15$ cm, berapakah luas lembaran karton minimum yang dibutuhkan Budi?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Kubus tanpa tutup memiliki 5 buah sisi persegi. Luas 1 sisi = $15 \\times 15 = 225$ cm$^2$. Luas 5 sisi = $5 \\times 225 = 1.125$ cm$^2$.",
      "en_q": "Budi plans to make a lidless toy box in the shape of a cube. If he wants the edge length of the cube to be $15$ cm, what is the minimum area of the cardboard sheet Budi needs?",
      "options": [
        "$900$ cm$^2$",
        "$1.125$ cm$^2$",
        "$1.350$ cm$^2$",
        "$3.375$ cm$^2$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "A triangular prism has 3 sides on its base. Number of edges = $3 \\times 3 = 9$. Number of vertices = $2 \\times 3 = 6$.",
      "id_q": "Bangun ruang prisma segitiga merupakan bangun yang alas dan atapnya berbentuk segitiga. Berapakah jumlah rusuk dan titik sudut yang dimiliki oleh bangun ruang prisma segitiga tersebut secara berturut-turut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Prisma segitiga memiliki 3 sisi pada alas. Jumlah rusuk = $3 \\times 3 = 9$. Jumlah titik sudut = $2 \\times 3 = 6$.",
      "en_q": "A triangular prism space figure is a shape whose base and top are triangles. What are the total number of edges and vertices possessed by this triangular prism space figure, respectively?",
      "options": [
        "6 dan 5",
        "9 dan 6",
        "12 dan 8",
        "6 dan 9"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 21,
      "en_exp": "The distance from A to B is 4 units to the right (parallel to x-axis). So the distance from D to C must also be 4 units to the right. Since $C=(7,4)$, the x-coordinate of D is $7 - 4 = 3$. The y-height is parallel to C which is 4. Point $D=(3,4)$.",
      "id_q": "Tiga titik $A(2, 1)$, $B(6, 1)$, dan $C(7, 4)$ berada pada bidang koordinat. Jika sebuah titik $D$ ditambahkan sehingga bila keempat titik dihubungkan membentuk sebuah bangun jajargenjang $ABCD$, maka letak titik $D$ haruslah berada di...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jarak dari A ke B adalah 4 satuan ke kanan (sejajar sumbu x). Maka jarak dari D ke C juga harus 4 satuan ke kanan. Karena $C=(7,4)$, letak sumbu x dari D adalah $7 - 4 = 3$. Ketinggian y sejajar sumbu C yaitu 4. Titik $D=(3,4)$.",
      "en_q": "Three points $A(2, 1)$, $B(6, 1)$, and $C(7, 4)$ are on a coordinate plane. If a point $D$ is added so that when the four points are connected they form a parallelogram $ABCD$, then the location of point $D$ must be at...",
      "options": [
        "$(2, 4)$",
        "$(3, 4)$",
        "$(4, 4)$",
        "$(5, 4)$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 22,
      "en_exp": "X-coordinate: $-3 + 4 = 1$. Y-coordinate: $5 - 2 = 3$. So the coordinates are $(1, 3)$.",
      "id_q": "Pada selembar bidang koordinat Kartesius, letak sebuah sekolah dicatat berada di titik $(-3, 5)$. Jika posisi rumah Andi ditentukan berada sejauh $4$ satuan ke kanan dan $2$ satuan ke bawah dari sekolah, di manakah titik koordinat rumah Andi?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Titik x: $-3 + 4 = 1$. Titik y: $5 - 2 = 3$. Jadi koordinatnya adalah $(1, 3)$.",
      "en_q": "On a sheet of Cartesian coordinate plane, the location of a school is recorded at point $(-3, 5)$. If Andi's house position is determined to be $4$ units to the right and $2$ units down from the school, what are the coordinates of Andi's house?",
      "options": [
        "$(1, 3)$",
        "$(1, 7)$",
        "$(-7, 3)$",
        "$(-7, 7)$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 23,
      "en_exp": "Highest yield = 65 tons (2023). Lowest yield = 40 tons (2022). Difference = $65 - 40 = 25$ tons.",
      "id_q": "Hasil panen beras Desa Sukamaju berturut-turut selama 4 tahun dicatat sebagai berikut: Tahun 2020 sebanyak 45 ton, 2021 sebanyak 50 ton, 2022 sebanyak 40 ton, dan 2023 sebanyak 65 ton. Selisih hasil panen tertinggi dan terendah selama periode 4 tahun tersebut adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Panen tertinggi = 65 ton (2023). Panen terendah = 40 ton (2022). Selisih = $65 - 40 = 25$ ton.",
      "en_q": "The rice harvest yields of Sukamaju Village for 4 consecutive years are recorded as follows: 45 tons in 2020, 50 tons in 2021, 40 tons in 2022, and 65 tons in 2023. The difference between the highest and lowest harvest yields during that 4-year period is...",
      "options": [
        "15 ton",
        "20 ton",
        "25 ton",
        "30 ton"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 24,
      "en_exp": "Total of 5 exam scores = $82 \\times 5 = 410$. Sum of the first 4 scores = $80 + 85 + 90 + 75 = 330$. Score $x = 410 - 330 = 80$.",
      "id_q": "Nilai ujian Matematika dari 5 orang siswa adalah sebagai berikut: 80, 85, 90, 75, dan $x$. Jika rata-rata nilai keseluruhan kelima anak tersebut adalah 82, berapakah nilai yang dilambangkan dengan huruf $x$?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total dari 5 nilai ujian = $82 \\times 5 = 410$. Jumlah 4 nilai awal = $80 + 85 + 90 + 75 = 330$. Nilai $x = 410 - 330 = 80$.",
      "en_q": "The Math exam scores of 5 students are as follows: 80, 85, 90, 75, and $x$. If the overall average score of all five children is 82, what is the score represented by the letter $x$?",
      "options": [
        "75",
        "80",
        "82",
        "85"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 25,
      "en_exp": "Sort the data: 35, 35, 35, 36, 38, 38, 40, 40, 42. The mode (most frequent) is 35 (appears 3 times). The median (middle value of 9 data points) is the 5th value, which is 38.",
      "id_q": "Diketahui data berat badan (dalam kg) beberapa siswa kelas VI saat pemeriksaan UKS adalah sebagai berikut: 35, 40, 38, 35, 42, 36, 38, 40, 35. Modus dan median dari kumpulan data tersebut secara berurutan adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Urutkan data: 35, 35, 35, 36, 38, 38, 40, 40, 42. Modus (paling sering muncul) adalah 35 (muncul 3 kali). Median (nilai tengah dari 9 data) ada di urutan ke-5, yaitu 38.",
      "en_q": "It is known that the weight data (in kg) of several grade VI students during a health check-up is as follows: 35, 40, 38, 35, 42, 36, 38, 40, 35. The mode and median of the dataset respectively are...",
      "options": [
        "35 dan 36",
        "35 dan 38",
        "38 dan 35",
        "40 dan 38"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 26,
      "en_exp": "Ratio difference = $5 - 3 = 2$ parts. $2$ parts correspond to 8 students, so 1 part = 4 students. Total parts = $3 + 5 = 8$ parts. Total students = $8 \\times 4 = 32$ people.",
      "id_q": "Perbandingan banyak siswa laki-laki dan perempuan di suatu kelas adalah $3 : 5$. Jika diketahui selisih jumlah antara mereka adalah 8 orang siswa, berapakah total seluruh siswa yang ada di kelas tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Selisih perbandingan = $5 - 3 = 2$ bagian. $2$ bagian sebanding dengan 8 siswa, maka 1 bagian = 4 siswa. Total bagian = $3 + 5 = 8$ bagian. Total siswa = $8 \\times 4 = 32$ orang.",
      "en_q": "The ratio of male to female students in a class is $3 : 5$. If it is known that the difference in their numbers is 8 students, what is the total number of students in the class?",
      "options": [
        "24 orang",
        "32 orang",
        "40 orang",
        "64 orang"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 27,
      "en_exp": "Actual distance = Map distance $\\times$ scale = $5 \\times 1,500,000 = 7,500,000$ cm. Converting cm to km (divide by 100,000) gives $75$ km.",
      "id_q": "Jarak antara kota A dan kota B yang tergambar pada sebuah peta adalah $5$ cm. Jika peta tersebut dicetak dengan menggunakan skala $1 : 1.500.000$, berapakah jarak sesungguhnya antara kedua kota tersebut di lapangan?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jarak sebenarnya = Jarak peta $\\times$ skala = $5 \\times 1.500.000 = 7.500.000$ cm. Mengubah cm ke km (dibagi 100.000) menjadi $75$ km.",
      "en_q": "The distance between city A and city B drawn on a map is $5$ cm. If the map is printed using a scale of $1 : 1,500,000$, what is the actual distance between the two cities on the ground?",
      "options": [
        "$7.5$ km",
        "$75$ km",
        "$750$ km",
        "$7.500$ km"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 28,
      "en_exp": "Use inverse proportion: $W_1 \\times T_1 = W_2 \\times T_2$. $15 \\times 24 = W_2 \\times 18$. $360 = 18 \\times W_2$. $W_2 = 20$ workers. Additional workers = $20 - 15 = 5$ people.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah proyek pembangunan rumah dapat diselesaikan oleh tim beranggotakan 15 orang pekerja dalam waktu 24 hari. Karena mengejar tenggat waktu, proyek tersebut harus diselesaikan lebih cepat yakni menjadi 18 hari saja. Berapa banyak jumlah pekerja tambahan yang diperlukan?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Gunakan perbandingan berbalik nilai: $P_1 \\times W_1 = P_2 \\times W_2$. $15 \\times 24 = P_2 \\times 18$. $360 = 18 \\times P_2$. $P_2 = 20$ orang. Pekerja tambahan = $20 - 15 = 5$ orang.",
      "en_q": "A house construction project can be completed by a team of 15 workers in 24 days. Due to a deadline, the project must be finished faster, in just 18 days. How many additional workers are needed?",
      "options": [
        "5 orang",
        "10 orang",
        "20 orang",
        "25 orang"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 29,
      "en_exp": "Total number of balls = $5 + 3 + 2 = 10$. Number of balls that are not green (red and yellow) = $5 + 3 = 8$. Probability of picking not green = $\\frac{8}{10}$, then simplified to $\\frac{4}{5}$.",
      "id_q": "Dalam sebuah kotak yang tertutup rapat terdapat 5 bola merah, 3 bola kuning, dan 2 bola hijau yang kesemuanya memiliki bentuk dan ukuran yang sama persis. Jika Budi mengambil sebuah bola secara acak dari dalam kotak, berapakah peluang Budi mendapatkan bola yang warnanya bukan hijau?",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Total keseluruhan bola = $5 + 3 + 2 = 10$. Jumlah bola yang bukan hijau (merah dan kuning) = $5 + 3 = 8$. Peluang terambilnya bukan hijau = $\\frac{8}{10}$, lalu disederhanakan menjadi $\\frac{4}{5}$.",
      "en_q": "In a tightly closed box, there are 5 red balls, 3 yellow balls, and 2 green balls, all of which have the exact same shape and size. If Budi picks a ball at random from the box, what is the probability that Budi gets a ball whose color is NOT green?",
      "options": [
        "$\\frac{1}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$\\frac{3}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{4}{5}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 30,
      "en_exp": "Dice faces consist of numbers $1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6$. Prime numbers are $2, 3, 5$. Among those primes, the only even one is $2$ (one event). So the probability is $\\frac{1}{6}$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah dadu bersisi enam standar dikocok lalu dilemparkan ke meja satu kali. Berapakah peluang munculnya sisi atas mata dadu yang merupakan bilangan prima genap?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Mata dadu terdiri dari angka $1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6$. Angka yang merupakan bilangan prima adalah $2, 3, 5$. Dari bilangan prima tersebut, yang nilainya genap hanyalah angka $2$ (satu kejadian). Maka peluangnya adalah $\\frac{1}{6}$.",
      "en_q": "A standard six-sided dice is shaken and then rolled onto a table once. What is the probability of the top face showing an even prime number?",
      "options": [
        "$\\frac{1}{6}$",
        "$\\frac{1}{3}$",
        "$\\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$\\frac{2}{3}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    }
  ],

      "en_exp": "The distributive property is the property of multiplying a sum or difference by a number.",

      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Sifat distributif adalah sifat penyebaran operasi perkalian terhadap penjumlahan atau pengurangan.",

    {
      "id": 4,
      "en_exp": "Multiples of 12 = 12, 24, 36, 48... Multiples of 18 = 18, 36, 54... The lowest common multiple is 36.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah Kelipatan Persekutuan Terkecil (KPK) dari bilangan 12 dan 18?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Kelipatan 12 = 12, 24, 36, 48... Kelipatan 18 = 18, 36, 54... KPK terkecil yang sama adalah 36.",
      "en_q": "What is the Least Common Multiple (LCM) of the numbers 12 and 18?",
      "options": [
        "6",
        "24",
        "36",
        "72"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "en_exp": "Find the LCM of 4 and 6, which is 12. Add 12 days to May 1st: 1 + 12 = May 13th.",
      "id_q": "Budi berenang setiap 4 hari sekali dan Iwan setiap 6 hari sekali. Jika pada tanggal 1 Mei mereka berenang bersama, pada tanggal berapa mereka akan berenang bersama lagi?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Cari KPK dari 4 dan 6, yaitu 12. Tambahkan 12 hari ke tanggal 1 Mei: 1 + 12 = 13 Mei.",

        "14 Mei"

    {
      "id": 6,
      "en_exp": "Use the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) of 24 and 36. Their greatest common divisor is 12.",
      "id_q": "Ibu memiliki 24 pensil dan 36 buku yang akan dibagikan kepada sejumlah anak sama rata. Berapa jumlah anak terbanyak yang dapat menerima paket tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,

    {
      "id": 7,
      "en_exp": "Convert to decimals: 1/2 = 0.5 ; 60% = 0.6 ; 0.75 = 0.75 ; 4/5 = 0.8. Order: 0.5 ; 0.6 ; 0.75 ; 0.8.",
      "id_q": "Urutan pecahan 1/2 ; 0,75 ; 60% ; 4/5 dari yang terkecil hingga terbesar adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Ubah ke desimal: 1/2 = 0,5 ; 60% = 0,6 ; 0,75 = 0,75 ; 4/5 = 0,8. Urutan: 0,5 ; 0,6 ; 0,75 ; 0,8.",

    {
      "id": 8,
      "en_exp": "Find a common denominator of 12. 1/4 = 3/12 and 2/3 = 8/12. Then 3/12 + 8/12 = 11/12.",
      "id_q": "Hasil dari penjumlahan pecahan 1/4 + 2/3 adalah...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Samakan penyebut menjadi 12. 1/4 = 3/12 dan 2/3 = 8/12. Maka 3/12 + 8/12 = 11/12.",

      "id_exp": "Ubah pecahan campuran menjadi pecahan biasa: 1 1/2 = 3/2. Lalu kalikan: 3/2 x 2/3 = 6/6 = 1.",

    {

      "en_exp": "Multiply the number of pieces by the length of each piece: 4 x 1.5 = 6.0 meters.",
      "id_q": "Sita memotong pita menjadi 4 bagian. Jika setiap bagian memiliki panjang 1,5 meter, berapakah panjang pita seluruhnya?",

      "en_q": "Sita cuts a ribbon into 4 pieces. If each piece is 1.5 meters long, what is the total length of the ribbon?",

    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "Area = length x width. So width = Area / length = 40 / 8 = 5 cm.",

      "en_exp": "The perimeter of a triangle is the sum of all its sides: 5 + 12 + 13 = 30 cm.",

      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Keliling segitiga adalah jumlah semua sisinya: 5 + 12 + 13 = 30 cm.",
      "en_q": "What is the perimeter of a triangle with side lengths of 5 cm, 12 cm, and 13 cm?",

      "image": ""

      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Area of a circle = pi x r x r = 22/7 x 7 x 7 = 154 square cm.",

      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "Area of trapezium = 1/2 x (sum of parallel sides) x height = 1/2 x (10 + 14) x 5 = 1/2 x 24 x 5 = 12 x 5 = 60 square cm.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah trapesium memiliki panjang dua sisi sejajar 10 cm dan 14 cm. Jika tingginya 5 cm, berapakah luas trapesium tersebut?",

    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "The total interior angle of a triangle is 180 degrees. Angle C = 180 - (50 + 60) = 180 - 110 = 70 degrees.",

      "en_exp": "The total interior angle of a quadrilateral is 360 degrees. Fourth angle = 360 - (90 + 90 + 80) = 360 - 260 = 100 degrees.",

      "en_exp": "Volume of a rectangular prism = length x width x height = 10 x 5 x 4 = 200 cubic cm.",

      "en_exp": "Surface area of a cube = 6 x (side x side) = 6 x (5 x 5) = 6 x 25 = 150 square cm.",

    {
      "id": 24,
      "en_exp": "Because the x value is positive (+3) and the y value is negative (-4), the point is in the bottom right area or Quadrant IV.",
      "id_q": "Titik koordinat (3, -4) berada di kuadran ke berapa pada bidang Kartesius?",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Karena nilai x positif (+3) dan y negatif (-4), titik tersebut berada di daerah kanan bawah atau Kuadran IV.",
      "en_q": "In which quadrant does the coordinate point (3, -4) lie on the Cartesian plane?",
      "options": [
        "Kuadran I",
        "Kuadran II",
        "Kuadran III",
        "Kuadran IV"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 25,
      "en_exp": "To be parallel to the X-axis and symmetrical, point D must share C's height (y=3) and be equally inset from the edge, meaning x = -1. So D(-1, 3).",
      "id_q": "Terdapat 3 titik koordinat: A(-2, 0), B(2, 0), C(1, 3). Agar membentuk trapesium sama kaki, di manakah letak titik D?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Agar sejajar sumbu-X dan simetris, posisi titik D harus selaras tingginya dengan C (y=3) dan berjarak sama dari pinggir seperti C, yaitu x = -1. Jadi D(-1, 3).",
      "en_q": "There are 3 coordinate points: A(-2, 0), B(2, 0), C(1, 3). To form an isosceles trapezium, where should point D be located?",
      "options": [
        "(-1, 3)",
        "(0, 3)",
        "(1, -3)",
        "(-1, -3)"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 26,
      "en_exp": "Reflection across the X-axis flips the y value to its opposite (negative). Thus, point (3, 4) becomes (3, -4).",
      "id_q": "Jika sebuah titik awal P (3, 4) dicerminkan terhadap Sumbu-X, berapakah posisi titik P' yang baru?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Pencerminan terhadap Sumbu-X membalikkan nilai y menjadi lawannya (negatif). Jadi titik (3, 4) berubah menjadi (3, -4).",
      "en_q": "If an initial point P (3, 4) is reflected across the X-axis, what is the new position P'?",
      "options": [
        "(-3, 4)",
        "(3, -4)",
        "(-3, -4)",
        "(4, 3)"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 27,
      "en_exp": "Average = Total sum divided by the number of data points. (7 + 8 + 9 + 8 + 8) / 5 = 40 / 5 = 8.",
      "id_q": "Nilai ujian 5 siswa adalah: 7, 8, 9, 8, 8. Berapakah rata-rata (mean) nilai tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Rata-rata = Total nilai dibagi jumlah data. (7 + 8 + 9 + 8 + 8) / 5 = 40 / 5 = 8.",
      "en_q": "The test scores of 5 students are: 7, 8, 9, 8, 8. What is the average (mean) score?",
      "options": [
        "7,5",
        "8,0",
        "8,5",
        "9,0"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 28,
      "en_exp": "Because the number of data points is even (6), the median is the average of the two middle values: (8 + 9) / 2 = 17 / 2 = 8.5.",
      "id_q": "Diberikan data yang sudah terurut: 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 10. Berapakah nilai tengah (median) data tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Karena jumlah data genap (6), median adalah rata-rata dari dua nilai di tengah: (8 + 9) / 2 = 17 / 2 = 8,5.",
      "en_q": "Given the sorted data: 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 10. What is the middle value (median) of the data?",
      "options": [
        "8,0",
        "8,5",
        "9,0",
        "9,5"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 29,
      "en_exp": "The mode is the most frequently occurring value. The number 8 appears 3 times (the most).",
      "id_q": "Berapakah modus dari sekumpulan data berikut: 7, 7, 8, 8, 8, 9?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Modus adalah nilai yang paling sering muncul. Angka 8 muncul sebanyak 3 kali (paling banyak).",
      "en_q": "What is the mode of the following data set: 7, 7, 8, 8, 8, 9?",
      "options": [
        "7",
        "8",
        "8,5",
        "9"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 30,
      "en_exp": "Since B's ratio is 3 and age is 15, then 1 part = 15 / 3 = 5 years. A's age = 2 parts = 2 x 5 = 10 years.",
      "id_q": "Rasio umur A dan B adalah 2 : 3. Jika umur B adalah 15 tahun, berapakah umur A?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Karena perbandingan umur B adalah 3 dan umurnya 15, maka 1 bagian = 15 / 3 = 5 tahun. Umur A = 2 bagian = 2 x 5 = 10 tahun.",
      "en_q": "The ratio of A's age to B's age is 2 : 3. If B is 15 years old, how old is A?",
      "options": [
        "5 tahun",
        "10 tahun",
        "20 tahun",
        "25 tahun"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 31,
      "en_exp": "Difference in ratio = 5 - 3 = 2. Total ratio = 5 + 3 = 8. Total marbles = (8 / 2) x 10 = 4 x 10 = 40 marbles.",
      "id_q": "Perbandingan jumlah kelereng C dan D adalah 3 : 5. Jika selisih kelereng mereka berdua adalah 10 butir, berapakah total seluruh kelereng mereka?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Selisih perbandingan = 5 - 3 = 2. Total perbandingan = 5 + 3 = 8. Total kelereng = (8 / 2) x 10 = 4 x 10 = 40 butir.",
      "en_q": "The ratio of marbles owned by C and D is 3 : 5. If the difference in their marbles is 10, what is their total number of marbles?",
      "options": [
        "15 butir",
        "25 butir",
        "40 butir",
        "80 butir"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 32,
      "en_exp": "Actual distance = 5 x 1,000,000 cm = 5,000,000 cm. Convert cm to km (divide by 100,000), the result is 50 km.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah peta memiliki skala 1 : 1.000.000. Jika jarak dua kota pada peta adalah 5 cm, berapakah jarak sebenarnya?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jarak nyata = 5 x 1.000.000 cm = 5.000.000 cm. Ubah cm ke km (dibagi 100.000), hasilnya 50 km.",

      "options": [
        "5 km",
        "50 km",
        "500 km",
        "5000 km"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 33,
      "en_exp": "There are 3 even numbers on a die (2, 4, 6). The total number of sides is 6. Probability = 3/6 = 1/2.",
      "id_q": "Pada pelemparan satu buah dadu bersisi enam, berapakah peluang munculnya mata dadu genap?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Angka genap pada dadu ada 3 (2, 4, 6). Total sisi ada 6. Peluang = 3/6 = 1/2.",

      "en_exp": "A coin has two sides: Heads and Tails. Getting Heads is 1 out of 2 possibilities, so the probability is 1/2.",

      "id_q": "Dalam sebuah kantong terdapat 3 bola merah dan 2 bola putih. Jika diambil satu bola secara acak, berapakah peluang terambilnya bola merah?",
