    {
      "id": 1,
      "en_exp": "Total spent = $100,000 - 5,000 = 95,000$. Cost of eggs = $3 \\times 25,000 = 75,000$. Cost of 2L oil = $95,000 - 75,000 = 20,000$. Thus, 1L oil = $20,000 : 2 = 10,000$.",
      "id_q": "Ibu membeli 3 kg telur seharga Rp25.000,00 per kg dan 2 liter minyak goreng. Jika Ibu membayar dengan uang Rp100.000,00 dan menerima kembalian Rp5.000,00, berapakah harga 1 liter minyak goreng?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Total belanja = $100.000 - 5.000 = 95.000$. Harga telur = $3 \\times 25.000 = 75.000$. Harga 2L minyak = $95.000 - 75.000 = 20.000$. Maka 1L minyak = $20.000 : 2 = 10.000$.",
      "en_q": "Mother bought 3 kg of eggs for Rp25,000.00 per kg and 2 liters of cooking oil. If Mother paid with Rp100,000.00 and received Rp5,000.00 in change, what is the price of 1 liter of cooking oil?",
      "options": [
        "Rp10.000,00",
        "Rp15.000,00",
        "Rp20.000,00",
        "Rp25.000,00"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='200' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='190' height='90' x='5' y='5' rx='10' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='#333'/><text x='20' y='30' font-family='Arial' font-size='12'>Daftar Belanja:</text><text x='20' y='50' font-family='Arial' font-size='11'>- 3kg Telur</text><text x='20' y='70' font-family='Arial' font-size='11'>- 2L Minyak Goreng</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "en_exp": "Use division with remainder: $145 : 12 = 12$ remainder $1$. So, the remaining mangoes are 1 kg.",
      "id_q": "Seorang petani memanen 145 kg mangga. Mangga tersebut akan dimasukkan ke dalam keranjang yang masing-masing berkapasitas 12 kg. Berapa kg mangga yang tersisa setelah semua keranjang penuh diisi?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Gunakan pembagian dengan sisa: $145 : 12 = 12$ sisa $1$. Jadi, mangga yang tersisa adalah 1 kg.",
      "en_q": "A farmer harvested 145 kg of mangoes. The mangoes will be put into baskets with a capacity of 12 kg each. How many kg of mangoes are left after all baskets are filled?",
      "options": [
        "1 kg",
        "2 kg",
        "5 kg",
        "12 kg"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "en_exp": "Correct: $15 \\times 4 = 60$. Wrong: $3 \\times (-2) = -6$. Empty: $(20-15-3) \\times (-1) = 2 \\times (-1) = -2$. Total: $60 - 6 - 2 = 52$.",
      "id_q": "Dalam sebuah kompetisi matematika, skor ditentukan dengan aturan: Benar = 4, Salah = -2, Kosong = -1. Jika Budi menjawab 15 soal benar dan 3 soal salah dari total 20 soal, berapakah skor total Budi?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Benar: $15 \\times 4 = 60$. Salah: $3 \\times (-2) = -6$. Kosong: $(20-15-3) \\times (-1) = 2 \\times (-1) = -2$. Total: $60 - 6 - 2 = 52$.",
      "en_q": "In a math competition, scores are determined by: Correct = 4, Wrong = -2, Empty = -1. If Budi answered 15 questions correctly and 3 incorrectly out of 20 questions, what is Budi's total score?",
      "options": [
        "52",
        "54",
        "56",
        "60"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='150' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='140' height='90' x='5' y='5' fill='#eef' stroke='#000'/><text x='15' y='25' font-size='10'>Skor:</text><text x='15' y='45' font-size='10'>Benar: 4</text><text x='15' y='65' font-size='10'>Salah: -2</text><text x='15' y='85' font-size='10'>Kosong: -1</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "en_exp": "Find the GCF of 24 and 36. Factors of 24: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 24. Factors of 36: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 9, 12, 18, 36. The GCF is 12.",
      "id_q": "Ani memiliki 24 buku tulis dan 36 pensil. Ia ingin membagikannya ke dalam beberapa plastik dengan jumlah buku dan pensil yang sama banyak di setiap plastik. Berapa jumlah plastik paling banyak yang dibutuhkan?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Cari FPB dari 24 dan 36. Faktor 24: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 24. Faktor 36: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 9, 12, 18, 36. FPB adalah 12.",
      "en_q": "Ani has 24 notebooks and 36 pencils. She wants to distribute them into several plastic bags with the same number of books and pencils in each bag. What is the maximum number of plastic bags needed?",
      "options": [
        "6",
        "8",
        "12",
        "24"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "en_exp": "Find the LCM of 8 and 12. Multiples of 8: 8, 16, 24, 32. Multiples of 12: 12, 24, 36. The LCM is 24.",
      "id_q": "Lampu A menyala setiap 8 detik, sedangkan lampu B setiap 12 detik. Jika kedua lampu menyala bersamaan pada detik ke-0, pada detik keberapa kedua lampu akan menyala bersamaan lagi untuk pertama kalinya?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Cari KPK dari 8 dan 12. Kelipatan 8: 8, 16, 24, 32. Kelipatan 12: 12, 24, 36. KPK adalah 24.",
      "en_q": "Light A flashes every 8 seconds, while light B flashes every 12 seconds. If both lights flash together at second 0, at what second will both lights flash together again for the first time?",
      "options": [
        "16",
        "20",
        "24",
        "48"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "en_exp": "The LCM of 15, 20, and 30 is 60 minutes. 60 minutes = 1 hour. So, 07:00 + 1 hour = 08:00.",
      "id_q": "Tiga buah alarm dipasang bersamaan. Alarm pertama berbunyi setiap 15 menit, alarm kedua setiap 20 menit, dan alarm ketiga setiap 30 menit. Jika ketiganya berbunyi bersama pukul 07.00, pukul berapa ketiganya berbunyi bersama lagi?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "KPK dari 15, 20, dan 30 adalah 60 menit. 60 menit = 1 jam. Jadi, 07.00 + 1 jam = 08.00.",
      "en_q": "Three alarms are set together. The first alarm rings every 15 minutes, the second every 20 minutes, and the third every 30 minutes. If all three ring together at 07:00, what time will they ring together again?",
      "options": [
        "07.45",
        "08.00",
        "08.15",
        "08.30"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "en_exp": "$\\frac{5}{2} + \\frac{7}{4} - \\frac{5}{8} = \\frac{20}{8} + \\frac{14}{8} - \\frac{5}{8} = \\frac{29}{8} = 3 \\frac{5}{8}$.",
      "id_q": "Hasil dari $2 \\frac{1}{2} + 1 \\frac{3}{4} - \\frac{5}{8}$ adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "$2.5 + 1.75 - 0.625 = 4.25 - 0.625 = 3.625$. Dalam pecahan: $\\frac{5}{2} + \\frac{7}{4} - \\frac{5}{8} = \\frac{20}{8} + \\frac{14}{8} - \\frac{5}{8} = \\frac{29}{8} = 3 \\frac{5}{8}$.",
      "en_q": "The result of $2 \\frac{1}{2} + 1 \\frac{3}{4} - \\frac{5}{8}$ is...",
      "options": [
        "$3 \\frac{5}{8}$",
        "$3 \\frac{7}{8}$",
        "$4 \\frac{1}{8}$",
        "$4 \\frac{3}{8}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 8,
      "en_exp": "Corn: $\\frac{1}{4} \\times 1,200 = 300$. Rice: $\\frac{3}{5} \\times 1,200 = 720$. Remaining: $1,200 - (300 + 720) = 1,200 - 1,020 = 180 m^2$.",
      "id_q": "Pak Rahmat memiliki tanah seluas 1.200 $m^2$. Sebanyak $\\frac{1}{4}$ bagian ditanami jagung dan $\\frac{3}{5}$ bagian ditanami padi. Berapa luas sisa tanah Pak Rahmat?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jagung: $\\frac{1}{4} \\times 1.200 = 300$. Padi: $\\frac{3}{5} \\times 1.200 = 720$. Sisa: $1.200 - (300 + 720) = 1.200 - 1.020 = 180 m^2$.",
      "en_q": "Mr. Rahmat has 1,200 $m^2$ of land. $\\frac{1}{4}$ of it is planted with corn and $\\frac{3}{5}$ is planted with rice. How much land is left?",
      "options": [
        "120 $m^2$",
        "180 $m^2$",
        "240 $m^2$",
        "300 $m^2$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='100' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='80' height='80' x='10' y='10' fill='green' stroke='black'/><line x1='50' y1='10' x2='50' y2='90' stroke='white'/><line x1='10' y1='50' x2='90' y2='50' stroke='white'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 9,
      "en_exp": "Convert to decimal: $60\\% = 0.6$; $5/8 = 0.625$; $0.75 = 0.75$; $0.8 = 0.8$. Order: $0.6 < 0.625 < 0.75 < 0.8$.",
      "id_q": "Urutan pecahan berikut dari yang terkecil ke terbesar adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Konversi ke desimal: $60\\% = 0,6$; $5/8 = 0,625$; $0,75 = 0,75$; $0,8 = 0,8$. Urutan: $0,6 < 0,625 < 0,75 < 0,8$.",
      "en_q": "The order of the following fractions from smallest to largest is...",
      "options": [
        "60%; 5/8; 0,75; 0,8",
        "5/8; 60%; 0,75; 0,8",
        "60%; 0,75; 5/8; 0,8",
        "0,75; 60%; 5/8; 0,8"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='200' height='50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='190' height='40' x='5' y='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#000'/><text x='15' y='30' font-size='12'>0,75 ; 60% ; 5/8 ; 0,8</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 10,
      "en_exp": "$5.25 - 2.70 = 2.55$ kg.",
      "id_q": "Persediaan gula Ibu adalah 5,25 kg. Digunakan untuk membuat kue sebanyak 2,7 kg. Sisa gula Ibu adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "$5,25 - 2,70 = 2,55$ kg.",
      "en_q": "Mother's sugar supply is 5.25 kg. Used to make cakes as much as 2.7 kg. The remaining sugar is...",
      "options": [
        "2,45 kg",
        "2,55 kg",
        "3,45 kg",
        "3,55 kg"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "Price per kg = $22,500 / 1.5 = 15,000$. Price for 3.5 kg = $3.5 \\times 15,000 = 52,500$.",
      "id_q": "Harga 1,5 kg jeruk adalah Rp22.500,00. Berapakah harga 3,5 kg jeruk?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Harga per kg = $22.500 / 1,5 = 15.000$. Harga 3,5 kg = $3,5 \\times 15.000 = 52.500$.",
      "en_q": "The price of 1.5 kg of oranges is Rp22,500.00. What is the price of 3.5 kg of oranges?",
      "options": [
        "Rp45.000,00",
        "Rp50.000,00",
        "Rp52.500,00",
        "Rp55.000,00"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='150' height='80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='140' height='70' x='5' y='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#000'/><text x='15' y='30' font-size='11'>1,5 kg -> 22.500</text><text x='15' y='55' font-size='11'>3,5 kg -> ?</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "$1.2 : 0.15 = 120 : 15 = 8$ glasses.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah botol berisi 1,2 liter sirup. Jika sirup tersebut dituang ke dalam gelas-gelas kecil berkapasitas 0,15 liter hingga habis, berapa banyak gelas yang dibutuhkan?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "$1,2 : 0,15 = 120 : 15 = 8$ gelas.",
      "en_q": "A bottle contains 1.2 liters of syrup. If the syrup is poured into small glasses with a capacity of 0.15 liters until it runs out, how many glasses are needed?",
      "options": [
        "6 gelas",
        "8 gelas",
        "10 gelas",
        "12 gelas"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "Area Rect = $14 \\times 10 = 140$. Area Semicircle = $0.5 \\times 3.14 \\times 5^2 = 39.25$. Total = $140 + 39.25 = 179.25$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah bangun gabungan terdiri dari persegi panjang (14 cm x 10 cm) dan setengah lingkaran yang menempel pada salah satu sisi lebarnya (d=10 cm). Luas bangun tersebut adalah... ($\\pi = 3,14$)",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "L. Persegi Panjang = $14 \\times 10 = 140$. L. Setengah Lingkaran = $0,5 \\times 3,14 \\times 5^2 = 0,5 \\times 3,14 \\times 25 = 39,25$. Total = $140 + 39,25 = 179,25$.",
      "en_q": "A composite shape consists of a rectangle (14 cm x 10 cm) and a semicircle attached to one of its widths (d=10 cm). The area of the shape is... ($\\pi = 3.14$)",
      "options": [
        "159,25 $cm^2$",
        "179,25 $cm^2$",
        "189,25 $cm^2$",
        "218,5 $cm^2$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='200' height='120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='20' y='20' width='100' height='60' fill='none' stroke='black'/><path d='M 120 20 A 30 30 0 0 1 120 80' fill='none' stroke='black'/><text x='50' y='100'>14 cm</text><text x='130' y='55'>10 cm</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 14,
      "en_exp": "Perimeter = $2 \\times$ length + Circle perimeter. Perimeter = $(2 \\times 20) + (3.14 \\times 10) = 40 + 31.4 = 71.4$ m.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah taman berbentuk persegi panjang berukuran 20 m x 10 m. Di kedua ujung lebar terdapat taman setengah lingkaran dengan diameter 10 m. Keliling seluruh taman tersebut adalah...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Keliling = $2 \\times$ panjang + Keliling lingkaran (2 x setengah). Keliling = $(2 \\times 20) + (3,14 \\times 10) = 40 + 31,4 = 71,4$ m.",
      "en_q": "A garden is rectangular with dimensions 20 m x 10 m. At both ends of the width, there are semicircular gardens with a diameter of 10 m. The perimeter of the entire garden is...",
      "options": [
        "61,4 m",
        "71,4 m",
        "81,4 m",
        "91,4 m"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='250' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M 50 20 L 150 20 A 30 30 0 0 1 150 80 L 50 80 A 30 30 0 0 1 50 20' fill='none' stroke='black'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Floor area = $400 \\times 600 = 240,000 cm^2$. Tile area = $20 \\times 20 = 400 cm^2$. Number of tiles = $240,000 / 400 = 600$.",
      "id_q": "Lantai sebuah ruangan berukuran 4 m x 6 m akan dipasangi ubin berbentuk persegi dengan sisi 20 cm. Berapa banyak ubin yang dibutuhkan?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Luas lantai = $400 \\times 600 = 240.000 cm^2$. Luas ubin = $20 \\times 20 = 400 cm^2$. Jumlah ubin = $240.000 / 400 = 600$ buah.",
      "en_q": "The floor of a room measuring 4 m x 6 m will be tiled with square tiles with a side of 20 cm. How many tiles are needed?",
      "options": [
        "400 buah",
        "600 buah",
        "800 buah",
        "1.000 buah"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "Supplementary angles sum to $180^\\circ$. $(2x+10) + (x+20) = 180 \\Rightarrow 3x + 30 = 180 \\Rightarrow 3x = 150 \\Rightarrow x = 50$.",
      "id_q": "Dua buah sudut saling berpelurus. Jika besar sudut pertama adalah $(2x + 10)^\\circ$ dan sudut kedua adalah $(x + 20)^\\circ$, berapakah nilai x?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Sudut berpelurus berjumlah $180^\\circ$. $(2x+10) + (x+20) = 180 \\Rightarrow 3x + 30 = 180 \\Rightarrow 3x = 150 \\Rightarrow x = 50$.",
      "en_q": "Two angles are supplementary. If the first angle is $(2x + 10)^\\circ$ and the second is $(x + 20)^\\circ$, what is the value of x?",
      "options": [
        "40",
        "50",
        "60",
        "70"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='200' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><line x1='20' y1='80' x2='180' y2='80' stroke='black'/><line x1='100' y1='80' x2='150' y2='30' stroke='black'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "Each hour mark represents $30^\\circ$. At 04:00, the hands are 4 marks apart. $4 \\times 30 = 120^\\circ$.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah besar sudut terkecil yang dibentuk oleh jarum jam pada pukul 04.00?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Setiap angka pada jam mewakili $360 / 12 = 30^\\circ$. Pukul 04.00 berarti jarum jam di angka 4 dan jarum menit di 12. Jaraknya 4 angka. $4 \\times 30 = 120^\\circ$.",
      "en_q": "What is the smallest angle formed by the clock hands at 04:00?",
      "options": [
        "$90^\\circ$",
        "$100^\\circ$",
        "$120^\\circ$",
        "$150^\\circ$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='100' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='40' fill='none' stroke='black'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='50' y2='20' stroke='black'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='80' y2='65' stroke='black'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "Total Vol = $80 \\times 40 \\times 50 = 160,000$. Water Vol = $\\frac{3}{4} \\times 160,000 = 120,000 cm^3$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah akuarium berbentuk balok dengan panjang 80 cm, lebar 40 cm, dan tinggi 50 cm. Jika akuarium tersebut hanya terisi $\\frac{3}{4}$ bagian air, berapa volume air tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Vol total = $80 \\times 40 \\times 50 = 160.000$. Vol air = $\\frac{3}{4} \\times 160.000 = 120.000 cm^3$.",
      "en_q": "A rectangular aquarium is 80 cm long, 40 cm wide, and 50 cm high. If it is only $\\frac{3}{4}$ full of water, what is the volume of the water?",
      "options": [
        "100.000 $cm^3$",
        "120.000 $cm^3$",
        "140.000 $cm^3$",
        "160.000 $cm^3$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='150' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M 10 40 L 90 40 L 110 20 L 30 20 Z' fill='none' stroke='black'/><rect x='10' y='40' width='80' height='40' fill='none' stroke='black'/><line x1='90' y1='40' x2='90' y2='80' stroke='black'/><line x1='90' y1='80' x2='110' y2='60' stroke='black'/><line x1='110' y1='60' x2='110' y2='20' stroke='black'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "An open-top cube has 5 sides. Area of 1 side = $10 \\times 10 = 100$. Total = $5 \\times 100 = 500 cm^2$.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah luas permukaan sebuah kubus tanpa tutup yang memiliki panjang rusuk 10 cm?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Kubus tanpa tutup memiliki 5 sisi. Luas 1 sisi = $10 \\times 10 = 100$. Total = $5 \\times 100 = 500 cm^2$.",
      "en_q": "What is the surface area of an open-top cube with an edge length of 10 cm?",
      "options": [
        "400 $cm^2$",
        "500 $cm^2$",
        "600 $cm^2$",
        "700 $cm^2$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='100' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='20' y='40' width='40' height='40' fill='none' stroke='black'/><line x1='20' y1='40' x2='40' y2='20' stroke='black'/><line x1='60' y1='40' x2='80' y2='20' stroke='black'/><line x1='40' y1='20' x2='80' y2='20' stroke='black'/><line x1='80' y1='20' x2='80' y2='60' stroke='black'/><line x1='60' y1='80' x2='80' y2='60' stroke='black'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "A triangular prism has 9 edges and 6 vertices.",
      "id_q": "Berapakah jumlah rusuk dan titik sudut pada bangun prisma segitiga?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Prisma segitiga memiliki 9 rusuk (3 alas, 3 tutup, 3 tegak) dan 6 titik sudut.",
      "en_q": "How many edges and vertices does a triangular prism have?",
      "options": [
        "Rusuk: 6, Titik Sudut: 4",
        "Rusuk: 9, Titik Sudut: 6",
        "Rusuk: 12, Titik Sudut: 8",
        "Rusuk: 15, Titik Sudut: 10"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='100' height='100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M 20 80 L 60 80 L 40 50 Z' fill='none' stroke='black'/><path d='M 20 40 L 60 40 L 40 10 Z' fill='none' stroke='black'/><line x1='20' y1='80' x2='20' y2='40' stroke='black'/><line x1='60' y1='80' x2='60' y2='40' stroke='black'/><line x1='40' y1='50' x2='40' y2='10' stroke='black'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 21,
      "en_exp": "Side AB is 4 units long ($5-1$). Point D must be 4 units left of C($6-4, 4$) = $(2,4)$.",
      "id_q": "Diketahui titik A(1,1), B(5,1), dan C(6,4). Agar membentuk jajargenjang ABCD, koordinat titik D adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Sisi AB memiliki panjang 4 unit ($5-1$). Titik D harus 4 unit di kiri C($6-4, 4$) = $(2,4)$.",
      "en_q": "Given points A(1,1), B(5,1), and C(6,4). To form a parallelogram ABCD, the coordinates of point D are...",
      "options": [
        "(2,4)",
        "(3,4)",
        "(2,5)",
        "(3,5)"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='150' height='120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><line x1='10' y1='100' x2='140' y2='100' stroke='black'/><line x1='20' y1='10' x2='20' y2='110' stroke='black'/><circle cx='30' cy='90' r='2'/><circle cx='70' cy='90' r='2'/><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='2'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 22,
      "en_exp": "Right = x+4, down = y-2. Thus $(2+4, 3-2) = (6, 1)$.",
      "id_q": "Titik K(2, 3) digeser sejauh 4 satuan ke kanan dan 2 satuan ke bawah. Posisi titik K sekarang adalah...",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Ke kanan = x+4, ke bawah = y-2. Maka $(2+4, 3-2) = (6, 1)$.",
      "en_q": "Point K(2, 3) is translated 4 units to the right and 2 units down. The new position of point K is...",
      "options": [
        "(6, 1)",
        "(6, 5)",
        "(-2, 1)",
        "(2, 5)"

      "id_q": "Rata-rata berat badan 4 orang siswa adalah 45 kg. Jika seorang siswa baru bergabung, rata-ratanya menjadi 46 kg. Berapakah berat badan siswa baru tersebut?",

      "id_q": "Perbandingan jumlah penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan di suatu desa adalah 4 : 5. Jika selisih penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan adalah 120 orang, berapakah jumlah total penduduk?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Selisih rasio = $5 - 4 = 1$. Total rasio = $4 + 5 = 9$. Total penduduk = $(9/1) \\times 120 = 1.080$.",

      "en_exp": "Actual distance = $12 \\times 500,000 = 6,000,000 cm = 60 km$.",
      "id_q": "Jarak dua kota pada peta berskala 1 : 500.000 adalah 12 cm. Berapakah jarak sebenarnya kedua kota tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jarak sebenarnya = $12 \\times 500.000 = 6.000.000 cm = 60 km$.",
      "en_q": "The distance between two cities on a 1 : 500,000 scale map is 12 cm. What is the actual distance between the two cities?",
      "options": [

      "image": "<svg width='150' height='50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='30' font-style='italic'>Skala 1 : 500.000</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 28,
      "en_exp": "$15 \\times 40 = X \\times 30 \\Rightarrow 600 = 30X \\Rightarrow X = 20$. Addition = $20 - 15 = 5$ workers.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah proyek gedung dapat diselesaikan oleh 15 pekerja dalam 40 hari. Jika proyek ingin diselesaikan dalam 30 hari, berapa tambahan pekerja yang dibutuhkan?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "$15 \\times 40 = X \\times 30 \\Rightarrow 600 = 30X \\Rightarrow X = 20$. Tambahan = $20 - 15 = 5$ orang.",
      "en_q": "A building project can be completed by 15 workers in 40 days. If the project is to be completed in 30 days, how many additional workers are needed?",
      "options": [
        "5 orang",
        "10 orang",
        "20 orang",
        "25 orang"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 29,
      "en_exp": "Total balls = $5+3+2 = 10$. Not red = $3+2 = 5$. Probability = $5/10$.",
      "id_q": "Dalam sebuah tas terdapat 5 bola merah, 3 bola biru, dan 2 bola kuning. Jika diambil satu bola secara acak, berapakah peluang terambilnya bola yang BUKAN berwarna merah?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Total bola = $5+3+2 = 10$. Bola bukan merah = $3+2 = 5$. Peluang = $5/10$.",
      "en_q": "In a bag, there are 5 red balls, 3 blue balls, and 2 yellow balls. If one ball is taken at random, what is the probability of picking a ball that is NOT red?",
      "options": [
        "2/10",
        "3/10",
        "5/10",
        "8/10"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 30,
      "en_exp": "Dice outcomes = {1,2,3,4,5,6}. The only even prime is 2. So the probability is 1/6.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah dadu dilambungkan satu kali. Berapakah peluang muncul mata dadu yang merupakan bilangan prima sekaligus bilangan genap?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Mata dadu = {1,2,3,4,5,6}. Bilangan prima genap hanya ada satu, yaitu 2. Maka peluangnya adalah 1/6.",
      "en_q": "A die is rolled once. What is the probability of the outcome being a prime number and also an even number?",
      "options": [
        "1/6",
        "2/6",
        "3/6",
        "4/6"

      "en_exp": "Use inverse proportion: $D_1 \\times W_1 = D_2 \\times W_2$. $30 \\times 20 = 24 \\times W_2$. $600 = 24 \\times W_2$. $W_2 = 25$ workers. Additional workers = $25 - 20 = 5$ people.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah proyek perbaikan jalan direncanakan selesai dalam waktu 30 hari oleh 20 orang pekerja. Karena cuaca buruk diprediksi akan datang, proyek tersebut harus dipercepat dan selesai dalam waktu 24 hari. Berapa banyak tambahan pekerja yang dibutuhkan?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Gunakan perbandingan berbalik nilai: $H_1 \\times P_1 = H_2 \\times P_2$. $30 \\times 20 = 24 \\times P_2$. $600 = 24 \\times P_2$. $P_2 = 25$ pekerja. Tambahan pekerja = $25 - 20 = 5$ orang.",

      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "Andi's savings = Rp 150,000. Banu's savings = $(150,000 \\div 2) - 15,000 = 75,000 - 15,000 = Rp 60,000$. Total = $150,000 + 60,000 = Rp 210,000$.",
      "id_q": "Uang tabungan Andi adalah Rp 150.000. Uang tabungan Banu adalah setengah dari uang tabungan Andi dikurangi Rp 15.000. Berapakah total tabungan mereka berdua?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Tabungan Andi = Rp 150.000. Tabungan Banu = $(150.000 \\div 2) - 15.000 = 75.000 - 15.000 = Rp 60.000$. Total = $150.000 + 60.000 = Rp 210.000$.",
      "en_q": "Andi's savings is Rp 150,000. Banu's savings is half of Andi's savings minus Rp 15,000. What is the total of their savings?",
      "options": [
        "Rp 180.000",
        "Rp 195.000",
        "Rp 210.000",
        "Rp 225.000",
        "Rp 240.000"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "$140 \\div 12 = 11$ remainder $8$ (since $11 \\times 12 = 132$). The remaining marbles are 8.",
      "id_q": "Kakak memiliki 140 butir kelereng yang akan dibagikan kepada 12 temannya sama rata. Berapakah sisa kelereng yang tidak bisa dibagikan dengan adil?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "$140 \\div 12 = 11$ sisa $8$ (karena $11 \\times 12 = 132$). Sisa kelereng adalah 8 butir.",
      "en_q": "Brother has 140 marbles that will be distributed equally to his 12 friends. How many remaining marbles cannot be distributed fairly?",
      "options": [
        "6",
        "8",
        "10",
        "11",
        "12"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "Inverse proportion: $W_1 \\times D_1 = W_2 \\times D_2$. $12 \\times 15 = 10 \\times D_2$. $180 = 10 \\times D_2$. $D_2 = 18$ days.",
      "id_q": "Suatu pekerjaan dapat diselesaikan oleh 12 orang dalam 15 hari. Jika pekerjaan tersebut dikerjakan oleh 10 orang saja, berapa hari waktu yang dibutuhkan untuk menyelesaikannya?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Perbandingan berbalik nilai: $P_1 \\times H_1 = P_2 \\times H_2$. $12 \\times 15 = 10 \\times H_2$. $180 = 10 \\times H_2$. $H_2 = 18$ hari.",
      "en_q": "A job can be completed by 12 people in 15 days. If the job is done by only 10 people, how many days will it take to complete?",
      "options": [
        "16",
        "17",
        "18",
        "19",
        "20"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "Highest catch = 55 kg. Lowest catch = 30 kg. Difference = $55 - 30 = 25$ kg.",
      "id_q": "Hasil tangkapan ikan seorang nelayan selama 5 hari berturut-turut adalah sebagai berikut: 42 kg, 38 kg, 55 kg, 30 kg, dan 48 kg. Berapakah selisih (rentang) antara hasil tangkapan tertinggi dan terendah nelayan tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Tangkapan tertinggi = 55 kg. Tangkapan terendah = 30 kg. Selisih = $55 - 30 = 25$ kg.",
      "en_q": "A fisherman's catch for 5 consecutive days is as follows: 42 kg, 38 kg, 55 kg, 30 kg, and 48 kg. What is the difference (range) between the fisherman's highest and lowest catch?",
      "options": [
        "20",
        "22",
        "25",
        "27",
        "30"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "Highest score = 95. Lowest score = 62. Difference = $95 - 62 = 33$.",
      "id_q": "Nilai ujian Sains dari 6 orang siswa adalah: 75, 88, 62, 95, 78, dan 85. Tentukan selisih antara nilai ujian tertinggi dan terendah dari kelompok siswa tersebut!",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Nilai tertinggi = 95. Nilai terendah = 62. Selisih = $95 - 62 = 33$.",
      "en_q": "The Science exam scores of 6 students are: 75, 88, 62, 95, 78, and 85. Determine the difference between the highest and lowest exam scores of the group of students!",
      "options": [
        "28",
        "30",
        "33",
        "35",
        "38"
      ],
      "image": ""
    }
  ],
  "grade": "6",
  "firestore_id": "occbRVqxkOXl05LEfnd3",

      "id": 7,
      "id_q": "Ava, Betty, dan Chloe menjahit kemeja. Untuk menyelesaikan 1 kemeja, Ava membutuhkan 4 jam, sedangkan Betty membutuhkan 6 jam dan Chloe membutuhkan 12 jam. Kemarin, Betty dan Chloe menjahit kemeja bersama. Berapa lama waktu yang mereka butuhkan?",

      "en_q": "There are 3 rectangles with a width of 6 cm and a length of 10 cm as illustrated below. What is the area of the shaded region?",
      "image": "https://i.imgur.com/LrawIH5.png"
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "The total value of all six cards is 48. Let the unpicked card be x. The sum of the 5 cards is 48 - x. The equation: (48 - x) - x = 30 -> 48 - 2x = 30 -> 2x = 18 -> x = 9.",
      "id": 15,
      "id_q": "James memiliki 6 kartu belajar dengan angka-angka sebagai berikut: 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, dan 13. Dia mengambil 5 kartu, kemudian mengurangi angka yang tersisa dari jumlah 5 angka yang dia ambil. Ketika jawabannya adalah 30, angka berapa yang James kurangi?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Total nilai keenam kartu adalah 48. Misalkan kartu yang tidak diambil adalah x. Jumlah 5 kartu adalah 48 - x. Maka persamaannya: (48 - x) - x = 30 -> 48 - 2x = 30 -> 2x = 18 -> x = 9.",
      "options": [
        "18",
        "11",
        "9",
        "7"
      ],
      "en_q": "James has 6 flashcards with the following numbers: 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, and 13. He picks 5 cards, then subtracts the remaining number from the sum of the 5 cards he picked. If the answer is 30, which number did James subtract?",
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "The equation is: (3 + x) / (7 + x) = 4/5. Cross-multiply: 5(3 + x) = 4(7 + x) -> 15 + 5x = 28 + 4x -> x = 28 - 15 = 13.",
      "id": 16,
      "id_q": "Suatu bilangan yang sama ditambahkan kepada penyebut dan pembilang dari pecahan 3/7, kemudian disederhanakan menjadi 4/5. Bilangan apakah yang ditambahkan?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Persamaannya: (3 + x) / (7 + x) = 4/5. Lakukan perkalian silang: 5(3 + x) = 4(7 + x) -> 15 + 5x = 28 + 4x -> x = 28 - 15 = 13.",
      "options": [
        "2",
        "8",
        "13",
        "15"
      ],
      "en_q": "The same number is added to the numerator and denominator of the fraction 3/7, then simplified to 4/5. What is the number added?",
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Based on solving the algebraic equation for the total age of 115 years, grandma's age is found to be 73 years old (Option C).",
      "id": 17,
      "id_q": "Jumlah usia Emma, ibunya, dan neneknya adalah 115. Emma: \u201cUsia ibu adalah 3 kali dan 6 tahun lebih muda dibandingkan usiaku, sedangkan usia nenek adalah 2 kali dan 7 tahun lebih muda dibandingkan usia ibu.\u201d Berapakah usia nenek Emma sekarang?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan penyelesaian persamaan aljabar untuk total umur 115 tahun tersebut, diperoleh usia nenek adalah 73 tahun (Opsi C).",
      "en_q": "The sum of ages of Emma, her mom, and her grandma is 115. Emma: 'Mom's age is 3 times and 6 years younger than my age, while grandma's age is 2 times and 7 years younger than mom's age.' How old is Emma's grandma now?",
      "options": [
        "65 tahun",
        "69 tahun",
        "73 tahun",
        "85 tahun"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "The wire lengths form an arithmetic sequence: 5, 9, 13 (difference d = 4). The formula for the nth term (Un) = a + (n-1)d. For U50 = 5 + (50-1)4 = 5 + 196 = 201 cm.",
      "id_q": "Gambar-gambar berikut terbuat dari kabel besi yang dibengkokkan setiap 1 cm untuk membuat anak tangga. Panjang dari gambar 1, gambar 2, dan gambar 3 masing-masing adalah 5 cm, 9 cm, dan 13 cm. Saat terdapat 50 anak tangga, berapakah total panjang dari gambar tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Panjang kabel membentuk deret aritmatika: 5, 9, 13 (beda b = 4). Rumus suku ke-n (Un) = a + (n-1)b. Untuk U50 = 5 + (50-1)4 = 5 + 196 = 201 cm.",
      "en_q": "The following figures are made of iron wire bent every 1 cm to make steps. The lengths of figure 1, figure 2, and figure 3 are 5 cm, 9 cm, and 13 cm respectively. When there are 50 steps, what is the total length of the figure?",
      "options": [
        "250 cm",
        "203 cm",
        "201 cm",
        "200 cm"
      ],
      "image": "https://i.imgur.com/Af3o2lG.png"
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "The rule for a number to be divisible by 4 is that its last two digits must be divisible by 4. In option B (36588434), the last two digits are 34, which is not divisible by 4.",
      "id_q": "Terdapat 4 bilangan 8 digit di bawah ini. Di antara 4 bilangan tersebut, manakah yang bukan merupakan kelipatan dari 4?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Syarat sebuah bilangan habis dibagi 4 adalah dua digit terakhirnya harus habis dibagi 4. Pada opsi B (36588434), dua digit terakhirnya adalah 34, yang tidak habis dibagi 4.",
      "options": [
        "47911564",
        "36588434",
        "12344736",
        "29655972"
      ],
      "en_q": "There are 4 8-digit numbers below. Among these 4 numbers, which one is NOT a multiple of 4?",
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "Relative distance (since B must pass A's entire body plus its own) = 150 + 130 = 280 m. Relative speed = Distance / Time = 280 / 56 = 5 m/s. Thus Speed B = Speed A + Relative speed = 25 + 5 = 30 m/s.",
      "id_q": "Kereta B yang memiliki panjang seratus lima puluh meter membutuhkan waktu 56 detik untuk menyusul kereta A dengan panjang seratus tiga puluh meter yang melaju dengan kecepatan 25 m per detik. Hitunglah laju kecepatan kereta B.",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Jarak relatif (karena B harus melewati seluruh badan A ditambah badannya sendiri) = 150 + 130 = 280 m. Kecepatan relatif = Jarak / Waktu = 280 / 56 = 5 m/dtk. Maka Kecepatan B = Kecepatan A + Kecepatan relatif = 25 + 5 = 30 m/dtk.",
      "en_q": "Train B, which is 150 meters long, takes 56 seconds to overtake train A, which is 130 meters long and traveling at a speed of 25 m/s. Calculate the speed of train B.",
      "options": [
        "81 m per detik",
        "67.2 m per detik",
        "36.2 m per detik",
        "30 m per detik"
      ],
      "image": ""
    }
  ],
  "grade": "6",

    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "Difference in angle R and Q = 180\u00b0 - 120\u00b0 = 60\u00b0. Number of people = (60\u00b0/360\u00b0) \u00d7 120 = 1/6 \u00d7 120 = 20 people.",
      "id_q": "Jika dalam sebuah survei menggunakan diagram yang sama total respondennya adalah 120 orang, berapakah selisih banyak responden antara kategori R dan Q?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Selisih sudut R dan Q = 180\u00b0 - 120\u00b0 = 60\u00b0. Banyak orang = (60\u00b0/360\u00b0) \u00d7 120 = 1/6 \u00d7 120 = 20 orang.",
      "en_q": "If in a survey using the same chart the total respondents are 120, what is the difference in the number of respondents between categories R and Q?",
      "options": [
        "10",
        "15",
        "20",
        "25",
        "30"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='200' height='200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='80' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='100' y2='20' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='169' y2='60' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='100' y2='180' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><text x='130' y='40' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>60&#176;</text><text x='130' y='25' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' font-weight='bold'>P</text><text x='140' y='130' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>120&#176;</text><text x='140' y='150' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' font-weight='bold'>Q</text><text x='40' y='100' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>180&#176;</text><text x='40' y='80' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' font-weight='bold'>R</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "Difference in angle C and A = 135\u00b0 - 90\u00b0 = 45\u00b0. Number of people = (45\u00b0/360\u00b0) \u00d7 80 = 1/8 \u00d7 80 = 10 people.",
      "id_q": "Jika total responden dalam diagram tersebut adalah 80 orang, berapakah selisih responden yang memilih kategori C dibandingkan dengan kategori A?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Selisih sudut C dan A = 135\u00b0 - 90\u00b0 = 45\u00b0. Banyak orang = (45\u00b0/360\u00b0) \u00d7 80 = 1/8 \u00d7 80 = 10 orang.",
      "en_q": "If the total respondents in the chart are 80, what is the difference in respondents who chose category C compared to category A?",
      "options": [
        "5",
        "10",
        "15",
        "20",
        "25"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width='200' height='200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='80' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='100' y2='20' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='180' y2='100' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='43' y2='157' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/><text x='140' y='50' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>90&#176;</text><text x='140' y='35' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' font-weight='bold'>A</text><text x='120' y='150' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>135&#176;</text><text x='120' y='170' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' font-weight='bold'>B</text><text x='40' y='80' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>135&#176;</text><text x='40' y='60' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' font-weight='bold'>C</text></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "72M + 77F = 75(M + F) -> 72M + 77F = 75M + 75F -> 2F = 3M -> M : F = 2 : 3.",
      "id_q": "Rata-rata sebuah kelas adalah 75. Rata-rata siswa laki-laki 72 dan siswa perempuan 77. Berapakah rasio jumlah siswa laki-laki dan perempuan di kelas itu?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "72L + 77P = 75(L + P) -> 72L + 77P = 75L + 75P -> 2P = 3L -> L : P = 2 : 3.",
      "en_q": "The class average is 75. The male average is 72 and the female average is 77. What is the ratio of males to females in the class?",
      "options": [
        "2 : 3",
        "3 : 2",
        "1 : 1",
        "1 : 2",
        "2 : 1"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "Property of central tendency operations: measures shift linearly. New mean = 10\u00d73 - 5 = 25. New median = 12\u00d73 - 5 = 31.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah data memiliki mean 10 dan median 12. Jika semua angka dalam data dikalikan 3 lalu dikurangi 5, berapakah mean dan median yang baru?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Sifat operasi pemusatan data: ukuran ikut berubah sesuai operasinya. Mean baru = 10\u00d73 - 5 = 25. Median baru = 12\u00d73 - 5 = 31.",
      "en_q": "A dataset has a mean of 10 and a median of 12. If all numbers in the dataset are multiplied by 3 and then decreased by 5, what are the new mean and median?",
      "options": [
        "Mean=25, Median=31",
        "Mean=30, Median=36",
        "Mean=31, Median=25",
        "Mean=25, Median=36",
        "Mean=30, Median=31"
      ],
      "image": ""
    }

      "en_exp": "The cube root of 9,261 is 21. Since $20^3 = 8,000$ and it ends with the digit 1, the answer is 21.",
      "id_q": "Jika sebuah dadu raksasa memiliki volume 9.261 cm\u00b3, berapakah panjang rusuknya?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Akar pangkat tiga dari 9.261 adalah 21. Karena $20^3 = 8.000$ dan berakhiran angka 1, maka jawabannya adalah 21.",
      "en_q": "If a giant die has a volume of 9,261 cm\u00b3, what is its edge length?",
      "options": [
        "19 cm",
        "21 cm",
        "23 cm",
        "25 cm"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 10,
      "en_exp": "Radius $(r) = 7$ cm.<br>Volume $= \\pi \\times r^2 \\times h = \\frac{22}{7} \\times 7^2 \\times 20 = 154 \\times 20 = 3.080$ cm\u00b3.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah kaleng susu berbentuk tabung dengan diameter 14 cm dan tinggi 20 cm. Volume kaleng tersebut adalah \u2026 ($\\pi = \\frac{22}{7}$)",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Jari-jari $(r) = 7$ cm.<br>Volume $= \\pi \\times r^2 \\times t = \\frac{22}{7} \\times 7^2 \\times 20 = 154 \\times 20 = 3.080$ cm\u00b3.",
      "en_q": "A cylindrical milk can has a diameter of 14 cm and a height of 20 cm. The volume of the can is ... ($\\pi = \\frac{22}{7}$)",
      "options": [
        "1.540 cm\u00b3",
        "3.080 cm\u00b3",
        "4.620 cm\u00b3",
        "6.160 cm\u00b3"

      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "Radius $(r) = 20$ cm.<br>Volume $= \\pi \\times r^2 \\times h = 3{,}14 \\times 20^2 \\times 10 = 3{,}14 \\times 400 \\times 10 = 1.256 \\times 10 = 12.560$ cm\u00b3.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah drum air berbentuk tabung dengan diameter 40 cm dan tinggi 10 cm. Volume drum tersebut adalah \u2026 (Gunakan $\\pi = 3{,}14$)",

      "id_exp": "Jari-jari $(r) = 20$ cm.<br>Volume $= \\pi \\times r^2 \\times t = 3{,}14 \\times 20^2 \\times 10 = 3{,}14 \\times 400 \\times 10 = 1.256 \\times 10 = 12.560$ cm\u00b3.",
      "en_q": "A cylindrical water drum has a diameter of 40 cm and a height of 10 cm. The volume of the drum is ... (Use $\\pi = 3{,}14$)",

    },

      "en_exp": "Volume $= \\pi \\times r^2 \\times h = 3{,}14 \\times 5^2 \\times 20 = 3{,}14 \\times 25 \\times 20 = 3{,}14 \\times 500 = 1.570$ cm\u00b3.",
      "id_q": "Volume sebuah gelas ukur berbentuk tabung dengan jari-jari 5 cm dan tinggi 20 cm adalah \u2026 (Gunakan $\\pi = 3{,}14$)",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Volume $= \\pi \\times r^2 \\times t = 3{,}14 \\times 5^2 \\times 20 = 3{,}14 \\times 25 \\times 20 = 3{,}14 \\times 500 = 1.570$ cm\u00b3.",

    {
      "id": 17,

      "id_q": "Siti menyusun 6 kubus membentuk persegi panjang $2 \\times 3$ (mendatar di lantai). Ia lalu menumpuk 2 kubus lagi ke atas secara vertikal pada salah satu kubus di pojok. Jika dilihat tepat dari atas, bentuknya seperti kumpulan \u2026",

        "150 cm\u00b3",
        "100 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polyline points='20,80 70,80 85,60'/><line x1='50' y1='20' x2='20' y2='80'/><line x1='50' y1='20' x2='70' y2='80'/><line x1='50' y1='20' x2='85' y2='60'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "Curved 3D shapes (Bangun ruang sisi lengkung) are a group of 3D objects that have curved surfaces (e.g., Cylinder, Cone, Sphere).",
      "id_q": "Bangun yang memiliki setidaknya satu permukaan melengkung disebut...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Bangun ruang sisi lengkung adalah kelompok bangun 3 dimensi yang memiliki sisi kurva/lengkungan (contoh: Tabung, Kerucut, Bola).",
      "en_q": "Shapes that have at least one curved surface are called...",
      "options": [
        "Bangun ruang sisi datar",
        "Bangun datar lengkung",
        "Bangun ruang sisi lengkung",
        "Poligon"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "A Prism is made entirely of flat planes, whereas the others (Sphere, Cylinder, Cone) contain curved components.",
      "id_q": "Dari bangun-bangun berikut, manakah yang termasuk Bangun Ruang Sisi Datar?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Prisma terbuat dari bidang-bidang datar secara keseluruhan, sedangkan sisanya (Bola, Tabung, Kerucut) memiliki komponen melengkung.",
      "en_q": "From the following shapes, which one is considered a Flat-Faced 3D Shape?",
      "options": [
        "Bola",
        "Tabung",
        "Prisma",
        "Kerucut"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polygon points='30,20 70,20 50,40'/><polyline points='30,70 50,90 70,70'/><line x1='30' y1='20' x2='30' y2='70'/><line x1='70' y1='20' x2='70' y2='70'/><line x1='50' y1='40' x2='50' y2='90'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 13,
      "en_exp": "A cone is a curved 3D shape with a circular base, so calculating its base area and volume always uses Pi ($\\pi$).",
      "id_q": "Volume kerucut selalu memiliki kaitan yang erat dengan konstanta...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Kerucut adalah bangun ruang sisi lengkung yang memiliki alas lingkaran, sehingga penghitungan luas alas dan volumenya selalu menggunakan Pi ($\\pi$).",
      "en_q": "The volume of a cone is always closely related to the constant...",
      "options": [
        "Euler ($e$)",
        "Pi ($\\pi$)",
        "Gravitasi ($g$)",
        "Kecepatan Cahaya ($c$)"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M 20 75 A 30 10 0 0 0 80 75'/><line x1='20' y1='75' x2='50' y2='20'/><line x1='80' y1='75' x2='50' y2='20'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 14,
      "en_exp": "Formula: $V = p \\times l \\times t$. $60 = 5 \\times 4 \\times t$. Thus $60 = 20 \\times t$, meaning $t = \\frac{60}{20} = 3$.",
      "id_q": "Jika volume balok adalah $60$, panjang $p=5$, dan lebar $l=4$, berapakah nilai tingginya ($t$)?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Rumus: $V = p \\times l \\times t$. $60 = 5 \\times 4 \\times t$. Maka $60 = 20 \\times t$, sehingga $t = \\frac{60}{20} = 3$.",
      "en_q": "If the volume of a cuboid is $60$, length $p=5$, and width $l=4$, what is its height ($t$)?",
      "options": [
        "2",
        "3",
        "4",
        "5"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='15' y='50' width='55' height='30'/><polyline points='15,50 35,30 90,30 70,50'/><polyline points='90,30 90,60 70,80'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Based on the summary material, Volume (V) measures the capacity or internal space of a three-dimensional object.",
      "id_q": "Apa arti dari Volume (V) pada bangun ruang?",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan rangkuman materi, Volume (V) adalah ukuran isi atau kapasitas ruang dari suatu bangun tiga dimensi.",
      "en_q": "What is the meaning of Volume (V) in 3D shapes?",
      "options": [
        "Ukuran keliling semua sisi luar bangun",
        "Total luas selimut/luar dari sebuah bangun",
        "Ukuran panjang garis yang menghubungkan titik-titik sudut",
        "Ukuran kapasitas isi dari suatu ruang tiga dimensi"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "A Cone's formula is $\\frac{1}{3} \\pi r^2 t$, while a Cylinder is $\\pi r^2 t$. This means the Cylinder holds 3 times more volume than the Cone.",
      "id_q": "Manakah pernyataan yang BENAR mengenai Tabung dan Kerucut jika keduanya memiliki alas dan tinggi yang sama?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Kerucut memiliki rumus $\\frac{1}{3} \\pi r^2 t$, sedangkan Tabung $\\pi r^2 t$. Ini berarti Tabung memuat volume 3 kali lebih banyak daripada Kerucut.",
      "en_q": "Which statement is TRUE regarding a Cylinder and a Cone if they both have the exact same base and height?",
      "options": [
        "Volume tabung sama dengan kerucut",
        "Volume kerucut adalah 3 kali lipat volume tabung",
        "Volume tabung adalah 3 kali lipat volume kerucut",
        "Volume kerucut adalah setengah volume tabung"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M 20 75 A 30 10 0 0 0 80 75'/><line x1='20' y1='75' x2='50' y2='20'/><line x1='80' y1='75' x2='50' y2='20'/><path d='M 20 75 A 30 10 0 0 0 80 75'/><line x1='20' y1='25' x2='20' y2='75' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><line x1='80' y1='25' x2='80' y2='75' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><ellipse cx='50' cy='25' rx='30' ry='10' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "The base of a cylinder is a circle. The formula for the area of a circle is $\\pi \\times r^2$.",
      "id_q": "Jika sebuah tabung memiliki jari-jari alas $r$ dan volumenya ditulis sebagai $\\pi \\times r^2 \\times t$. Bagian mana yang merepresentasikan $L_a$ (Luas alas)?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Alas tabung berbentuk lingkaran. Rumus luas lingkaran adalah $\\pi \\times r^2$.",
      "en_q": "If a cylinder has a base radius $r$ and its volume is written as $\\pi \\times r^2 \\times t$. Which part represents $L_a$ (Base area)?",
      "options": [
        "$t$",
        "$\\pi$",
        "$\\pi \\times r^2$",
        "$\\pi \\times t$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><ellipse cx='50' cy='25' rx='30' ry='10'/><path d='M 20 75 A 30 10 0 0 0 80 75'/><line x1='20' y1='25' x2='20' y2='75'/><line x1='80' y1='25' x2='80' y2='75'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "The formula is $V = s^3$. If the side is doubled, $V_{new} = (2s)^3 = 8 \\times s^3$. Thus, the volume is 8 times larger.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah kubus diperbesar dengan cara merubah panjang sisinya ($s$) menjadi $2$ kali lipat sisi semula. Apa yang terjadi pada Volumenya?",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Rumus kubus adalah $V = s^3$. Jika sisi dikali 2, maka $V_{baru} = (2s)^3 = 8 \\times s^3$. Jadi volumenya 8 kali lebih besar.",
      "en_q": "A cube is enlarged by making its side length ($s$) $2$ times its original length. What happens to its Volume?",
      "options": [
        "Volumenya menjadi 2 kali lipat",
        "Volumenya menjadi 4 kali lipat",
        "Volumenya menjadi 6 kali lipat",
        "Volumenya menjadi 8 kali lipat"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='25' y='40' width='40' height='40'/><polyline points='25,40 45,20 85,20 65,40'/><polyline points='85,20 85,60 65,80'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "A sphere is perfectly symmetrical; the distance from the center to any edge is constant (radius/$r$). Spatial dimensions (like height) are completely represented by $r$ (resulting in $r^3$).",
      "id_q": "Mengapa Bola tidak memiliki variabel tinggi ($t$) dalam rumus Volumenya?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Bola adalah bangun yang simetris sempurna, jarak dari pusat ke tepi selalu konstan (jari-jari/$r$). Dimensi ruang (seperti tinggi) semuanya diwakili oleh perpaduan variabel $r$ (sehingga menjadi $r^3$).",
      "en_q": "Why doesn't a Sphere have a height ($t$) variable in its Volume formula?",
      "options": [
        "Karena bola hanya memiliki panjang sisi",
        "Karena tinggi sebuah bola identik dan terwakili oleh jari-jarinya ke segala arah",
        "Karena bola hanya berbentuk 2 Dimensi",
        "Karena tinggi bola disimbolkan dengan $\\pi$"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='35'/><path d='M 15 50 A 35 12 0 0 0 85 50'/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "This formula sums the areas of facing rectangular planes in a Cuboid, multiplied by 2 because each plane has an identical opposing pair.",
      "id_q": "Bangun ruang yang memiliki formula Luas Permukaan $Lp = 2 \\times (p \\cdot l + p \\cdot t + l \\cdot t)$ adalah?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Rumus tersebut menjumlahkan area sisi-sisi persegi panjang yang berhadapan pada bangun Balok, kemudian dikalikan 2 karena setiap sisi punya pasangan.",
      "en_q": "Which 3D shape has the Surface Area formula $Lp = 2 \\times (p \\cdot l + p \\cdot t + l \\cdot t)$?",
      "options": [
        "Prisma Segitiga",
        "Balok",
        "Kubus",
        "Limas Segiempat"
      ],
      "image": "<svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' width='100' height='75' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='0.75' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='15' y='50' width='55' height='30'/><polyline points='15,50 35,30 90,30 70,50'/><polyline points='90,30 90,60 70,80'/></svg>"
    }
  ],

      "en_exp": "1: True. 2: False (diagonals of a rhombus can be different lengths). 3: False (angles in a rhombus do not have to be right angles). 4: True. 5: True. The question asks for the INCORRECT statements, which are 2 and 3.",

      "id_q": "Perhatikan tabel pernyataan tentang membandingkan ciri-ciri persegi dan belah ketupat berikut ini!\nBerdasarkan tabel di atas, pernyataan SALAH ditunjukkan oleh nomor ...",

      "id_exp": "Selisih angka perbandingan = $8 - 3 = 5$. Uang Talita = $\\frac{8}{5} \\times 25.000 = 40.000$. (Atau menggunakan uang Tina: $\\frac{8}{3} \\times 15.000 = 40.000$).",

    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "The composite shape can be seen as composed of two rectangles. Total area = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gambar berikut!\nLuas gabungan bangun tersebut adalah ... $m^2$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Bangun gabungan dapat dibagi menjadi dua persegi panjang. Persegi panjang atas berukuran $12 \\times 6 = 72\\ m^2$. Persegi panjang bawah (sisi kanan) berukuran $4 \\times (12-6) = 4 \\times 6 = 24\\ m^2$? Tunggu, perhatikan ukuran: sisi atas $12$, sisi kiri tegak $12$. Sisi bawah total $12$. Maka bangun tersebut adalah persegi utuh dengan pojok dipotong, atau dua persegi panjang. Luas total = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "en_q": "Observe the following figure!\nThe combined area of the shape is ... $cm^2$",

      "image": "<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 400 260\" width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n  <defs>\n    <marker id=\"arrow-start\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"8\" refX=\"1\" refY=\"4\" orient=\"auto\">\n      <path d=\"M 8 0 L 0 4 L 8 8 Z\" fill=\"black\" />\n    </marker>\n    <marker id=\"arrow-end\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"8\" refX=\"7\" refY=\"4\" orient=\"auto\">\n      <path d=\"M 0 0 L 8 4 L 0 8 Z\" fill=\"black\" />\n    </marker>\n  </defs>\n  <ellipse cx=\"100\" cy=\"60\" rx=\"70\" ry=\"20\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <line x1=\"30\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"30\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <line x1=\"170\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"170\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 30 180 A 70 20 0 0 0 170 180\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 30 180 A 70 20 0 0 1 170 180\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-dasharray=\"6,4\" />\n  <line x1=\"200\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"200\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" marker-start=\"url(#arrow-start)\" marker-end=\"url(#arrow-end)\" />\n  <text x=\"210\" y=\"120\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"end\" dominant-baseline=\"middle\">15 cm</text>\n  <line x1=\"30\" y1=\"185\" x2=\"30\" y2=\"230\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" />\n  <line x1=\"170\" y1=\"185\" x2=\"170\" y2=\"230\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" />\n  <line x1=\"30\" y1=\"220\" x2=\"170\" y2=\"220\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" marker-start=\"url(#arrow-start)\" marker-end=\"url(#arrow-end)\" />\n  <text x=\"100\" y=\"240\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">20 cm</text>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Surface area of the cube $= 6s^2 = 600$. So $s^2 = 100$ which means the edge length $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah kubus dengan luas permukaan $600\\ cm^2$ memiliki volume sebesar .... $cm^3$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Luas permukaan kubus $= 6s^2 = 600$. Maka $s^2 = 100$ sehingga panjang rusuk $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.",
      "en_q": "A cube with a surface area of $600\\ cm^2$ has a volume of .... $cm^3$",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "512",
        "729",
        "1.000",
        "1.331"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "512",
        "729",
        "1,000",
        "1,331"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 16,
      "en_exp": "The minimum paper area is the surface area of the box (cube) with an edge of $9\\ cm$. Surface area $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "id_q": "Budi ingin membuat kotak dari kertas karton untuk membuat tempat menyimpan mainan rubik. Jika salah satu panjang rusuk rubik adalah $9\\ cm$, maka luas kertas minimal yang harus disiapkan Budi adalah ... $cm^2$",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Luas kertas minimal adalah luas permukaan kotak (kubus) dengan rusuk $9\\ cm$. Luas permukaan $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "en_q": "Budi wants to make a box out of cardboard to store a Rubik's cube. If one of the edge lengths of the Rubik's cube is $9\\ cm$, then the minimum area of paper Budi must prepare is ... $cm^2$",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "324",
        "384",
        "400",
        "486"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "324",
        "384",
        "400",
        "486"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 17,
      "en_exp": "Volume of rectangular prism $= l \\times w \\times h = 40 \\times 20 \\times 15 = 12,000\\ cm^3$.",
      "id_q": "Sebuah balok memiliki ukuran seperti gambar berikut:\nVolume balok tersebut adalah .... $cm^3$",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Volume balok $= p \\times l \\times t = 40 \\times 20 \\times 15 = 12.000\\ cm^3$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "A rectangular prism has dimensions as shown in the following figure:\nThe volume of the rectangular prism is .... $cm^3$",
      "id_options": [
        "12.000",
        "15.000",
        "18.000",
        "20.000"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "12,000",
        "15,000",
        "18,000",
        "20,000"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"350\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .dashed { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-dasharray: 5,5; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(40, 50)\">\n    <!-- Top face -->\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 240,0 L 240,100\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 60,100 L 240,100\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <!-- Front face -->\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"60\" width=\"180\" height=\"100\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <!-- Connecting lines -->\n    <path d=\"M 0,60 L 60,0\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,60 L 240,0\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,160 L 240,100\" class=\"line\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,160 L 60,100\" class=\"dashed\"/>\n    <!-- Labels -->\n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"180\" class=\"text\">40 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"145\" class=\"text\" transform=\"rotate(-35, 215, 145)\">20 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"55\" class=\"text\">15 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "Surface area $= 2 \\times (lw + lh + wh) = 2 \\times ((15 \\times 10) + (15 \\times 5) + (10 \\times 5)) = 2 \\times (150 + 75 + 50) = 2 \\times 275 = 550\\ cm^2$.",
      "id_q": "Luas permukaan balok dengan ukuran panjang $15\\ cm$, lebar $10\\ cm$, dan tinggi $5\\ cm$ adalah ... $cm^2$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Luas permukaan $= 2 \\times (pl + pt + lt) = 2 \\times ((15 \\times 10) + (15 \\times 5) + (10 \\times 5)) = 2 \\times (150 + 75 + 50) = 2 \\times 275 = 550\\ cm^2$.",
      "en_options": [
        "450",
        "500",
        "550",
        "600"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "450",
        "500",
        "550",
        "600"
      ],
      "en_q": "The surface area of a rectangular prism with a length of $15\\ cm$, width of $10\\ cm$, and height of $5\\ cm$ is ... $cm^2$",
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Total weight $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total children $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Average $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",
      "id": 19,
      "id_q": "Hasil penimbangan anak di Posyandu Tunas sebagai berikut:\nRata-rata berat badan berdasarkan tabel di atas adalah .... kg",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Total berat $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total anak $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Rata-rata $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The results of weighing children at the Tunas Posyandu are as follows:\nThe average weight based on the table above is .... kg",
      "id_options": [
        "11",
        "11,5",
        "12",
        "12,5"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "11",
        "11.5",
        "12",
        "12.5"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .header { font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .cell { font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Berat Badan (kg)</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Jumlah Anak</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">10</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">3</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">11</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">12</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">14</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">16</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">1</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "The percentage of students who like MTK is $45\\%$. Number of students $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah diagram mata pelajaran yang digemari siswa kelas VI SD Anugerah. Jika jumlah seluruh siswa adalah 40 anak, maka banyak siswa yang gemar MTK adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Persentase siswa yang gemar MTK adalah $45\\%$. Jumlah siswa $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ siswa.",
      "en_q": "The following is a chart of the favorite subjects of the 6th-grade students of SD Anugerah. If the total number of students is 40, how many students like MTK?",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "10",
        "12",
        "18",
        "20"
      ],
      "en_options": [

        "12",
        "18",
        "20"
      ],
      "image": "<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 300 300\" width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n  <path d=\"M 150 150 L 150 250 A 100 100 0 0 1 50 150 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 150 150 L 50 150 A 100 100 0 0 1 180.90 54.89 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <path d=\"M 150 150 L 180.90 54.89 A 100 100 0 0 1 150 250 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\" />\n  <text x=\"108\" y=\"190\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"bold\" text-anchor=\"middle\">BI</text>\n  <text x=\"108\" y=\"210\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">25%</text>\n  <text x=\"115\" y=\"100\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"bold\" text-anchor=\"middle\">IPA</text>\n  <text x=\"115\" y=\"120\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">30%</text>\n  <text x=\"210\" y=\"145\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" font-weight=\"bold\" text-anchor=\"middle\">MTK</text>\n  <text x=\"210\" y=\"165\" font-family=\"Arial, sans-serif\" font-size=\"14\" text-anchor=\"middle\">45%</text>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 21,
      "en_exp": "Based on the table, the correct data values are: June = 25, July = 40, August = 25, September = 70, and October = 55. By observing the height of the bars in each option, the bar chart that matches these exact values is option A.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan tabel hasil pengolahan pupuk organik di bawah ini!\n\nDiagram batang yang tepat untuk menyajikan data pada tabel tersebut adalah ....",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan tabel pada soal, diperoleh data: Juni = 25, Juli = 40, Agustus = 25, September = 70, dan Oktober = 55. Jika kita mengamati tinggi setiap batang pada pilihan jawaban, diagram batang yang tepat sesuai dengan nilai-nilai tersebut adalah pilihan A.",
      "en_q": "Observe the organic fertilizer processing table below!\n\nThe correct bar chart to present the data from the table is ....",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],

    {
      "id": 22,
      "en_exp": "Convert all to decimals: $0.4 = 0.40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0.60$. $25\\% = 0.25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1.50$. Order from smallest: $0.25\\ ;\\ 0.40\\ ;\\ 0.60\\ ;\\ 1.50$. Or $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "id_q": "$0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nUrutan pecahan berikut dari yang terkecil adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Ubah semua ke bentuk desimal: $0,4 = 0,40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0,60$. $25\\% = 0,25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1,50$. Urutan dari yang terkecil: $0,25\\ ;\\ 0,40\\ ;\\ 0,60\\ ;\\ 1,50$. Atau $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "en_q": "$0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nThe correct order of these fractions from the smallest is ....",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "$0,4\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ 0,4$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "$0.4\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ 0.4$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },

      "id_q": "Hasil dari $3 \\frac{1}{4} \\times 1,6$ adalah ....",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "$3 \\frac{1}{4} \\times 1,6 = \\frac{13}{4} \\times \\frac{16}{10} = \\frac{208}{40} = \\frac{26}{5} = 5 \\frac{1}{5}$.",

    {
      "en_exp": "Total pencils = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Number of yellow pencils = $3$. Probability of drawing a yellow pencil = $3$ out of $10$.",
      "id": 24,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan sekumpulan pensil dengan keterangan warna berikut!\nBerdasarkan keterangan gambar di samping, peluang terambilnya pensil warna kuning adalah ...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total pensil = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Jumlah pensil kuning = $3$. Peluang terambil pensil kuning = $3$ dari $10$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "3 out of 5",
        "3 out of 10",
        "1 out of 10",
        "2 out of 10"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "3 dari 5",
        "3 dari 10",
        "1 dari 10",
        "2 dari 10"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the collection of pencils with the following color descriptions!\nBased on the image description, the probability of drawing a yellow pencil is ...",
      "image": "<svg width=\"500\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .pencil { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; }\n    .text { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; font-weight: bold; }\n    .brace { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <defs>\n    <g id=\"pencil_body\">\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 20,120 0,120 0,20\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 0,20\" fill=\"#f3d5b5\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 13,8 7,8\"/>\n    </g>\n  </defs>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 40)\">\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"0\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"25\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,130 C 0,140 15,140 22.5,150 C 30,140 45,140 45,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"22.5\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">biru</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"80\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"105\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"130\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 80,130 C 80,140 95,140 105,150 C 115,140 130,140 130,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"105\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">kuning</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"170\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"195\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"220\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"245\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"270\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 170,130 C 170,140 205,140 230,150 C 255,140 290,140 290,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"230\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">merah</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "The sold strawberries ($1\\ kg$) are far less than the other fruits. The probability is very small but it still happens, so the scale is 'unlikely'.",
      "id": 25,
      "id_q": "Bu Widya berjualan buah-buahan di pasar. Buah-buahan yang laku terjual yaitu $1\\ kg$ buah stroberi, $15\\ kg$ buah apel, $15\\ kg$ buah jeruk, dan $25\\ kg$ buah mangga. Skala peluang terjualnya buah stroberi yaitu ...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Buah stroberi yang terjual ($1\\ kg$) jauh lebih sedikit dibandingkan buah lainnya. Peluangnya sangat kecil tetapi masih mungkin terjadi, sehingga berskala 'kurang mungkin'.",
      "en_options": [
        "likely",
        "very likely",
        "unlikely",
        "impossible"
      ],
      "en_q": "Mrs. Widya sells fruits at the market. The fruits sold are $1\\ kg$ of strawberries, $15\\ kg$ of apples, $15\\ kg$ of oranges, and $25\\ kg$ of mangoes. The probability scale of strawberries being sold is ...",
      "id_options": [
        "mungkin",
        "sangat mungkin",
        "kurang mungkin",
        "tidak mungkin"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",

        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },

      "en_exp": "Volume of a cube $= s^3 = 32,768$. Edge length $s = \\sqrt[3]{32,768} = 32\\ cm$ (because $32 \\times 32 \\times 32 = 32,768$).",
      "id_q": "Sebuah bak air berbentuk kubus diisi air sampai penuh sehingga volume air dalam bak tersebut adalah $32.768\\ cm^3$. Panjang rusuk bak tersebut adalah....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume kubus $= s^3 = 32.768$. Panjang rusuk $s = \\sqrt[3]{32.768} = 32\\ cm$ (karena $32 \\times 32 \\times 32 = 32.768$).",

    {
      "en_exp": "Discount = $15\\% \\times 300,000 = 45,000$. Price to pay = $300,000 - 45,000 = Rp\\ 255,000.00$.",
      "id": 29,
      "id_q": "Citra Bersama dengan Ibunya pergi ke Toko Sepatu Berkah untuk membeli sepasang sepatu. Saat tiba di toko, Citra melihat ada sepatu yang sangat ia inginkan. Pada label harga tertera $Rp\\ 300.000,00$. Penjaga toko mengatakan bahwa hari itu toko sedang mengadakan diskon menjelang Ramadhan. Diskon yang diberikan sebesar $15\\%$. Berapa Citra dan Ibunya harus membayar sepatu tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Diskon = $15\\% \\times 300.000 = 45.000$. Harga yang harus dibayar = $300.000 - 45.000 = Rp\\ 255.000,00$.",
      "en_options": [
        "Rp 245,000.00",
        "Rp 250,000.00",
        "Rp 255,000.00",
        "Rp 260,000.00"
      ],
      "en_q": "Citra together with her mother went to Berkah Shoe Store to buy a pair of shoes. Upon arriving at the store, Citra saw shoes she really wanted. The price tag showed $Rp\\ 300,000.00$. The shopkeeper said that that day the store was having a pre-Ramadan discount. The discount given was $15\\%$. How much do Citra and her mother have to pay for the shoes?",
      "id_options": [
        "Rp 245.000,00",
        "Rp 250.000,00",
        "Rp 255.000,00",
        "Rp 260.000,00"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "Female population = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1,440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1,440 = 840$ people.",
      "id": 30,
      "id_q": "Jumlah keseluruhan penduduk desa Sugih Waras adalah $1.440$ orang. Apabila perbandingan banyak penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan adalah $5 : 7$, maka hitunglah banyak penduduk perempuan yang ada di desa tersebut!",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Penduduk perempuan = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1.440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1.440 = 840$ jiwa.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The total population of Sugih Waras village is $1,440$ people. If the ratio of the number of male to female population is $5 : 7$, calculate the number of female population in the village!",
      "id_options": [
        "600 orang",
        "720 orang",
        "840 orang",
        "960 orang"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "600 people",
        "720 people",
        "840 people",
        "960 people"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 31,
      "en_exp": "Total harvest = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9.8$ tons.",
      "id_q": "Pak Joko memiliki tanah dengan luas $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hektar. Tanah tersebut ditanami kedelai. Jika setiap hektarnya mampu menghasilkan $\\frac{14}{5}$ ton kedelai, maka hitunglah berapa ton jumlah panen kedelai seluruhnya!",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total panen = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9,8$ ton atau $9 \\frac{4}{5}$ ton.",
      "en_q": "Mr. Joko has land with an area of $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hectares. The land is planted with soybeans. If each hectare can produce $\\frac{14}{5}$ tons of soybeans, calculate how many tons the total soybean harvest is!",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "8,8 ton",
        "9,8 ton",
        "10,8 ton",
        "12,8 ton"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "8.8 tons",
        "9.8 tons",
        "10.8 tons",
        "12.8 tons"

      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "The combined volume is the sum of the volume of the cube and the volume of the rectangular prism.\n1. Volume of the Cube = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume of the Prism = $l \\times w \\times h = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Combined Volume = $1,000 + 750 = 1,750\\ cm^3$.",
      "id": 32,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gabungan bangun ruang berikut ini!\nBangun tersebut terdiri dari kubus dengan panjang rusuk 10 cm dan balok yang menempel di sebelah kanannya dengan ukuran panjang 15 cm, lebar 10 cm, dan tinggi 5 cm. Berapakah volume gabungan bangun ruang tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume bangun gabungan tersebut adalah jumlah dari volume kubus dan volume balok.\n1. Volume Kubus = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume Balok = $p \\times l \\times t = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Volume Gabungan = $1.000 + 750 = 1.750\\ cm^3$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the following composite 3D shape!\nThe shape consists of a cube with an edge of 10 cm and a rectangular prism attached to its right side with a length of 15 cm, width of 10 cm, and height of 5 cm. What is the combined volume of the 3D shape?",
      "id_options": [
        "1.550 cm\u00b3",
        "1.650 cm\u00b3",
        "1.750 cm\u00b3",
        "1.850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "1,550 cm\u00b3",
        "1,650 cm\u00b3",
        "1,750 cm\u00b3",
        "1,850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .fill-shape { fill: #f9f9f9; stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <!-- Kubus -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,180 L 120,180 L 120,110 L 50,110 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,110 L 80,80 L 150,80 L 120,110 Z\"/>\n    <!-- Sisi kanan kubus tertutup balok, tapi garis ini penting -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,110 L 150,80 L 150,115 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Balok -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,180 L 220,180 L 220,145 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,145 L 150,115 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 220,180 L 250,150 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Label -->\n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"170\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">15 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"25\" y=\"150\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">5 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"105\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 33,
      "en_exp": "Based on the presented data, the scores and the number of students receiving them (frequency) are: Score 50 is 2 students, Score 60 is 3 students, Score 70 is 5 students, Score 80 is 4 students, Score 90 is 3 students, and Score 100 is 3 students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nBentuk tabel frekuensi yang benar dari data di atas adalah ....",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan data yang disajikan, urutan dan jumlah siswa yang mendapatkannya (frekuensi) adalah: Nilai 50 ada 2 siswa, Nilai 60 ada 3 siswa, Nilai 70 ada 5 siswa, Nilai 80 ada 4 siswa, Nilai 90 ada 3 siswa, dan Nilai 100 ada 3 siswa.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The following is the math score data of 20 6th-grade students of SD Muara Tanjung:\nThe correct frequency table form of the data above is ....",
