      "image": "<svg width=\"350\" height=\"200\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .cell { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(25, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"300\" height=\"160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,40 L 300,40\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,80 L 300,80\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,120 L 300,120\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 60,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 120,0 L 120,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,0 L 180,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 240,0 L 240,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">90</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">80</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 34,
      "en_exp": "Average = $((50 \\times 2) + (60 \\times 3) + (70 \\times 5) + (80 \\times 4) + (90 \\times 3) + (100 \\times 3)) / 20 = 1,520 / 20 = 76$.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nRata-rata nilai matematika dari data tersebut adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Rata-rata = $((50 \\times 2) + (60 \\times 3) + (70 \\times 5) + (80 \\times 4) + (90 \\times 3) + (100 \\times 3)) / 20 = 1.520 / 20 = 76$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",

    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "Ratio difference = $8 - 3 = 5$. Talita's money = $\\frac{8}{5} \\times 25,000 = 40,000$. (Alternatively, using Tina's money: $\\frac{8}{3} \\times 15,000 = 40,000$).",
      "id_q": "Uang Tina : uang Talita = $3 : 8$. Selisih uang mereka $Rp\\ 25.000,00$. Jika uang Tina $Rp\\ 15.000,00$, maka uang Talita adalah ....",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Selisih angka perbandingan = $8 - 3 = 5$. Uang Talita = $\\frac{8}{5} \\times 25.000 = 40.000$. (Atau menggunakan uang Tina: $\\frac{8}{3} \\times 15.000 = 40.000$).",
      "en_options": [
        "Rp 30,000.00",
        "Rp 40,000.00",
        "Rp 45,000.00",
        "Rp 50,000.00"
      ],

    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "The composite shape can be seen as composed of two rectangles. Total area = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gambar berikut!\nLuas gabungan bangun tersebut adalah ... $m^2$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Bangun gabungan dapat dibagi menjadi dua persegi panjang. Persegi panjang atas berukuran $12 \\times 6 = 72\\ m^2$. Persegi panjang bawah (sisi kanan) berukuran $4 \\times (12-6) = 4 \\times 6 = 24\\ m^2$? Tunggu, perhatikan ukuran: sisi atas $12$, sisi kiri tegak $12$. Sisi bawah total $12$. Maka bangun tersebut adalah persegi utuh dengan pojok dipotong, atau dua persegi panjang. Luas total = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "en_q": "Observe the following figure!\nThe combined area of the shape is ... $cm^2$",

      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Surface area of the cube $= 6s^2 = 600$. So $s^2 = 100$ which means the edge length $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.",

      "id_exp": "Luas permukaan kubus $= 6s^2 = 600$. Maka $s^2 = 100$ sehingga panjang rusuk $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.",

      "en_exp": "The minimum paper area is the surface area of the box (cube) with an edge of $9\\ cm$. Surface area $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "id_q": "Budi ingin membuat kotak dari kertas karton untuk membuat tempat menyimpan mainan rubik. Jika salah satu panjang rusuk rubik adalah $9\\ cm$, maka luas kertas minimal yang harus disiapkan Budi adalah ... $cm^2$",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Luas kertas minimal adalah luas permukaan kotak (kubus) dengan rusuk $9\\ cm$. Luas permukaan $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "en_q": "Budi wants to make a box out of cardboard to store a Rubik's cube. If one of the edge lengths of the Rubik's cube is $9\\ cm$, then the minimum area of paper Budi must prepare is ... $cm^2$",

    {
      "en_exp": "Total weight $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total children $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Average $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",
      "id": 19,
      "id_q": "Hasil penimbangan anak di Posyandu Tunas sebagai berikut:\nRata-rata berat badan berdasarkan tabel di atas adalah .... kg",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Total berat $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total anak $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Rata-rata $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The results of weighing children at the Tunas Posyandu are as follows:\nThe average weight based on the table above is .... kg",
      "id_options": [
        "11",
        "11,5",
        "12",
        "12,5"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "11",
        "11.5",
        "12",
        "12.5"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .header { font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .cell { font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Berat Badan (kg)</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Jumlah Anak</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">10</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">3</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">11</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">12</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">14</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">16</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">1</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "The percentage of students who like MTK is $45\\%$. Number of students $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah diagram mata pelajaran yang digemari siswa kelas VI SD Anugerah. Jika jumlah seluruh siswa adalah 40 anak, maka banyak siswa yang gemar MTK adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Persentase siswa yang gemar MTK adalah $45\\%$. Jumlah siswa $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ siswa.",
      "en_q": "The following is a chart of the favorite subjects of the 6th-grade students of SD Anugerah. If the total number of students is 40, how many students like MTK?",

    {
      "id": 22,
      "en_exp": "Convert all to decimals: $0.4 = 0.40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0.60$. $25\\% = 0.25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1.50$. Order from smallest: $0.25\\ ;\\ 0.40\\ ;\\ 0.60\\ ;\\ 1.50$. Or $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "id_q": "$0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nUrutan pecahan berikut dari yang terkecil adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Ubah semua ke bentuk desimal: $0,4 = 0,40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0,60$. $25\\% = 0,25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1,50$. Urutan dari yang terkecil: $0,25\\ ;\\ 0,40\\ ;\\ 0,60\\ ;\\ 1,50$. Atau $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "en_q": "$0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nThe correct order of these fractions from the smallest is ....",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "$0,4\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ 0,4$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$"
      ],
      "en_options": [

    {
      "en_exp": "Total pencils = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Number of yellow pencils = $3$. Probability of drawing a yellow pencil = $3$ out of $10$.",
      "id": 24,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan sekumpulan pensil dengan keterangan warna berikut!\nBerdasarkan keterangan gambar di samping, peluang terambilnya pensil warna kuning adalah ...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total pensil = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Jumlah pensil kuning = $3$. Peluang terambil pensil kuning = $3$ dari $10$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "3 out of 5",
        "3 out of 10",
        "1 out of 10",
        "2 out of 10"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "3 dari 5",
        "3 dari 10",
        "1 dari 10",
        "2 dari 10"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the collection of pencils with the following color descriptions!\nBased on the image description, the probability of drawing a yellow pencil is ...",
      "image": "<svg width=\"500\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .pencil { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; }\n    .text { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; font-weight: bold; }\n    .brace { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <defs>\n    <g id=\"pencil_body\">\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 20,120 0,120 0,20\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 0,20\" fill=\"#f3d5b5\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 13,8 7,8\"/>\n    </g>\n  </defs>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 40)\">\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"0\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"25\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,130 C 0,140 15,140 22.5,150 C 30,140 45,140 45,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"22.5\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">biru</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"80\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"105\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"130\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 80,130 C 80,140 95,140 105,150 C 115,140 130,140 130,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"105\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">kuning</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"170\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"195\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"220\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"245\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"270\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 170,130 C 170,140 205,140 230,150 C 255,140 290,140 290,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"230\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">merah</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },

      "ans": 2,

      "id_q": "Sebuah bak air berbentuk kubus diisi air sampai penuh sehingga volume air dalam bak tersebut adalah $32.768\\ cm^3$. Panjang rusuk bak tersebut adalah....",

      "en_exp": "Discount = $15\\% \\times 300,000 = 45,000$. Price to pay = $300,000 - 45,000 = Rp\\ 255,000.00$.",
      "id": 29,
      "id_q": "Citra Bersama dengan Ibunya pergi ke Toko Sepatu Berkah untuk membeli sepasang sepatu. Saat tiba di toko, Citra melihat ada sepatu yang sangat ia inginkan. Pada label harga tertera $Rp\\ 300.000,00$. Penjaga toko mengatakan bahwa hari itu toko sedang mengadakan diskon menjelang Ramadhan. Diskon yang diberikan sebesar $15\\%$. Berapa Citra dan Ibunya harus membayar sepatu tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Diskon = $15\\% \\times 300.000 = 45.000$. Harga yang harus dibayar = $300.000 - 45.000 = Rp\\ 255.000,00$.",

        "Rp 255,000.00",
        "Rp 260,000.00"

      "en_q": "Citra together with her mother went to Berkah Shoe Store to buy a pair of shoes. Upon arriving at the store, Citra saw shoes she really wanted. The price tag showed $Rp\\ 300,000.00$.       "en_exp": "Female population = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1,440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1,440 = 840$ people.",
      "id": 30,
      "id_q": "Jumlah keseluruhan penduduk desa Sugih Waras adalah $1.440$ orang. Apabila perbandingan banyak penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan adalah $5 : 7$, maka hitunglah banyak penduduk perempuan yang ada di desa tersebut!",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Penduduk perempuan = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1.440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1.440 = 840$ jiwa.",

      "id": 31,
      "en_exp": "Total harvest = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9.8$ tons.",
      "id_q": "Pak Joko memiliki tanah dengan luas $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hektar. Tanah tersebut ditanami kedelai. Jika setiap hektarnya mampu menghasilkan $\\frac{14}{5}$ ton kedelai, maka hitunglah berapa ton jumlah panen kedelai seluruhnya!",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total panen = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9,8$ ton atau $9 \\frac{4}{5}$ ton.",
      "en_q": "Mr. Joko has land with an area of $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hectares. The land is planted with soybeans. If each hectare can produce $\\frac{14}{5}$ tons of soybeans, calculate how many tons the total soybean harvest is!",

    {
      "en_exp": "The combined volume is the sum of the volume of the cube and the volume of the rectangular prism.\n1. Volume of the Cube = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume of the Prism = $l \\times w \\times h = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Combined Volume = $1,000 + 750 = 1,750\\ cm^3$.",
      "id": 32,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gabungan bangun ruang berikut ini!\nBangun tersebut terdiri dari kubus dengan panjang rusuk 10 cm dan balok yang menempel di sebelah kanannya dengan ukuran panjang 15 cm, lebar 10 cm, dan tinggi 5 cm. Berapakah volume gabungan bangun ruang tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume bangun gabungan tersebut adalah jumlah dari volume kubus dan volume balok.\n1. Volume Kubus = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume Balok = $p \\times l \\times t = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Volume Gabungan = $1.000 + 750 = 1.750\\ cm^3$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the following composite 3D shape!\nThe shape consists of a cube with an edge of 10 cm and a rectangular prism attached to its right side with a length of 15 cm, width of 10 cm, and height of 5 cm. What is the combined volume of the 3D shape?",
      "id_options": [
        "1.550 cm\u00b3",
        "1.650 cm\u00b3",
        "1.750 cm\u00b3",
        "1.850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "1,550 cm\u00b3",
        "1,650 cm\u00b3",
        "1,750 cm\u00b3",
        "1,850 cm\u00b3"

      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .fill-shape { fill: #f9f9f9; stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <!-- Kubus -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,180 L 120,180 L 120,110 L 50,110 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,110 L 80,80 L 150,80 L 120,110 Z\"/>\n    <!-- Sisi kanan kubus tertutup balok, tapi garis ini penting -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,110 L 150,80 L 150,115 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Balok -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,180 L 220,180 L 220,145 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,145 L 150,115 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 220,180 L 250,150 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Label -->\n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"170\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">15 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"25\" y=\"150\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">5 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"105\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 33,
      "en_exp": "Based on the presented data, the scores and the number of students receiving them (frequency) are: Score 50 is 2 students, Score 60 is 3 students, Score 70 is 5 students, Score 80 is 4 students, Score 90 is 3 students, and Score 100 is 3 students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nBentuk tabel frekuensi yang benar dari data di atas adalah ....",

      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan data yang disajikan, urutan dan jumlah siswa yang mendapatkannya (frekuensi) adalah: Nilai 50 ada 2 siswa, Nilai 60 ada 3 siswa, Nilai 70 ada 5 siswa, Nilai 80 ada 4 siswa, Nilai 90 ada 3 siswa, dan Nilai 100 ada 3 siswa.",

      "image": "<svg width=\"350\" height=\"200\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .cell { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(25, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"300\" height=\"160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,40 L 300,40\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,80 L 300,80\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,120 L 300,120\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 60,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 120,0 L 120,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,0 L 180,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 240,0 L 240,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">90</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">80</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 34,
      "en_exp": "Average = $((50 \\times 2) + (60 \\times 3) + (70 \\times 5) + (80 \\times 4) + (90 \\times 3) + (100 \\times 3)) / 20 = 1,520 / 20 = 76$.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nRata-rata nilai matematika dari data tersebut adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Rata-rata = $((50 \\times 2) + (60 \\times 3) + (70 \\times 5) + (80 \\times 4) + (90 \\times 3) + (100 \\times 3)) / 20 = 1.520 / 20 = 76$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The following is the math score data of 20 6th-grade students of SD Muara Tanjung:\nThe average math score from the data is ....",
      "id_options": [

        "75",
        "76",
        "77"
      ],
      "en_options": [

      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"350\" height=\"200\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .cell { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(25, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"300\" height=\"160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,40 L 300,40\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,80 L 300,80\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,120 L 300,120\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 60,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 120,0 L 120,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,0 L 180,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 240,0 L 240,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">90</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">80</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"

    {
      "id": 35,
      "en_exp": "The mode is the value that appears most frequently. Based on the data, the score 80 appears the most, which is 6 times.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nModus dari data nilai matematika tersebut adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Modus adalah nilai yang paling sering muncul. Berdasarkan data, nilai 80 muncul paling banyak yaitu 6 kali.",

      "options": [

    {

      "id": 11,
      "id_q": "Uang Tina : uang Talita = $4 : 7$. Selisih uang mereka $Rp\\ 15.000,00$. Jika uang Tina $Rp\\ 20.000,00$, maka uang Talita adalah ....",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Selisih angka perbandingan = $7 - 4 = 3$. Uang Talita = $\\frac{7}{3} \\times 15.000 = 35.000$. (Atau menggunakan uang Tina: $\\frac{7}{4} \\times 20.000 = 35.000$).",
      "en_q": "Tina's money : Talita's money = $4 : 7$. The difference in their money is $Rp\\ 15,000.00$. If Tina's money is $Rp\\ 20,000.00$, then Talita's money is ....",

      "en_exp": "Total weight $= (12 \\times 3) + (13 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 2) + (18 \\times 1) = 36 + 26 + 28 + 32 + 18 = 140\\ kg$. Total children $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Average $= 140 : 10 = 14\\ kg$.",

      "en_exp": "Based on the table, the correct data values are: June = 25, July = 45, August = 80, September = 35, and October = 65. By observing the height of the bars in each option, the bar chart that matches these exact values is option C.",

      "id_q": "Perhatikan tabel hasil pengolahan pupuk organik di bawah ini!\n\nDiagram batang yang tepat untuk menyajikan data pada tabel tersebut adalah ....",

      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan tabel pada soal, diperoleh data: Juni = 25, Juli = 45, Agustus = 80, September = 35, dan Oktober = 65. Jika kita mengamati tinggi setiap batang pada pilihan jawaban, diagram batang yang tepat sesuai dengan nilai-nilai tersebut adalah pilihan C.",

    {
      "id": 24,
      "en_exp": "Convert all to decimals: $0.3 = 0.30$. $\\frac{2}{5} = 0.40$. $15\\% = 0.15$. $1 \\frac{1}{4} = 1.25$. Order from smallest: $0.15\\ ;\\ 0.30\\ ;\\ 0.40\\ ;\\ 1.25$. Or $15\\%\\ ;\\ 0.3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$.",
      "id_q": "$0,3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$\nUrutan pecahan berikut dari yang terkecil adalah ....",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Ubah semua ke bentuk desimal: $0,3 = 0,30$. $\\frac{2}{5} = 0,40$. $15\\% = 0,15$. $1 \\frac{1}{4} = 1,25$. Urutan dari yang terkecil: $0,15\\ ;\\ 0,30\\ ;\\ 0,40\\ ;\\ 1,25$. Atau $15\\%\\ ;\\ 0,3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$.",
      "en_options": [
        "$0.3\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}\\ ;\\ 0.3$",
        "$0.3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$",
        "$15\\%\\ ;\\ 0.3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "$0,3\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}\\ ;\\ 0,3$",
        "$0,3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$",
        "$15\\%\\ ;\\ 0,3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$"
      ],
      "en_q": "$0.3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$\nThe correct order of these fractions from the smallest is ....",
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "$2 \\frac{2}{5} \\times 1.5 = \\frac{12}{5} \\times \\frac{15}{10} = \\frac{180}{50} = \\frac{18}{5} = 3 \\frac{3}{5}$.",

      "id_q": "Hasil dari $2 \\frac{2}{5} \\times 1,5$ adalah ....",

    {
      "en_exp": "Total pencils = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Number of blue pencils = $2$. Probability of drawing a blue pencil = $2$ out of $10$.",
      "id": 26,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan sekumpulan pensil dengan keterangan warna berikut!\nBerdasarkan keterangan gambar di samping, peluang terambilnya pensil warna biru adalah ...",
      "ans": 3,

      "en_q": "Observe the collection of pencils with the following color descriptions!\nBased on the image description, the probability of drawing a blue pencil is ...",

      "image": "<svg width=\"500\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .pencil { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; }\n    .text { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; font-weight: bold; }\n    .brace { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <defs>\n    <g id=\"pencil_body\">\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 20,120 0,120 0,20\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 0,20\" fill=\"#f3d5b5\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 13,8 7,8\"/>\n    </g>\n  </defs>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 40)\">\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"0\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"25\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,130 C 0,140 15,140 22.5,150 C 30,140 45,140 45,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"22.5\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">biru</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"80\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"105\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"130\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 80,130 C 80,140 95,140 105,150 C 115,140 130,140 130,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"105\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">kuning</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"170\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"195\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"220\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"245\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"270\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 170,130 C 170,140 205,140 230,150 C 255,140 290,140 290,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"230\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">merah</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"

    {
      "en_exp": "The sold pineapples ($2\\ kg$) are far less than the other fruits. The probability is small but it still happens, so the scale is 'unlikely'.",

      "id_q": "Bu Widya berjualan buah-buahan di pasar. Buah-buahan yang laku terjual yaitu $2\\ kg$ buah nanas, $10\\ kg$ buah apel, $10\\ kg$ buah jeruk, dan $20\\ kg$ buah mangga. Skala peluang terjualnya buah nanas yaitu ...",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Buah nanas yang terjual ($2\\ kg$) jauh lebih sedikit dibandingkan buah lainnya. Peluangnya kecil tetapi masih terjadi, sehingga berskala 'kurang mungkin'.",

    {
      "en_exp": "Volume of a cube $= s^3 = 54,872$. Edge length $s = \\sqrt[3]{54,872} = 38\\ cm$ (because $38 \\times 38 \\times 38 = 54,872$).",
      "id": 30,
      "id_q": "Sebuah bak air berbentuk kubus diisi air sampai penuh sehingga volume air dalam bak tersebut adalah $54.872\\ cm^3$. Panjang rusuk bak tersebut adalah....",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Volume kubus $= s^3 = 54.872$. Panjang rusuk $s = \\sqrt[3]{54.872} = 38\\ cm$ (karena $38 \\times 38 \\times 38 = 54.872$).",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "A cube-shaped water tank is filled with water to the brim so that the volume of water in the tank is $54,872\\ cm^3$. The edge length of the tank is....",

        "32 cm",
        "38 cm"

      "en_options": [

    {
      "en_exp": "Discount = $20\\% \\times 250,000 = 50,000$. Price to pay = $250,000 - 50,000 = Rp\\ 200,000.00$.",
      "id": 31,
      "id_q": "Citra Bersama dengan Ibunya pergi ke Toko Sepatu Berkah untuk membeli sepasang sepatu. Saat tiba di toko, Citra melihat ada sepatu yang sangat ia inginkan. Pada label harga tertera $Rp\\ 250.000,00$. Penjaga toko mengatakan bahwa hari itu toko sedang mengadakan diskon menjelang Ramadhan. Diskon yang diberikan sebesar $20\\%$. Berapa Citra dan Ibunya harus membayar sepatu tersebut?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Diskon = $20\\% \\times 250.000 = 50.000$. Harga yang harus dibayar = $250.000 - 50.000 = Rp\\ 200.000,00$.",
      "en_q": "Citra together with her mother went to Berkah Shoe Store to buy a pair of shoes. Upon arriving at the store, Citra saw shoes she really wanted. The price tag showed $Rp\\ 250,000.00$. The shopkeeper said that that day the store was having a pre-Ramadan discount. The discount given was $20\\%$. How much do Citra and her mother have to pay for the shoes?",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "Rp 200.000,00",
        "Rp 210.000,00",
        "Rp 230.000,00",
        "Rp 250.000,00"
      ],
      "en_options": [

        "Rp 230,000.00",

      "id": 32,
      "en_exp": "Female population = $\\frac{9}{7 + 9} \\times 1,200 = \\frac{9}{16} \\times 1,200 = 675$ people.",
      "id_q": "Jumlah keseluruhan penduduk desa Sugih Waras adalah $1.200$ orang. Apabila perbandingan banyak penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan adalah $7 : 9$, maka hitunglah banyak penduduk perempuan yang ada di desa tersebut!",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Penduduk perempuan = $\\frac{9}{7 + 9} \\times 1.200 = \\frac{9}{16} \\times 1.200 = 675$ jiwa.",
      "en_options": [
        "675 people",
        "525 people",
        "700 people",
        "600 people"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "675 orang",
        "525 orang",
        "700 orang",
        "600 orang"
      ],
      "en_q": "The total population of Sugih Waras village is $1,200$ people. If the ratio of the number of male to female population is $7 : 9$, calculate the number of female population in the village!",
      "image": ""

    {
      "en_exp": "Total harvest = $2 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{16}{5} = \\frac{5}{2} \\times \\frac{16}{5} = \\frac{80}{10} = 8$ tons.",
      "id": 33,
      "id_q": "Pak Joko memiliki tanah dengan luas $2 \\frac{1}{2}$ hektar. Tanah tersebut ditanami kedelai. Jika setiap hektarnya mampu menghasilkan $\\frac{16}{5}$ ton kedelai, maka hitunglah berapa ton jumlah panen kedelai seluruhnya!",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Total panen = $2 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{16}{5} = \\frac{5}{2} \\times \\frac{16}{5} = \\frac{80}{10} = 8$ ton.",
      "en_q": "Mr. Joko has land with an area of $2 \\frac{1}{2}$ hectares. The land is planted with soybeans. If each hectare can produce $\\frac{16}{5}$ tons of soybeans, calculate how many tons the total soybean harvest is!",
      "options": [

        "B",
        "C",
        "D"

      "image": ""

    {
      "en_exp": "The combined volume is the sum of the volume of the cube and the volume of the rectangular prism.\n1. Volume of the Cube = $s \times s \times s = 14 \times 14 \times 14 = 2,744\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume of the Prism = $l \times w \times h = 20 \times 14 \times 7 = 1,960\\ cm^3$.\n3. Combined Volume = $2,744 + 1,960 = 4,704\\ cm^3$.",
      "id": 34,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gabungan bangun ruang berikut ini!\nBangun tersebut terdiri dari kubus dengan panjang rusuk 14 cm dan balok yang menempel di sebelah kanannya dengan ukuran panjang 20 cm, lebar 14 cm, dan tinggi 7 cm. Berapakah volume gabungan bangun ruang tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume bangun gabungan tersebut adalah jumlah dari volume kubus dan volume balok.\n1. Volume Kubus = $s \times s \times s = 14 \times 14 \times 14 = 2.744\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume Balok = $p \times l \times t = 20 \times 14 \times 7 = 1.960\\ cm^3$.\n3. Volume Gabungan = $2.744 + 1.960 = 4.704\\ cm^3$.",
      "en_options": [
        "4,504 cm\u00b3",
        "4,604 cm\u00b3",
        "4,704 cm\u00b3",
        "4,804 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the following composite 3D shape!\nThe shape consists of a cube with an edge of 14 cm and a rectangular prism attached to its right side with a length of 20 cm, width of 14 cm, and height of 7 cm. What is the combined volume of the 3D shape?",
      "id_options": [
        "4.504 cm\u00b3",
        "4.604 cm\u00b3",
        "4.704 cm\u00b3",
        "4.804 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .fill-shape { fill: #f9f9f9; stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    \n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,180 L 120,180 L 120,110 L 50,110 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,110 L 80,80 L 150,80 L 120,110 Z\"/>\n    \n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,110 L 150,80 L 150,115 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    \n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,180 L 220,180 L 220,145 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,145 L 150,115 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 220,180 L 250,150 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    \n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">14 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"170\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">20 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"25\" y=\"150\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">14 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">7 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"105\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">14 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"

    {
      "id": 352,

      "id_exp": "$15,50 - 9,25 = 6,25$. Kemudian $6,25 + 0,25 = 6,50$.",

    {
      "id": 11,
      "en_exp": "Ratio difference = $8 - 3 = 5$. Talita's money = $\\frac{8}{5} \\times 25,000 = 40,000$. (Alternatively, using Tina's money: $\\frac{8}{3} \\times 15,000 = 40,000$).",
      "id_q": "Uang Tina : uang Talita = $3 : 8$. Selisih uang mereka $Rp\\ 25.000,00$. Jika uang Tina $Rp\\ 15.000,00$, maka uang Talita adalah ....",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Selisih angka perbandingan = $8 - 3 = 5$. Uang Talita = $\\frac{8}{5} \\times 25.000 = 40.000$. (Atau menggunakan uang Tina: $\\frac{8}{3} \\times 15.000 = 40.000$).",
      "en_options": [
        "Rp 30,000.00",
        "Rp 40,000.00",
        "Rp 45,000.00",
        "Rp 50,000.00"
      ],
      "en_q": "Tina's money : Talita's money = $3 : 8$. The difference in their money is $Rp\\ 25,000.00$. If Tina's money is $Rp\\ 15,000.00$, then Talita's money is ....",

      ],
      "options": [

    {
      "id": 12,
      "en_exp": "The composite shape can be seen as composed of two rectangles. Total area = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gambar berikut!\nLuas gabungan bangun tersebut adalah ... $m^2$",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Bangun gabungan dapat dibagi menjadi dua persegi panjang. Persegi panjang atas berukuran $12 \\times 6 = 72\\ m^2$. Persegi panjang bawah (sisi kanan) berukuran $4 \\times (12-6) = 4 \\times 6 = 24\\ m^2$? Tunggu, perhatikan ukuran: sisi atas $12$, sisi kiri tegak $12$. Sisi bawah total $12$. Maka bangun tersebut adalah persegi utuh dengan pojok dipotong, atau dua persegi panjang. Luas total = $(12 \\times 4) + (6 \\times 6) = 48 + 36 = 84\\ m^2$.",
      "en_q": "Observe the following figure!\nThe combined area of the shape is ... $cm^2$",

      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Surface area of the cube $= 6s^2 = 600$. So $s^2 = 100$ which means the edge length $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.",

      "id_exp": "Luas permukaan kubus $= 6s^2 = 600$. Maka $s^2 = 100$ sehingga panjang rusuk $s = 10\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 10^3 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.",

      "en_exp": "The minimum paper area is the surface area of the box (cube) with an edge of $9\\ cm$. Surface area $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "id_q": "Budi ingin membuat kotak dari kertas karton untuk membuat tempat menyimpan mainan rubik. Jika salah satu panjang rusuk rubik adalah $9\\ cm$, maka luas kertas minimal yang harus disiapkan Budi adalah ... $cm^2$",
      "ans": 3,
      "id_exp": "Luas kertas minimal adalah luas permukaan kotak (kubus) dengan rusuk $9\\ cm$. Luas permukaan $= 6 \\times s^2 = 6 \\times 9^2 = 6 \\times 81 = 486\\ cm^2$.",
      "en_q": "Budi wants to make a box out of cardboard to store a Rubik's cube. If one of the edge lengths of the Rubik's cube is $9\\ cm$, then the minimum area of paper Budi must prepare is ... $cm^2$",

    {
      "en_exp": "Total weight $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total children $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Average $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",
      "id": 19,
      "id_q": "Hasil penimbangan anak di Posyandu Tunas sebagai berikut:\nRata-rata berat badan berdasarkan tabel di atas adalah .... kg",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Total berat $= (10 \\times 3) + (11 \\times 2) + (12 \\times 2) + (14 \\times 2) + (16 \\times 1) = 30 + 22 + 24 + 28 + 16 = 120\\ kg$. Total anak $= 3+2+2+2+1 = 10$. Rata-rata $= 120 : 10 = 12\\ kg$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The results of weighing children at the Tunas Posyandu are as follows:\nThe average weight based on the table above is .... kg",
      "id_options": [
        "11",
        "11,5",
        "12",
        "12,5"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "11",
        "11.5",
        "12",
        "12.5"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .header { font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .cell { font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Berat Badan (kg)</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"0\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\" fill=\"#e0e0e0\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"20\" class=\"header\">Jumlah Anak</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">10</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"30\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"50\" class=\"cell\">3</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">11</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"60\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"80\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">12</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"90\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"110\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">14</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"120\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"140\" class=\"cell\">2</text>\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"75\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">16</text>\n    <rect x=\"150\" y=\"150\" width=\"150\" height=\"30\" class=\"border\"/><text x=\"225\" y=\"170\" class=\"cell\">1</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "The percentage of students who like MTK is $45\\%$. Number of students $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah diagram mata pelajaran yang digemari siswa kelas VI SD Anugerah. Jika jumlah seluruh siswa adalah 40 anak, maka banyak siswa yang gemar MTK adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Persentase siswa yang gemar MTK adalah $45\\%$. Jumlah siswa $= 45\\% \\times 40 = \\frac{45}{100} \\times 40 = 18$ siswa.",
      "en_q": "The following is a chart of the favorite subjects of the 6th-grade students of SD Anugerah. If the total number of students is 40, how many students like MTK?",
      "options": [

    {
      "id": 22,
      "en_exp": "Convert all to decimals: $0.4 = 0.40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0.60$. $25\\% = 0.25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1.50$. Order from smallest: $0.25\\ ;\\ 0.40\\ ;\\ 0.60\\ ;\\ 1.50$. Or $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "id_q": "$0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nUrutan pecahan berikut dari yang terkecil adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Ubah semua ke bentuk desimal: $0,4 = 0,40$. $\\frac{3}{5} = 0,60$. $25\\% = 0,25$. $1 \\frac{1}{2} = 1,50$. Urutan dari yang terkecil: $0,25\\ ;\\ 0,40\\ ;\\ 0,60\\ ;\\ 1,50$. Atau $25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$.",
      "en_q": "$0.4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$\nThe correct order of these fractions from the smallest is ....",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "$0,4\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}$",
        "$\\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ 0,4$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$",
        "$25\\%\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}\\ ;\\ 0,4\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}$"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "$0.4\\ ;\\ 25\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{2}\\ ;\\ \\frac{3}{5}$",

    {
      "en_exp": "Total pencils = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Number of yellow pencils = $3$. Probability of drawing a yellow pencil = $3$ out of $10$.",
      "id": 24,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan sekumpulan pensil dengan keterangan warna berikut!\nBerdasarkan keterangan gambar di samping, peluang terambilnya pensil warna kuning adalah ...",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total pensil = $2 + 3 + 5 = 10$. Jumlah pensil kuning = $3$. Peluang terambil pensil kuning = $3$ dari $10$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "3 out of 5",
        "3 out of 10",
        "1 out of 10",
        "2 out of 10"
      ],
      "id_options": [
        "3 dari 5",
        "3 dari 10",
        "1 dari 10",
        "2 dari 10"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the collection of pencils with the following color descriptions!\nBased on the image description, the probability of drawing a yellow pencil is ...",
      "image": "<svg width=\"500\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .pencil { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; }\n    .text { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; font-weight: bold; }\n    .brace { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <defs>\n    <g id=\"pencil_body\">\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 20,120 0,120 0,20\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 20,20 0,20\" fill=\"#f3d5b5\" class=\"pencil\"/>\n      <polygon points=\"10,0 13,8 7,8\"/>\n    </g>\n  </defs>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 40)\">\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"0\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"25\" fill=\"#4a90e2\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,130 C 0,140 15,140 22.5,150 C 30,140 45,140 45,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"22.5\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">biru</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"80\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"105\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"130\" fill=\"#f8e71c\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 80,130 C 80,140 95,140 105,150 C 115,140 130,140 130,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"105\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">kuning</text>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"170\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"195\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"220\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"245\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <use href=\"#pencil_body\" x=\"270\" fill=\"#d0021b\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 170,130 C 170,140 205,140 230,150 C 255,140 290,140 290,130\" class=\"brace\"/>\n    <text x=\"230\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\">merah</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },

      "id_q": "Bu Widya berjualan buah-buahan di pasar. Buah-buahan yang laku terjual yaitu $1\\ kg$ buah stroberi, $15\\ kg$ buah apel, $15\\ kg$ buah jeruk, dan $25\\ kg$ buah mangga. Skala peluang terjualnya buah stroberi yaitu ...",
      "ans": 2,

      "id_q": "Sebuah bak air berbentuk kubus diisi air sampai penuh sehingga volume air dalam bak tersebut adalah $32.768\\ cm^3$. Panjang rusuk bak tersebut adalah....",

    {
      "en_exp": "Discount = $15\\% \\times 300,000 = 45,000$. Price to pay = $300,000 - 45,000 = Rp\\ 255,000.00$.",
      "id": 29,
      "id_q": "Citra Bersama dengan Ibunya pergi ke Toko Sepatu Berkah untuk membeli sepasang sepatu. Saat tiba di toko, Citra melihat ada sepatu yang sangat ia inginkan. Pada label harga tertera $Rp\\ 300.000,00$. Penjaga toko mengatakan bahwa hari itu toko sedang mengadakan diskon menjelang Ramadhan. Diskon yang diberikan sebesar $15\\%$. Berapa Citra dan Ibunya harus membayar sepatu tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Diskon = $15\\% \\times 300.000 = 45.000$. Harga yang harus dibayar = $300.000 - 45.000 = Rp\\ 255.000,00$.",
      "en_options": [
        "Rp 245,000.00",
        "Rp 250,000.00",
        "Rp 255,000.00",
        "Rp 260,000.00"

      "en_q": "Citra together with her mother went to Berkah Shoe Store to buy a pair of shoes. Upon arriving at the store, Citra saw shoes she really wanted. The price tag showed $Rp\\ 300,000.00$.     {
      "en_exp": "Female population = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1,440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1,440 = 840$ people.",
      "id": 30,
      "id_q": "Jumlah keseluruhan penduduk desa Sugih Waras adalah $1.440$ orang. Apabila perbandingan banyak penduduk laki-laki dan perempuan adalah $5 : 7$, maka hitunglah banyak penduduk perempuan yang ada di desa tersebut!",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Penduduk perempuan = $\\frac{7}{5 + 7} \\times 1.440 = \\frac{7}{12} \\times 1.440 = 840$ jiwa.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"

      "en_q": "The total population of Sugih Waras village is $1,440$ people. If the ratio of the number of male to female population is $5 : 7$, calculate the number of female population in the village!",

    {
      "id": 31,
      "en_exp": "Total harvest = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9.8$ tons.",
      "id_q": "Pak Joko memiliki tanah dengan luas $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hektar. Tanah tersebut ditanami kedelai. Jika setiap hektarnya mampu menghasilkan $\\frac{14}{5}$ ton kedelai, maka hitunglah berapa ton jumlah panen kedelai seluruhnya!",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total panen = $3 \\frac{1}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{7}{2} \\times \\frac{14}{5} = \\frac{98}{10} = 9,8$ ton atau $9 \\frac{4}{5}$ ton.",
      "en_q": "Mr. Joko has land with an area of $3 \\frac{1}{2}$ hectares. The land is planted with soybeans. If each hectare can produce $\\frac{14}{5}$ tons of soybeans, calculate how many tons the total soybean harvest is!",
      "options": [

      ],

    {
      "en_exp": "The combined volume is the sum of the volume of the cube and the volume of the rectangular prism.\n1. Volume of the Cube = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1,000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume of the Prism = $l \\times w \\times h = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Combined Volume = $1,000 + 750 = 1,750\\ cm^3$.",
      "id": 32,
      "id_q": "Perhatikan gabungan bangun ruang berikut ini!\nBangun tersebut terdiri dari kubus dengan panjang rusuk 10 cm dan balok yang menempel di sebelah kanannya dengan ukuran panjang 15 cm, lebar 10 cm, dan tinggi 5 cm. Berapakah volume gabungan bangun ruang tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Volume bangun gabungan tersebut adalah jumlah dari volume kubus dan volume balok.\n1. Volume Kubus = $s \\times s \\times s = 10 \\times 10 \\times 10 = 1.000\\ cm^3$.\n2. Volume Balok = $p \\times l \\times t = 15 \\times 10 \\times 5 = 750\\ cm^3$.\n3. Volume Gabungan = $1.000 + 750 = 1.750\\ cm^3$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "Observe the following composite 3D shape!\nThe shape consists of a cube with an edge of 10 cm and a rectangular prism attached to its right side with a length of 15 cm, width of 10 cm, and height of 5 cm. What is the combined volume of the 3D shape?",
      "id_options": [
        "1.550 cm\u00b3",
        "1.650 cm\u00b3",
        "1.750 cm\u00b3",
        "1.850 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "en_options": [
        "1,550 cm\u00b3",
        "1,650 cm\u00b3",
        "1,750 cm\u00b3",
        "1,850 cm\u00b3"

      "image": "<svg width=\"400\" height=\"250\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .line { stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .fill-shape { fill: #f9f9f9; stroke: black; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linejoin: round; }\n    .text { font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(50, 20)\">\n    <!-- Kubus -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,180 L 120,180 L 120,110 L 50,110 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 50,110 L 80,80 L 150,80 L 120,110 Z\"/>\n    <!-- Sisi kanan kubus tertutup balok, tapi garis ini penting -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,110 L 150,80 L 150,115 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Balok -->\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,180 L 220,180 L 220,145 L 120,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 120,145 L 150,115 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    <path class=\"fill-shape\" d=\"M 220,180 L 250,150 L 250,115 L 220,145 Z\"/>\n    \n    <!-- Label -->\n    <text x=\"75\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"170\" y=\"200\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">15 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"25\" y=\"150\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"245\" y=\"175\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">5 cm</text>\n    <text x=\"215\" y=\"105\" class=\"text\" text-anchor=\"middle\">10 cm</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 33,
      "en_exp": "Based on the presented data, the scores and the number of students receiving them (frequency) are: Score 50 is 2 students, Score 60 is 3 students, Score 70 is 5 students, Score 80 is 4 students, Score 90 is 3 students, and Score 100 is 3 students.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nBentuk tabel frekuensi yang benar dari data di atas adalah ....",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Berdasarkan data yang disajikan, urutan dan jumlah siswa yang mendapatkannya (frekuensi) adalah: Nilai 50 ada 2 siswa, Nilai 60 ada 3 siswa, Nilai 70 ada 5 siswa, Nilai 80 ada 4 siswa, Nilai 90 ada 3 siswa, dan Nilai 100 ada 3 siswa.",

      "image": "<svg width=\"350\" height=\"200\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .cell { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(25, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"300\" height=\"160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,40 L 300,40\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,80 L 300,80\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,120 L 300,120\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 60,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 120,0 L 120,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,0 L 180,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 240,0 L 240,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">90</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">80</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 34,
      "en_exp": "Average = $((50 \\times 2) + (60 \\times 3) + (70 \\times 5) + (80 \\times 4) + (90 \\times 3) + (100 \\times 3)) / 20 = 1,520 / 20 = 76$.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nRata-rata nilai matematika dari data tersebut adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Rata-rata = $((50 \\times 2) + (60 \\times 3) + (70 \\times 5) + (80 \\times 4) + (90 \\times 3) + (100 \\times 3)) / 20 = 1.520 / 20 = 76$.",
      "options": [
        "A",
        "B",
        "C",
        "D"
      ],
      "en_q": "The following is the math score data of 20 6th-grade students of SD Muara Tanjung:\nThe average math score from the data is ....",
      "id_options": [

        "75",
        "76",
        "77"
      ],
      "en_options": [

      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"350\" height=\"200\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <rect width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\" fill=\"white\"/>\n  <style>\n    .cell { font-size: 16px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; }\n    .border { stroke: black; stroke-width: 1; fill: none; }\n  </style>\n  <g transform=\"translate(25, 20)\">\n    <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"300\" height=\"160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,40 L 300,40\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,80 L 300,80\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 0,120 L 300,120\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 60,0 L 60,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 120,0 L 120,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 180,0 L 180,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <path d=\"M 240,0 L 240,160\" class=\"border\"/>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"25\" class=\"cell\">90</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">60</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"65\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">80</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"105\" class=\"cell\">70</text>\n    <text x=\"30\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">90</text> <text x=\"90\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">70</text> <text x=\"150\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">50</text> <text x=\"210\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">100</text> <text x=\"270\" y=\"145\" class=\"cell\">80</text>\n  </g>\n</svg>"

    {
      "id": 35,
      "en_exp": "The mode is the value that appears most frequently. Based on the data, the score 80 appears the most, which is 6 times.",
      "id_q": "Berikut ini adalah data nilai matematika 20 siswa kelas VI SD Muara Tanjung:\nModus dari data nilai matematika tersebut adalah ....",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "Modus adalah nilai yang paling sering muncul. Berdasarkan data, nilai 80 muncul paling banyak yaitu 6 kali.",

      "id": 1,
      "en_exp": "Mean = Total sum / number of data. Total = $7+8+6+8+9+7+10+9 = 64$. Mean = $64 / 8 = 8$.",
      "id_q": "Budi ingin menghitung rata-rata nilai ulangan matematika yang ia dapatkan selama semester ini. Nilainya adalah: 7, 8, 6, 8, 9, 7, 10, dan 9. Berapakah rata-rata (mean) nilai Budi?",

      "en_q": "Budi wants to calculate the average of his math test scores this semester. His scores are: 7, 8, 6, 8, 9, 7, 10, and 9. What is Budi's average (mean) score?",

      "image": ""

    {
      "id": 18,
      "en_exp": "$V = \\frac{1}{3} \\times BA \\times h = \\frac{1}{3} \\times 60 \\times 15 = 300$ cm\u00b3.",
      "id_q": "Atap pendopo kelurahan berbentuk limas segiempat. Jika diukur, luas lantai di bawah atap tersebut adalah 60 cm\u00b2 (pada miniatur) dan tinggi puncaknya adalah 15 cm. Berapakah volume ruang di dalam atap miniatur tersebut?",

      "options": [
        "300 cm\u00b3",
        "450 cm\u00b3",
        "600 cm\u00b3",
        "900 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"150\" height=\"150\" viewBox=\"0 0 150 150\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><path d=\"M 75 20 L 30 110 L 100 130 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 75 20 L 100 130 L 130 90 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 30 110 L 60 70 L 130 90\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 75 20 L 60 70\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 19,
      "en_exp": "$V = BA \\times h = 25 \\times 12 = 300$ cm\u00b3.",
      "id_q": "Cokelat kesukaan Doni dikemas dalam kotak unik berbentuk prisma segitiga. Jika luas alas kemasan cokelat tersebut 25 cm\u00b2 dan tinggi kemasannya 12 cm, berapakah volume ruang di dalam kotak cokelat itu?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "$V = LA \\times t = 25 \\times 12 = 300$ cm\u00b3.",
      "en_q": "Doni's favorite chocolate is packaged in a unique triangular prism box. If the base area of the chocolate packaging is 25 cm\u00b2 and the height is 12 cm, what is the volume of the space inside the chocolate box?",
      "options": [
        "150 cm\u00b3",
        "300 cm\u00b3",
        "450 cm\u00b3",
        "600 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"150\" height=\"120\" viewBox=\"0 0 150 120\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><polygon points=\"75,20 30,100 120,100\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><polyline points=\"75,20 100,10 145,80 120,100\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><line x1=\"30\" y1=\"100\" x2=\"65\" y2=\"80\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><line x1=\"145\" y1=\"80\" x2=\"65\" y2=\"80\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><line x1=\"100\" y1=\"10\" x2=\"65\" y2=\"80\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 20,
      "en_exp": "Initial total = $5 \\times 42 = 210$. New total = $210 + 48 = 258$. New mean = $258 / 6 = 43$ kg.",
      "id_q": "Lima anak di regu pramuka kelas 6 memiliki rata-rata berat badan 42 kg. Tiba-tiba, Budi yang memiliki berat badan 48 kg bergabung masuk ke regu tersebut. Berapakah rata-rata berat badan regu pramuka itu sekarang?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "Total awal = $5 \\times 42 = 210$. Total baru = $210 + 48 = 258$. Mean baru = $258 / 6 = 43$ kg.",
      "en_q": "Five children in a 6th-grade scout patrol have an average weight of 42 kg. Suddenly, Budi, who weighs 48 kg, joins the patrol. What is the new average weight of the scout patrol now?",
      "options": [
        "43 kg",
        "44 kg",
        "45 kg",
        "46 kg"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 21,
      "en_exp": "Mango appears 3 times, apple 2 times, orange 1 time.",
      "id_q": "Paman pedagang buah mencatat pesanan dari 6 pelanggan pertamanya pagi ini: mangga, apel, mangga, jeruk, apel, dan mangga. Berdasarkan data tersebut, buah apakah yang paling banyak dipesan (modus)?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Mangga muncul 3 kali, apel 2 kali, jeruk 1 kali.",
      "en_q": "Uncle the fruit seller noted the orders from his first 6 customers this morning: mango, apple, mango, orange, apple, and mango. Based on this data, which fruit is the most ordered (mode)?",
      "options": [
        "Apel",
        "Mangga",
        "Jeruk",
        "Tidak ada modus"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 22,
      "en_exp": "$s = \\sqrt[3]{512} = 8$ dm.",
      "id_q": "Ayah membangun sebuah bak mandi baru berbentuk kubus di belakang rumah. Setelah diisi penuh oleh kran, bak mandi itu menampung air sebanyak 512 liter (dm\u00b3). Berapakah panjang bagian dalam rusuk bak mandi tersebut dalam desimeter?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "$s = \\sqrt[3]{512} = 8$ dm.",
      "en_q": "Father built a new cube-shaped bathtub in the backyard. Once completely filled by the tap, the tub holds 512 liters (dm\u00b3) of water. What is the inner edge length of the bathtub in decimeters?",
      "options": [
        "6 dm",
        "7 dm",
        "8 dm",
        "9 dm"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"150\" height=\"150\" viewBox=\"0 0 150 150\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><path d=\"M 40 40 L 100 40 L 100 100 L 40 100 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 40 40 L 60 20 L 120 20 L 100 40\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 120 20 L 120 80 L 100 100\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 40 100 L 60 80 L 120 80\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 60 20 L 60 80\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 23,
      "en_exp": "$SA = \\pi r^2 + 2 \\pi r h = (3.14 \\times 100) + (2 \\times 3.14 \\times 10 \\times 20) = 314 + 1,256 = 1,570$ cm\u00b2.",
      "id_q": "Kakak membuat kreasi tempat pensil berbentuk tabung tanpa tutup dari lembaran plastik mika. Jika kakak ingin jari-jarinya 10 cm dan tingginya 20 cm, berapakah luas lembaran plastik mika yang digunakan kakak? (\u03c0 = 3,14)",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "$LP = \\pi r^2 + 2 \\pi r t = (3,14 \\times 100) + (2 \\times 3,14 \\times 10 \\times 20) = 314 + 1.256 = 1.570$ cm\u00b2.",
      "en_q": "Sister made a creative open-top cylindrical pencil case from a sheet of mica plastic. If sister wants a radius of 10 cm and a height of 20 cm, what is the area of the mica plastic sheet used? (\u03c0 = 3.14)",
      "options": [
        "1.256 cm\u00b2",
        "1.570 cm\u00b2",
        "1.884 cm\u00b2",
        "2.198 cm\u00b2"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"120\" height=\"160\" viewBox=\"0 0 120 160\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><ellipse cx=\"60\" cy=\"30\" rx=\"40\" ry=\"15\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 20 30 L 20 120\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 100 30 L 100 120\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 20 120 A 40 15 0 0 0 100 120\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 20 120 A 40 15 0 0 1 100 120\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 24,
      "en_exp": "Median is between the 4th (6) and 5th (7) data points. $(6+7)/2 = 6.5$. This data is multimodal.",
      "id_q": "Bayu sedang bermain dadu dan mencatat angka yang keluar pada 8 lemparan berturut-turut: 5, 5, 6, 6, 7, 7, 8, dan 8. Dari catatan permainan Bayu tersebut, pernyataan manakah di bawah ini yang benar?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Median berada di antara data ke-4 (6) dan ke-5 (7). $(6+7)/2 = 6,5$. Data ini bersifat multimodal (lebih dari 1 modus).",
      "en_q": "Bayu is playing dice and noted the numbers rolled in 8 consecutive throws: 5, 5, 6, 6, 7, 7, 8, and 8. From Bayu's game record, which statement below is correct?",
      "options": [
        "Modusnya 8",
        "Mediannya 6,5",
        "Meannya 7",
        "Tidak ada modus"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 25,
      "en_exp": "$h = V / (l \\times w) = 240 / (10 \\times 6) = 240 / 60 = 4$ cm.",
      "id_q": "Ibu memanggang kue bolu menggunakan cetakan berbentuk balok. Volume kue yang dihasilkan adalah 240 cm\u00b3. Jika cetakan itu memiliki panjang 10 cm dan lebar 6 cm, berapakah tinggi cetakan kue milik ibu tersebut?",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "$t = V / (p \\times l) = 240 / (10 \\times 6) = 240 / 60 = 4$ cm.",
      "en_q": "Mother baked a sponge cake using a rectangular prism-shaped mold. The volume of the resulting cake is 240 cm\u00b3. If the mold has a length of 10 cm and a width of 6 cm, what is the height of mother's cake mold?",
      "options": [
        "2 cm",
        "3 cm",
        "4 cm",
        "5 cm"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"200\" height=\"120\" viewBox=\"0 0 200 120\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><path d=\"M 30 50 L 140 50 L 140 100 L 30 100 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 30 50 L 60 20 L 170 20 L 140 50\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 170 20 L 170 70 L 140 100\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 30 100 L 60 70 L 170 70\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 60 20 L 60 70\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 26,
      "en_exp": "$r = 10$ cm. $SA = 4 \\pi r^2 = 4 \\times 3.14 \\times 100 = 1,256$ cm\u00b2.",
      "id_q": "Tim sepak bola sekolah memesan sebuah bola dengan diameter 20 cm untuk piala bupati. Jika pengrajin akan menjahit kulit sintetis menutupi seluruh permukaannya, berapakah luas bahan kulit yang dibutuhkan? (\u03c0 = 3,14)",
      "ans": 2,
      "id_exp": "$r = 10$ cm. $LP = 4 \\pi r^2 = 4 \\times 3,14 \\times 100 = 1.256$ cm\u00b2.",
      "en_q": "The school football team ordered a ball with a diameter of 20 cm for the regent's cup. If the craftsman will sew synthetic leather covering its entire surface, what is the area of leather material needed? (\u03c0 = 3.14)",
      "options": [
        "314 cm\u00b2",
        "628 cm\u00b2",
        "1.256 cm\u00b2",
        "2.512 cm\u00b2"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"120\" height=\"120\" viewBox=\"0 0 120 120\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><circle cx=\"60\" cy=\"60\" r=\"50\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 10 60 A 50 15 0 0 0 110 60\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 10 60 A 50 15 0 0 1 110 60\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 27,
      "en_exp": "Total must be $4 \\times 25 = 100$. $15 + 20 + 30 = 65$. $x = 100 - 65 = 35$.",
      "id_q": "Dalam lomba memasukkan bola basket, Dino bertanding sebanyak 4 babak dengan rata-rata bola masuk 25 buah. Pada babak 1 ia memasukkan 15 bola, babak 2 ada 20 bola, dan babak 4 ada 30 bola. Berapakah jumlah bola yang dimasukkan Dino (nilai x) pada babak 3?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Total haruslah $4 \\times 25 = 100$. $15 + 20 + 30 = 65$. $x = 100 - 65 = 35$.",
      "en_q": "In a basketball shooting competition, Dino played 4 rounds with an average of 25 successful shots. In round 1 he scored 15 shots, round 2 was 20 shots, and round 4 was 30 shots. How many shots did Dino score (value x) in round 3?",
      "options": [
        "30",
        "35",
        "40",
        "45"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 28,
      "en_exp": "$V = \\frac{1}{3} \\times (10 \\times 10) \\times 12 = 100 \\times 4 = 400$ cm\u00b3.",
      "id_q": "Siswa kelas 6 ditugaskan membuat miniatur piramida Mesir berbentuk limas segi empat (persegi). Miniatur tersebut memiliki sisi alas berukuran 10 cm dan tinggi dari titik puncak ke alas adalah 12 cm. Berapakah volume miniatur piramida buatan siswa tersebut?",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "$V = \\frac{1}{3} \\times (10 \\times 10) \\times 12 = 100 \\times 4 = 400$ cm\u00b3.",
      "en_q": "The 6th-grade students were assigned to make a miniature Egyptian pyramid in the shape of a square pyramid. The miniature has a base side of 10 cm and a height from the peak to the base of 12 cm. What is the volume of the students' miniature pyramid?",
      "options": [
        "400 cm\u00b3",
        "1.200 cm\u00b3",
        "600 cm\u00b3",
        "360 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"150\" height=\"150\" viewBox=\"0 0 150 150\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><path d=\"M 75 20 L 30 110 L 100 130 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 75 20 L 100 130 L 130 90 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 30 110 L 60 70 L 130 90\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 75 20 L 60 70\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    },
    {
      "id": 29,
      "en_exp": "Data is ordered, 9 points (odd). The middle value is the 5th point, which is 7.",
      "id_q": "Guru olahraga memberikan nilai keterampilan senam untuk 9 anak dengan urutan sebagai berikut: 4, 5, 5, 6, 7, 8, 8, 8, dan 9. Manakah yang merupakan nilai tengah (median) dari kemampuan senam anak-anak tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "Data sudah urut, jumlah data 9 (ganjil). Nilai tengah adalah data ke-5, yaitu 7.",
      "en_q": "The physical education teacher gave gymnastics skill scores to 9 children in the following order: 4, 5, 5, 6, 7, 8, 8, 8, and 9. Which one is the median value of the children's gymnastics skills?",
      "options": [
        "6",
        "7",
        "8",
        "7,5"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "id": 30,
      "en_exp": "$6s^2 = 150 \\rightarrow s^2 = 25 \\rightarrow s = 5$ cm. $V = s^3 = 5^3 = 125$ cm\u00b3.",
      "id_q": "Rudi melipat sebuah kertas karton untuk membuat dadu raksasa berbentuk kubus. Setelah jadi, dadu tersebut dicat seluruh permukaannya dan ternyata menghabiskan cat untuk luasan 150 cm\u00b2. Berapakah volume udara di dalam dadu raksasa Rudi tersebut?",
      "ans": 1,
      "id_exp": "$6s^2 = 150 \\rightarrow s^2 = 25 \\rightarrow s = 5$ cm. $V = s^3 = 5^3 = 125$ cm\u00b3.",
      "en_q": "Rudi folded cardboard to make a giant cube-shaped dice. Once finished, the dice was painted all over its surface and it turned out to use paint for an area of 150 cm\u00b2. What is the volume of air inside Rudi's giant dice?",
      "options": [
        "25 cm\u00b3",
        "125 cm\u00b3",
        "150 cm\u00b3",
        "625 cm\u00b3"
      ],
      "image": "<svg width=\"150\" height=\"150\" viewBox=\"0 0 150 150\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><path d=\"M 40 40 L 100 40 L 100 100 L 40 100 Z\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 40 40 L 60 20 L 120 20 L 100 40\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 120 20 L 120 80 L 100 100\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 40 100 L 60 80 L 120 80\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 60 20 L 60 80\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-dasharray=\"4\" stroke-width=\"2\"/></svg>"
    }
  ],

        "17"
      ],
      "image": ""
    },
    {
      "en_exp": "$SA = 4 \\pi r^2 = 4 \\times \\frac{22}{7} \\times 14 \\times 14 = 88 \\times 28 = 2,464$ cm\u00b2.",

      "ans": 1,

      "ans": 1,

    {
      "id": 3,
      "en_exp": "3 hours = 180 minutes. Temperature rise = (180 / 10) \u00d7 3\u00b0C = 18 \u00d7 3 = 54\u00b0C. Final temperature = -25\u00b0C + 54\u00b0C = 29\u00b0C.",
      "id_q": "Suhu sepotong daging beku mula-mula -25\u00b0C. Daging tersebut kemudian dikeluarkan dari lemari pendingin. Pada suhu ruangan, suhu daging naik 3\u00b0C setiap 10 menit. Jika daging tersebut dibiarkan pada suhu ruangan selama 3 jam, maka suhu daging adalah ....",
      "ans": 0,
      "id_exp": "3 jam = 180 menit. Kenaikan suhu = (180 / 10) \u00d7 3\u00b0C = 18 \u00d7 3 = 54\u00b0C. Suhu akhir = -25\u00b0C + 54\u00b0C = 29\u00b0C.",
      "en_q": "The initial temperature of a piece of frozen meat is -25\u00b0C. It is then taken out of the freezer. At room temperature, the meat's temperature rises by 3\u00b0C every 10 minutes. If the meat is left at room temperature for 3 hours, the temperature of the meat will be ....",

        "29\u00b0C",

        "32\u00b0C"

    {
      "id": 15,
      "en_exp": "Surface area of the cube $= 6s^2 = 384$. So $s^2 = 64$ which means the edge length $s = 8\\ cm$. Volume $= s^3 = 8^3 = 512\\ cm^3$.",

      "id_q": "Budi ingin membuat kotak dari kertas karton untuk membuat tempat menyimpan mainan rubik. Jika salah satu panjang rusuk rubik adalah $7\\ cm$, maka luas kertas minimal yang harus disiapkan Budi adalah ... $cm^2$",

      "id": 24,
      "en_exp": "Convert all to decimals: $0.3 = 0.30$. $\\frac{2}{5} = 0.40$. $15\\% = 0.15$. $1 \\frac{1}{4} = 1.25$. Order from smallest: $0.15\\ ;\\ 0.30\\ ;\\ 0.40\\ ;\\ 1.25$. Or $15\\%\\ ;\\ 0.3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$.",
      "id_q": "$0,3\\ ;\\ \\frac{2}{5}\\ ;\\ 15\\%\\ ;\\ 1 \\frac{1}{4}$\nUrutan pecahan berikut dari yang terkecil adalah ....",
